name: Powered By People
subject: Did you see Beto’s email yesterday?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Did you see Beto’s email from yesterday?

Trump was just sworn in as President of the United States. The stakes
could not be higher right now, so we want to be sure you have a chance to
read Beto’s message from yesterday:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Today, Donald Trump was sworn in as President of the United States.

I know this is a difficult moment for many of us who have fought so hard
for a different future for Texas and for America.

But I want to share something with you that gives me hope, even on this
challenging day. Throughout 2024, our Powered by People volunteers worked
tirelessly across Texas, meeting, registering, and staying in touch with
young Texans through genuine person-to-person connections on college
campuses and in their communities.

Our volunteers met these voters in person, and then followed up with them
in personal peer-to-peer text conversations, over 285,000 individual
messages that helped first-time voters navigate polling locations,
answered questions about voter ID requirements, and offered encouragement
in the face of Texas's notorious voter suppression tactics.

Today marks a choice. We can give in to despair, or we can choose action.
And if there's one thing I've learned in all my years of organizing in
Texas, it's that action is the antidote to despair.

The challenges ahead are significant. Trump and his allies have made it
clear they want to drag our country backward – threatening reproductive
rights, blocking common-sense gun reform, and undermining the very
foundations of our democracy. But remember: they want us to give up.
They're counting on our discouragement.

Instead, we're going to build on the infrastructure and relationships we
created in 2024. We're going to expand our reach, deepen our connections,
and continue the patient, persistent work of organizing – voter by voter,
conversation by conversation.

This isn't just about opposing Trump. It's about fighting for our vision
of what Texas and America can be. It's about protecting the rights and
dignity of every person in our state. It's about building a future worthy
of our children's highest aspirations.

I know
the road ahead looks daunting. But I've seen the power of what we can
accomplish when we stay focused, stay committed, and stay in the fight
together. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250121.nHlSVC&refcode=ema20250121-239952&t=1001&akid=239952%2E444211%2EuXNOVc ]Will you join us in continuing this vital work?

The next four years will test us in ways we can hardly imagine. But I've
never been more certain that the future belongs to those willing to do the
patient, persistent work of building it. And I've never been more grateful
to be in this fight alongside you.

Let's get to work,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=239952%2E444211%2EuXNOVc

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Honoring Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
body:
|
#
Friend, I had the honor of spending this past weekend celebrating Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. – and his vision of racial equality, civil rights, and social justice for all Americans. I joined the Flint Public Library, and Zion Missionary Baptist Church in Saginaw for worship and annual celebrations with local leaders and community members. Together, we reflected on Dr. King's teachings and renewed our commitment to building a more just and equitable future for all Michiganders. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100760479/523801192/-1606559029?refcode=em-1.21.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzgxYTVkMi01M2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6dzsbD1s16ShkrfRjBBN69e-UDkznax3yDsXGVir8eI=) Dr. King’s legacy extends beyond just a single day of remembrance – it’s a call to action that demands our ongoing commitment to justice, equality, and opportunity for all. I know for many, this moment in America feels hard. I feel it too. But as Dr. King once reminded us, _**“the arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice.” **_ The truth is that progress is possible, but it doesn’t happen on its own – and it often doesn’t follow a linear path. It takes our collective action to stand up against injustice and push for meaningful change, even when the road ahead feels uncertain or the challenges seem insurmountable. We have a lot of work ahead of us, and I’m grateful that you’re a part of this fight. Onward, Kristen

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Copies are limited – get yours
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ The study of God [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7d0bd3f9a35347bab8215ca6880975df&_e=kQJCdbr2xrQZ_qsdn-TxGpUyDeisTcCV9xMYg6g5NVgqeYTei-r4hGyCuBmaU8d0q8GzxO46XE0AJJW13Wd6O1cDfoLHgqgA_lOXtbpQyGouvs2JI8QsFK3xlv1DHrvJE2nM70v-uD6-UDe4NIUyKgfMdoPaoAXMTWHwVcP7n8fP2vNG4Ec44xhV-MkmJFJ38AZWXAhuzZdAtEixnUWKh03HuGdQ7OfhrCD3m0hKxW5FP2mB0NW1KU-5ykPUOT4rOUP0IZfwGidtSkys3IwFaFOTOGtyR2mflcg2pFZaSQvwT4zRZq0PsW6WhSwjYIstwUCshSpZYdfT_wbnOqww0aFTShI1N6QSN1-hfgf-dWdW7OCtMAXfQQrMxEqBekGjXo-4FPOLUdkVbM0MNjcMmd3G2Bp2HmehR_a7mwI9hvc8NCLr0zttcMBthZszdrUcwnUWeWpPbP5nROQP2C7Igg%3D%3D) Peter , I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7d0bd3f9a35347bab8215ca6880975df&_e=kQJCdbr2xrQZ_qsdn-TxGpUyDeisTcCV9xMYg6g5NVgqeYTei-r4hGyCuBmaU8d0q8GzxO46XE0AJJW13Wd6O1cDfoLHgqgA_lOXtbpQyGouvs2JI8QsFK3xlv1DHrvJE2nM70v-uD6-UDe4NIUyKgfMdoPaoAXMTWHwVcP7n8fP2vNG4Ec44xhV-MkmJFJ38AZWXAhuzZdAtEixnUWKh03HuGdQ7OfhrCD3m0hKxW5FP2mB0NW1KU-5ykPUOT4rOUP0IZfwGidtSkys3IwFaFOTOGtyR2mflcg2pFZaSQswdHuBxTYxnuyLSaGWMgMpaVqTCVgBRztLFkWbqSWYYGLdXHvLWf5yE2sGqHy-_ifckFYfgNxJ0WDArZwqpoo4e1xC2CxZ1zo2ImSeIkVpi3wZUXCpQvDZV4KGNXDMjZRopClfdEv0Fz-ehSmBh90e0UyBcESknppVEvB6iKFu0w%3D%3D) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7d0bd3f9a35347bab8215ca6880975df&_e=kQJCdbr2xrQZ_qsdn-TxGpUyDeisTcCV9xMYg6g5NVgqeYTei-r4hGyCuBmaU8d0q8GzxO46XE0AJJW13Wd6O1cDfoLHgqgA_lOXtbpQyGouvs2JI8QsFK3xlv1DHrvJE2nM70v-uD6-UDe4NIUyKgfMdoPaoAXMTWHwVcP7n8fP2vNG4Ec44xhV-MkmJFJ38AZWXAhuzZdAtEixnUWKh03HuGdQ7OfhrCD3m0hKxW5FP2mB0NW1KU-5ykPUOT4rOUP0IZfwGidtSkys3IwFaFOTOGtyR2mflcg2pFZaSQtymPVEUxcEVM3MqpTHPnOKgFt2uMqmhpSS7dhfo0MYOd8IW_YhAHDzzT-yZcbVmsd6SPVl6CMtAnqbtxSB5S2SY9lySFKZvCM2DggmLZFOpsPYnE6-ALTre0tLf0yKAgavdXzog-fluds--P_oGq-CG9TosRAvfhrFWh4AdThy3A%3D%3D). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7d0bd3f9a35347bab8215ca6880975df&_e=kQJCdbr2xrQZ_qsdn-TxGpUyDeisTcCV9xMYg6g5NVgqeYTei-r4hGyCuBmaU8d0q8GzxO46XE0AJJW13Wd6O1cDfoLHgqgA_lOXtbpQyGouvs2JI8QsFK3xlv1DHrvJE2nM70v-uD6-UDe4NIUyKgfMdoPaoAXMTWHwVcP7n8fP2vNG4Ec44xhV-MkmJFJ38AZWXAhuzZdAtEixnUWKh03HuGdQ7OfhrCD3m0hKxW5FP2mB0NW1KU-5ykPUOT4rOUP0IZfwGidtSkys3IwFaFOTOGtyR2mflcg2pFZaSQsaoAWI-4JRoRr3gjmLtphExFwA83MhsvcVRV1YMKPYW0JjiWqrCd5WqySoWhqLIr-nrd4F2V0xCQfO9jSIyQPTVsIjdRdjMd508oTN9boh1bCIMZ3IkxS38Iq6wP40vz9njRE3kqG-rbyt-EUW2N4herlmVqQ0mK5bxGAVbHwMTQ%3D%3D)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Men like this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
More than 400,000 Americans died during World War Two. Our parents and grandparents fought fascism to free the world and unleash an era of unprecedented prosperity and peace.
#
Peter,
More than 400,000 Americans died during World War Two. Our parents and grandparents fought fascism to free the world and unleash an era of unprecedented prosperity and peace.
Now, this:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250121-1-120&t=1&akid=34102%2E3013755%2EVTfAr9)
A Nazi salute from one of the President’s chief advisors. The richest man in the world. An unelected and potentially illegal bureaucrat tapped to execute Trump’s agenda.
The United States of America liberated the world from men like this, and now they sit at the top of our government. There are dark and difficult days ahead of us, Peter.
So, we’re asking you to make a donation to VoteVets tonight. Not in a few hours, not tomorrow, not next week.
Tonight. Here’s why:
VoteVets is going to fight these fascists with everything we’ve got, but it’s going to take an absolutely massive warchest to undermine their efforts and retake power over the next four years.
VoteVets is more successful than any other organization at finding and supporting strong, principled leaders. That work never stops, and we’re already looking at our next generation.
That’s why we’re asking you to chip in tonight. Every dollar you give is an act of resistance, and we’ll use it to organize — against this administration, against the legislation coming from the MAGA House and Senate, and towards the critical infrastructure we’ll need to defeat them.
[**Please: Use this link and chip in to VoteVets and your donation — of whatever you can give — is going to be put to work immediately.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250121-1-120&t=2&akid=34102%2E3013755%2EVTfAr9)**

Friend,

It's official: Donald Trump was just inaugurated for a second term as President.
I'm deeply concerned about a lot of the extreme ideas Trump has for our nation for the next four years, including cutting health care, letting states ban abortion, and helping the ultra-wealthy and big corporations on the backs of hardworking people.
**To make matters worse, the GOP-controlled Congress is prepared to _bend over backward_ to give President Trump anything he wants.** We must remain extra vigilant to stop Trump from using his second term to help right-wing billionaires and corporate special interests at the expense of hardworking Americans.
**That's why my team launched our flash poll to find out whether Democrats like you share our concerns about the second Trump administration, but we're running out of time to reach our 5,000-response goal before our midnight deadline, and we're still missing your response._[Please, tell us now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100760989/523806313/1135363953?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk5435-su-nd&code=jtk5435-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDRiNTA4NC01NGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mbtUKhFlsk-SSQb4fFYt0vmGIBR9GweNGm_2EUZdrec=&emci=c9453239-24d5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ad4b5084-54d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=3800590)_**

clean_body: We must remain vigilant | | | Are you worried about Trump's extreme plans for our country? | | | | Friend, It's official: Donald Trump was just inaugurated for a second term as President. I'm deeply concerned about a lot of the extreme ideas Trump has for our nation for the next four years, including cutting health care, letting states ban abortion, and helping the ultra-wealthy and big corporations on the backs of hardworking people. To make matters worse, the GOP-controlled Congress is prepared to bend over backward to give President Trump anything he wants. We must remain extra vigilant to stop Trump from using his second term to help right-wing billionaires and corporate special interests at the expense of hardworking Americans. That's why my team launched our flash poll to find out whether Democrats like you share our concerns about the second Trump administration, but we're running out of time to reach our 5,000-response goal before our midnight deadline, and we're still missing your response. Are you worried about Trump's extreme plans for our country? | | | | | By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. name: YDA DNC Representatives
subject: Starting Now: Don’t Miss the Vice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Democrats of America, _www
body:
| |
---
Dear Derek The **Young Democrats of America** , **Voters of Tomorrow** , and the **DNC Youth Council** want to remind you about an incredible opportunity to hear directly from candidates running for DNC Vice Chair At-Large!

Young voters are a driving force in shaping our democracy, but our voices remain underrepresented in the Democratic Party’s leadership. With no at-large DNC appointments currently held by individuals under 40, it’s clear that we have more work to do to elevate youth leadership.

That’s why this**Vice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum** is so important. It’s your chance to hear from candidates who’ve secured at least 40 signatures as they share their vision for the future of our party. This forum ensures young voters have a seat at the table, amplifying the voices that will shape our shared future.
---
|
---
**You can watch our multi-night forum at[yda.org/forum](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8muuNkLitJ6OdptZHejSkZzbOSph2Us8NLjWv3kxeRJI19os1NuM2kZSkZvDsGulXTsmBhQdyCPc9yYaFY-BMa-DQ64vyOMCn6CqFAc8tPL9TNhjIHIXFUKRGIk9IYSlLWrJc1JPnGM4MTMdzrOYL36RKDR6aq-OGKCKgVmnOFo18dpEUAZAoFi2cXSeYN62wdgcBOzfYCHmG_Appd2ZFIrn0VBMPXin7-JbsJP7Ny__37SSIsrQtkde-qagLFPOiEQgF4n-W5S33F_q9yFDPuosxAkDuTyT1fz_Pm61-WvGMCTC5rMRqFYYvgXPTpSQ_0uwehB4pIW0wZTs7CnCAZ7Q/4dd/lDunIQDqRxuztO85SElZ8w/h0/h001.4-7tA5PY2WqPT4Yei3WoaVYpmet5zbAQcaveL2sebs4)**

---
**Event Details**

---
**Night 1** **When:** Tuesday, January 21, at 7:00 PM EST/4:00 PM PST
**Moderator:** Eve Levenson, former DNC Youth Coalitions Director and Harris-Walz National Youth Vote Director
**Who:** Candidates from the Eastern & Southern Regions **Night 2** **When:** Wednesday, January 22, at 8:30 PM ET/5:30 PM PST
**Moderator:** Joshua Rush, Senior Communications Advisor for the Young Democrats of America
**Who:** Candidates from the Midwest & Western Regions
---
_*While candidates will be split up by region, both forums are intended to serve a national audience._
---
This forum isn’t just about the candidates—it’s about you. Together, we’ll amplify young people’s priorities and elevate our leadership. We can’t wait to see you there!
In solidarity,

**Your YDA DNC Representatives
****
** Quentin Wathum-Ocama, YDA President & DNC Executive Committee Member
Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative

Katherine Jeanes, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative
---

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Donald Trump is already working to dismantle the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, We knew that our fights would start on day one of Donald Trump’s presidency — and Donald Trump is already working to dismantle the U.S. Constitution and target immigrant communities. **Among the dozens of executive orders that Donald Trump signed immediately after being sworn in is an order that would try to end birthright citizenship, putting immigrant communities at risk.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100761067/523808166/-2009428715?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYzOTg0Ni01NWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAgBh1FIsXd00yyiscKwnK51lIirEmkmRKUalyLBkU=) _Phoenix New Times, 01/20/2025_ Peter, birthright citizenship is protected by the 14th amendment and was used to grant citizenship to the then-recently freed, formerly enslaved Black Americans right after the Civil War. Birthright citizenship is a fundamental civil liberty — and the notion that Donald Trump would do away with it is unconstitutional. I promise that I will fight tooth and nail against the horrific anti-immigrant policies of the extreme right. AZ-03 is home to diverse communities of immigrants who speak more than 64 languages — communities that will be targeted and hurt by Trump’s extreme policies. [**Our Latino community and refugees from all walks of life can and must be protected. If you’re with us, will you make a contribution right now to help us fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100761068/523808167/-2009428715?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYzOTg0Ni01NWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAgBh1FIsXd00yyiscKwnK51lIirEmkmRKUalyLBkU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100761069/523808168/-2009428715?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDYzOTg0Ni01NWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9zAgBh1FIsXd00yyiscKwnK51lIirEmkmRKUalyLBkU=)

As the daughter of immigrants who came here in search of a better life, I know all too well how dangerous policies from a xenophobic president can hurt the people we love. I’m ready as ever to stand up for immigrant communities in Congress.
Thanks for your support, Peter.
— Yassamin Ansari, AZ-03

Among the dozens of executive orders that Donald Trump signed immediately after being sworn in is an order that would try to end birthright citizenship, putting immigrant communities at risk. = Phoenix New Times, 01/20/2025 Peter, birthright citizenship is protected by the 14th amendment and was used to grant citizenship to the then-recently freed, formerly enslaved Black Americans right after the Civil War. I promise that I will fight tooth and nail against the horrific anti-immigrant policies of the extreme right. AZ-03 is home to diverse communities of immigrants who speak more than 64 languages — communities that will be targeted and hurt by Trump’s extreme policies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = As the daughter of immigrants who came here in search of a better life, I know all too well how dangerous policies from a xenophobic president can hurt the people we love. I’m ready as ever to stand up for immigrant communities in Congress. Thanks for your support, Peter. — Yassamin Ansari, AZ-03 Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

| Oy vey, Peter. The GOP-led 119th Congress – with President Trump now in the White House – is ready to implement Project 2025 right now. That’s bad news for us Democrats. But here’s the silver lining: Because of MAGA Republicans Elise Stefanik, Matt Gaetz, and Mike Waltz leaving the House, Democrats have ONE MORE CHANCE to FLIP THE HOUSE. Not to mention, JD Vance and Marco Rubio are now part of Trump’s administration, giving Democrats TWO openings to cut the GOP’s Senate majority. With the GOP unable to lose any votes from passing extremist legislation, we need to take advantage and make a Democratic House majority and razor-thin GOP Senate the firewall to stop Trump and Project 2025. [So to help Democrats build momentum, we set a 24-HOUR goal of $100,000 to support Democrats in these five House and Senate races. body:
Trump has pardoned violent offenders who took part in the January 6, 2021 insurrection.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100761543/523825819/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTkyNTAxOS01YWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReYp9gt7Gm2KiYzCpyyl5DW8jGAgpu0xx4vggRqN_J0=&emci=a2b1e174-47d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a5925019-5ad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364)
---

| | We are just a few hours into Donald Trump's presidency. In that short amount of time, he issued a flurry of executive orders to undo all the progress we've made on clean energy, end birthright citizenship, give handouts to Big Pharma, and much more. **He also pardoned violent offenders who took part in the January 6, 2021 insurrection.** Four years ago, Trump used every trick in the book to try and override the results of a free and fair election. When his efforts failed in courts and legislatures across the country, he whipped up an angry mob to attack the Capitol. Now, he's pardoning people from that mob. **He's broadcasting to the world that he wants his supporters to use any means – legal or not, violent or otherwise – to overturn electoral outcomes that he doesn't like.** When leaders think the people's votes don't matter, they disregard the people's interests. They put their top donors first, they move stridently to take away civil liberties when those liberties threaten their agenda, and they take every opportunity to accumulate more power for themselves. Right now, Trump has never felt more emboldened. We're going to see the full impact of that as he pursues a radical agenda – from dismantling programs that help working families, to slashing health care, to restricting reproductive and LGBTQ+ rights, to giving even more tax breaks to billionaires and making everyone else foot the bill. And he's counting on Republicans in Congress to fall in line behind that agenda. I see no indication that any of them have the desire, or the backbone, to push back. If we want to uphold our democracy, it starts with mustering every political muscle we can to expose the GOP's agenda and rally people against it. Our best defense right now is the popular will – and as dark as this moment right now may seem, I've seen narrow Congressional majorities fail to pass unpopular legislation time and time again. **Our job is to make the Republicans' anti-working class and anti-democracy agenda unpopular, and then sustain the political tides into 2026 and beyond.** We're going to face a lot of challenges. But we can overcome them. We _must_ overcome them. Our democracy is counting on us. So let's get to work. [**If you can, please chip in to help fuel our movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100761544/523825820/-2044921950?refcode=2025-01-21-pardons&recurring=yes&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a5925019-5ad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTkyNTAxOS01YWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReYp9gt7Gm2KiYzCpyyl5DW8jGAgpu0xx4vggRqN_J0=) _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: Dan Carr
subject: Fighting 4 Freedom
body:
Freedom is central to America's identity, deeply rooted in our Constitution, Declaration of Independence, and national values.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Fighting 4 Freedom
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jan 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
Freedom is central to America's identity, deeply rooted in our Constitution, Declaration of Independence, and national values. Excessive taxation threatens that freedom, hindering economic progress, discouraging innovation, and placing strain on families and businesses. Reducing taxes isn't just about numbers; it's about safeguarding the liberties envisioned by our Founding Fathers.
**[Click Here To Finish Reading Article:](https://substack.com/redirect/1f037247-f6d0-4f7b-b577-636178a10cd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: This is not what we deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012125_2&amount=25]
Folks,
As we assess threats with Trump back in office, this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
Whether former Florida AG Pam Bondi gets confirmed for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012125_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012125_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012125_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012125_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012125_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012125_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012125_2&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012125_2&amount=25]

clean_body: AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [] Folks, As we assess threats with Trump back in office, this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years . If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws. Whether former Florida AG Pam Bondi gets confirmed for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years? Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling. We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand. Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone. We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). body:
This is flat-out WRONG >>
| Team, we’re FURIOUS. **Billionaires were given a front row seat at Trump’s Inauguration »** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/end-dark-money-pet/?source=VPP_20250121_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18634%2E878179%2EwHaTAa) Jeff Bezos’ Amazon gave **$1 million** to Trump’s inauguration fund...

Mark Zuckerberg’s Meta gave **$1 million** to Trump’s inauguration fund...

Elon Musk spent **$277 million** to back Trump and GOP candidates last year...

**_And at Trump’s inauguration, they ALL sat in _FRONT_ of his cabinet!_**

[We’re urgently calling on the top 150 Democrats in your state — including you — to sign our petition to keep dark money OUT of politics! Add your name before 11:59 pm »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/end-dark-money-pet/?source=VPP_20250121_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18634%2E878179%2EwHaTAa) | [ADD MY NAME: DARK MONEY DOES NOT BELONG IN POLITICS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/end-dark-money-pet/?source=VPP_20250121_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18634%2E878179%2EwHaTAa)
---

Jeff Bezos just bought the Washington Post, and they **didn’t endorse a candidate in 2024** for the _first time_ in 3 decades.

Mark Zuckerberg owns Facebook and Instagram, and is **crashing down on DEI efforts!**

Elon Musk is trying to **BUY MSNBC** and make it a **far-right news network.**

These people want to DESTROY our free and fair elections with their money and influence, _and Trump is GREATLY benefitting from it!_

[We demand better, folks, but we need your help: Will you sign our petition DEMANDING the end of Dark Money in politics? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/end-dark-money-pet/?source=VPP_20250121_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18634%2E878179%2EwHaTAa)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The first 24 hours of Donald Trump’s second presidency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’re about 24 hours into Donald Trump’s second presidency, and he’s
already wreaking havoc on our democracy and communities across the nation.

On Day 1 alone, Trump and his administration:

* Issued an unconstitutional executive order attempting to end
birthright citizenship;
* Announced ICE raids starting as soon as today in major cities like
Chicago;
* Issued pardons for all of the 1,000+ January 6th insurrectionists,
including far-right Oath Keepers and Proud Boys leaders and those
charged with physically assaulting Capitol police;
* Withdrew the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement and World Health
Organization;
* Issued an executive order declaring the federal government will only
recognize two genders, undermining the dignity of transgender and
non-binary Americans;
* Reversed a Biden-era executive order that lowered prescription drug
costs for millions of people on Medicare;
* Restored the federal death penalty;
* Pulled down a government website dedicated to reproductive healthcare
resources.

In order to protect communities across the country from Trump’s hateful
attacks, we need strong working-class leaders in the Democratic Party that
will fight back against Republican cruelty, expose the right’s
divide-and-conquer tactics, and unite everyday people across all
backgrounds against the billionaires and corporations picking our pockets.

This is not the time for establishment Democrats to throw our most
vulnerable communities under the bus in the name of corporate
bipartisanship. Bipartisanship with the Trump administration looks like
doing the bidding of billionaires and abandoning the needs of
working-class communities.

This moment demands more working-class leaders in the Democratic Party,
unbeholden to the same corporate and billionaire interests as Trump and
MAGA Republicans and unafraid to stand up for our values and our people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250121-2?refcode=em20250121-36352&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36352_1203867_T9iSb_&akid=36352%2E1203867%2ET9iSb_ ]If you agree, help us recruit the working-class champions another Trump
administration demands by making a grassroots contribution →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250121-2?refcode=em20250121-36352&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36352_1203867_T9iSb_&akid=36352%2E1203867%2ET9iSb_ ]Contribute $5

The more grassroots resources we raise from people like you, the more
working-class champions we can send to Congress to fight for us.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250121-36352-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36352_1203867_T9iSb_&akid=36352%2E1203867%2ET9iSb_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36352%2E1203867%2ET9iSb_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]If you agree, help us recruit the working-class champions another Trump administration demands by making a grassroots contribution → [ ]Contribute $5 The more grassroots resources we raise from people like you, the more working-class champions we can send to Congress to fight for us. — Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: So, it begins . . . are you in?
body:
I returned to my hotel bed at 4:30 a.m. after a packed day celebrating President Trump's inauguration. Everywhere I stepped in D.C., the enthusiasm in the air was electric.

Patriot,

I returned to my hotel bed at 4:30 a.m. after a packed day celebrating President Trump's inauguration.

Everywhere I stepped in D.C., **the enthusiasm in the air was electric**.

President Trump began his second term with a flurry of executive orders boldly written to help us, the American people.

More than ever, I feel an obligation to my mission to expose the corrupt, arrogant, and destructive forces in our own government that work against us . . . They will be working behind the scenes to undermine the Trump Administration, even more so than they did during his first term.

**[Will you help me expose them all?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0GPmzAQhX-NuYGYMTbhwKFtmmq1VbTX3Utl7IG4ZTBrIFH-fWUURdqjv_fJb57hefT9vRX1d4F48W4RiEJ-E4if7zeO219-_ZV_yLch_9RnVinFHw_1ik95sub3z_eXt8O5rxZ91i_N9PF6hae-3md6yo_Sgtj4MdH6mLlW9q6sMmqhlrUCKAGyS1spCaZzdaO1a2zTNHBQ0BGpsju4GlTmWyxRlYBYgtIVFl0jAXtrq4PuLQGKqtx7CsMUvTWwrDcTYwhc2MDZ2F7WdV72w04CTwvZLVJhJnJhTYbAU_hH1BOT82aIYZsT4iE3kfJ72HI_5dzluynkaVv5zxK2aEnI41dNoE5p-mjjPX2QlWJ63yI8gDU8Gz9MQh65E6gNh21ahTyiymLr5psfR7_oWlTlsI9LU64t_g8AAP__8U6PRg)**

Scores of Federal whistleblowers have contacted my organization, O'Keefe Media Group, through our confidential lines within the last several months.

We have been overrun with credible sources, and, as I expected, following President Trump's swearing-in, leads began to pour in from government workers and officials who want the truth to be heard.

Each lead must be meticulously vetted, and each story must be investigated, filmed, produced, and released, costing us thousands of dollars in man-hours and travel expenses.

But the result is the same: We expose wrongdoing and let the chips fall where they may. And now, with President Trump in charge, I’m guessing those falls will be more dramatic than ever.

Last week, we exposed Jamie Mannina, a self-proclaimed "spy hunter" who was working as a top advisor to the Joint Chiefs of Staff within the Pentagon.

“Was” is the keyword here. Mannina was fired the day we released our investigation into him, during which he claimed he was working with current and retired Generals to "explore what we can do to protect people from Trump."

How many more Jamie Manninas are there, with nearly 1.7 million people working for the federal government?

How many are plotting right now to undermine the policies of the new administration and actively work against the American people?

Thousands is the answer. Maybe hundreds of thousands.

**[And with your help, I will work from dawn until dusk to expose them all.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0GPmzAQhX-NuYGYMTbhwKFtmmq1VbTX3Utl7IG4ZTBrIFH-fWUURdqjv_fJb57hefT9vRX1d4F48W4RiEJ-E4if7zeO219-_ZV_yLch_9RnVinFHw_1ik95sub3z_eXt8O5rxZ91i_N9PF6hae-3md6yo_Sgtj4MdH6mLlW9q6sMmqhlrUCKAGyS1spCaZzdaO1a2zTNHBQ0BGpsju4GlTmWyxRlYBYgtIVFl0jAXtrq4PuLQGKqtx7CsMUvTWwrDcTYwhc2MDZ2F7WdV72w04CTwvZLVJhJnJhTYbAU_hH1BOT82aIYZsT4iE3kfJ72HI_5dzluynkaVv5zxK2aEnI41dNoE5p-mjjPX2QlWJ63yI8gDU8Gz9MQh65E6gNh21ahTyiymLr5psfR7_oWlTlsI9LU64t_g8AAP__8U6PRg)**

**[Are you in?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUj0GPmzAQhX-NuYGYMTbhwKFtmmq1VbTX3Utl7IG4ZTBrIFH-fWUURdqjv_fJb57hefT9vRX1d4F48W4RiEJ-E4if7zeO219-_ZV_yLch_9RnVinFHw_1ik95sub3z_eXt8O5rxZ91i_N9PF6hae-3md6yo_Sgtj4MdH6mLlW9q6sMmqhlrUCKAGyS1spCaZzdaO1a2zTNHBQ0BGpsju4GlTmWyxRlYBYgtIVFl0jAXtrq4PuLQGKqtx7CsMUvTWwrDcTYwhc2MDZ2F7WdV72w04CTwvZLVJhJnJhTYbAU_hH1BOT82aIYZsT4iE3kfJ72HI_5dzluynkaVv5zxK2aEnI41dNoE5p-mjjPX2QlWJ63yI8gDU8Gz9MQh65E6gNh21ahTyiymLr5psfR7_oWlTlsI9LU64t_g8AAP__8U6PRg)**

Our mission is nearly impossible as we will be working against decades-in-the-making embedded infrastructure within the federal government.

Through hiring practices and by intent, our federal government is filled with workers who share the same mindset as Hillary Clinton and Kamala Harris. And, as we've seen repeatedly, they operate in secret, plotting and planning against American interests.

While President Trump will purge visible leaders who will work against him (and has already started), we need to find and expose second-tier, unknown players.

It will take an unmatched degree of vigilance from both me and you. I'm willing and happy to put in the work, but I need your help to make the magic happen. So please support OMG's work today and give all you can for the biggest impact.

Thank you so much for all that you do, and as always . . . stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: 99% Perspiration
body:
“Genius is 1% Inspiration and 99% Perspiration,” with the point being that an idea is nothing without hard work. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=4ec5e28aa0&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| We’ve all heard the Thomas Edison quote, “Genius is 1% Inspiration and 99% Perspiration,” with the point being that an idea is nothing without hard work. It also suggests that if someone shows up and works hard, they can build a good life for themselves.

Is it true?

This week on the [podcast](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=c9e9e43d80&e=0f227c2ae3) I interview Adam Chandler, the author of the new book, “99% Perspiration: A New Working History of the American Way of Life.” “This idea is baked into the ethos of what it means to be an American: if you work hard, you’ll get ahead. But by the numbers it’s not as true anymore, and doubts are picking up. For example, a 2023 Gallup poll found that 39 percent of Americans believed they were working hard but failing to get ahead. In 2002 that number was only 23 percent.”
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=d9cf5f3101&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| It's an idea that I’ve been grappling with for some time. My parents immigrated to the US and told me and my brother that if we studied, got a good education and worked hard, things would go our way. And it has been true in our cases. My brother is a successful professor; he’s the more studious and academic of the two of us. I’ve certainly lived a version of the American dream via entrepreneurship that is well beyond what my parents had in mind.

But I’m a numbers guy, and the numbers say that it’s gotten shakier and shakier for Americans to get ahead even if they put their head down and do the right thing. “I interviewed a woman for the book who was the first in her family to graduate from college, was working three jobs, and is wondering, ‘what did I do wrong?’ because she’s just treading water. She didn’t do anything wrong. There are more structural problems now that keep her from getting ahead,” Adam observes.

Most of us know the big ones: housing prices are higher and higher. My parents bought a modest house in Schenectady in the early 70s for about $40,000. That same house might cost $300,000 or more today. The cost of college continues to climb; my peers are trying to squirrel away tuition for two or three kids and the sums blow their minds. And of course, just about everyone tries to avoid the healthcare system because of sky-high costs and overgrown bureaucracy.

“The frontier myth of rugged individualism obscures that there was a lot of public support even in settling the West,” Adam says. “We say it was the individual but it was often acts of policy that would make it possible to build a railroad or clear a pass.” Adam’s book is largely about various points in American history and the mythology that arose, often oversimplifying a more complicated reality.

Here's the thing – I think people ought to have a positive attitude about what they can accomplish with hard work. It’s much more productive to think, “Let me go out there and kick butt and hopefully it will take me someplace good” than to say, “It doesn’t matter what I do, I’ll never get there, the deck is stacked against me.” That’s defeatism, which doesn’t lead anywhere.

But I also 100% endorse Adam’s point that there are policies we can undertake that would make hard work more likely to pay off. “Companies investing in their workers helps everyone and creates a lot of value,” Adam says. “And measures like the child tax credit give families more resources and flexibility.” I, of course, believe that AI is going to eat a lot of work for years.

There are indeed many more policies to pursue. If anything, what we should fear is a country where people think that applying oneself or doing the right thing doesn’t pay off. “People are getting more and more frustrated in the U.S. It’s feeding into our politics in unfortunate ways,” Adam writes. He also argues for a somewhat more enlightened culture where our lives and identities don’t revolve around work to the same degree.

I’d love for us to head in a more positive, people-centered direction economically, no matter who makes it happen. We’re not heading there right now. You know what it’s going to take? A whole lot of us working very hard to get there.

For my interview of Adam, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b04f002fca&e=0f227c2ae3). For his new book click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=c82e5c4f9b&e=0f227c2ae3). To see what Forward is doing in your state, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=d41d610283&e=0f227c2ae3) – we’re growing fast, particularly in [California](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=277ca5c57b&e=0f227c2ae3).
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=75252b8f44&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=9b75defd42&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=dde28f45ad) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=dde28f45ad).
---

name: The Hon. J.D. Crouch II | CEO & President | USO
subject: A personal note of gratitude for all you helped accomplish in 2024
body:
Thank you for all you did to support service members in 2024!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[GIVE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
********Thanks to your steadfast support, the USO delivered essential resources and moments of connection to our military heroes deployed around the world. From heartfelt care packages and warm meals to special events and internet access for video calls home from all over the world, your generosity provided them with comfort and hope at times when they needed it the most.
Here are just a few moments that you helped make possible in 2024:
[](https://links.e.uso.)
_National Guard members responding to hurricane recovery efforts enjoy a moment of respite at a Mobile USO._
[](https://links.e.uso.)
_USO Canine Volunteer Penny comforts service members at the USO Warrior Center at Landstuhl, Germany._
[](https://links.e.uso.)
_A new USO Center is unveiled aboard USS Abraham Lincoln, one of six ship-based USO Centers at sea._
Your kindness reached service members responding to hurricanes in the Southeast, those deployed to conflict areas in the Middle East and hundreds of thousands of people bravely serving our country all over the world. In every challenge they faced, your support was a reminder that they are never alone.
And already, this community's generosity is making a difference in the new year. When service members deployed to the front lines of the California wildfires, you helped the USO mobilize quickly to provide essential supplies and support. As we move forward into 2025, our service members are prepared to face whatever comes next -- knowing caring supporters like you will always have their backs.
On behalf of everyone at the USO and the military heroes we serve, **thank you for helping us successfully complete our mission in 2024 and prepare for whatever comes our heroes ' way in 2025 and beyond.**
The Hon. J.D. Crouch II
CEO & President, USO

clean_body: Thank you for all you did to support service members in 2024! Dear USO Supporter, ******Thanks to your steadfast support, the USO delivered essential resources and moments of connection to our military heroes deployed around the world. From heartfelt care packages and warm meals to special events and internet access for video calls home from all over the world, your generosity provided them with comfort and hope at times when they needed it the most. Here are just a few moments that you helped make possible in 2024: National Guard members responding to hurricane recovery efforts enjoy a moment of respite at a Mobile USO. USO Canine Volunteer Penny comforts service members at the USO Warrior Center at Landstuhl, Germany. A new USO Center is unveiled aboard USS Abraham Lincoln, one of six ship-based USO Centers at sea. Your kindness reached service members responding to hurricanes in the Southeast, those deployed to conflict areas in the Middle East and hundreds of thousands of people bravely serving our country all over the world. In every challenge they faced, your support was a reminder that they are never alone. And already, this community's generosity is making a difference in the new year. When service members deployed to the front lines of the California wildfires, you helped the USO mobilize quickly to provide essential supplies and support. As we move forward into 2025, our service members are prepared to face whatever comes next -- knowing caring supporters like you will always have their backs. On behalf of everyone at the USO and the military heroes we serve, thank you for helping us successfully complete our mission in 2024 and prepare for whatever comes our heroes ' way in 2025 and beyond. The Hon. J.D. Crouch II CEO & President, USO United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD). The appearance of DOD visual information does not imply or constitute DOD endorsement. Photos by the USO and Petty Officer 3rd Class Aleksandr Freutel. (C)2025 USO, Inc. name: Israel on Campus Coalition
subject: It took more than 15 months
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=61f7533487544ae58071bf3769376076&_e=w1OSItv0uq87KSlYcgapu4b0CJNGGWEt_Ct8YGYobtUeO_1aasJ5tn1gh1CIgL6Cy7a3gKac36dHcMxIujjRBKSc198II-xKSg-QpdAOk6vgqnOPiPOTqu3q8qnc50hDd3x7Ujm0nYJAOblNXpXabyEfhmJEfdiTZMYu3HT--rdYWD-AHlOlgOEAKzxoIaLA7jxWMXid4BmFoASBP2Lw5qGjPROeal43MYUZTaNtgrrhQqdFNmfOM8f2X1TX0AwdxAkOKmQjPjkmuyK3pGSWAOe5KcNAmi5tWEEzbk9mCDpRDhPwD1Quw3rbTSTLuznUdMFjxC1uoBeUAQWq_JvXV0WYXum_Ci24qylJ7zm6RqFjGFLo7Et-4y_-_F4dnt3bIJ_7ylERXu3r6ZrG89Zsbw%3D%3D)
---
| |
Peter,
After more than 15 months in captivity, three Israeli hostages who were kidnapped during Hamas’s barbaric October 7 attack on Israel are finally home! Romi Gonen (24), Emily Damari (28), and Doron Steinbrecher (31) are back in Israel and at last reunited with their loved ones who have advocated tirelessly for their freedom.
Here at Israel on Campus Coalition, we are committed to standing with pro-Israel students on campus, supporting America’s ally against Iranian-backed terrorism, and advocating for the release of the hostages held in Gaza. Our coalition actively engages college students and partners across the country, strengthening support for Israel as it defends itself.
Your participation is vital; your contributions provide the necessary tools and resources to fulfill our mission. We invite you to join this movement. **[Help us stand with pro-Israel students on campus, and let us champion this vital cause together.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=61f7533487544ae58071bf3769376076&_e=w1OSItv0uq87KSlYcgapu4b0CJNGGWEt_Ct8YGYobtUeO_1aasJ5tn1gh1CIgL6Cy7a3gKac36dHcMxIujjRBKSc198II-xKSg-QpdAOk6vgqnOPiPOTqu3q8qnc50hDd3x7Ujm0nYJAOblNXpXabyEfhmJEfdiTZMYu3HT--rdYWD-AHlOlgOEAKzxoIaLA7jxWMXid4BmFoASBP2Lw5qGjPROeal43MYUZTaNtgrrhQqdFNmfOM8f2X1TX0Awd6Tdx2WseaQZdc3UekE7y0pvTTjIplZsDAhWTC3oWrEseLt4yWYJOKncdwZ-pzv78TMt43OR_DDEE9Fw-5rTu5Nq0NsZMn-B_bmaB9MIISaGDgEIUvLtH4qyuqU8pYulEy0LF8AiykXmVw2r9pzi0Jg%3D%3D)** Your support makes a difference.
Warm regards,Israel on Campus Coalition

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, After more than 15 months in captivity, three Israeli hostages who were kidnapped during Hamas’s barbaric October 7 attack on Israel are finally home! Romi Gonen (24), Emily Damari (28), and Doron Steinbrecher (31) are back in Israel and at last reunited with their loved ones who have advocated tirelessly for their freedom. Here at Israel on Campus Coalition, we are committed to standing with pro-Israel students on campus, supporting America’s ally against Iranian-backed terrorism, and advocating for the release of the hostages held in Gaza. Our coalition actively engages college students and partners across the country, strengthening support for Israel as it defends itself. Your participation is vital; your contributions provide the necessary tools and resources to fulfill our mission. We invite you to join this movement. Your support makes a difference. Warm regards,Israel on Campus Coalition | | Copyright © 2025 Israel on Campus Coalition, All rights reserved. You subscribed to our newsletter via our website, PO Box 34640Washington, DC 20043 |

Friend,

I returned to my hotel bed at 4:30 a.m. after a packed day celebrating President Trump's inauguration.

Everywhere I stepped in D.C., **the enthusiasm in the air was electric**.

President Trump began his second term with a flurry of executive orders boldly written to help us, the American people.

More than ever, I feel an obligation to my mission to expose the corrupt, arrogant, and destructive forces in our own government that work against us . . . They will be working behind the scenes to undermine the Trump Administration, even more so than they did during his first term.

**[Will you help me expose them all?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUkcGOpCAQhp-mvGmwaMU-eJhd4542mT3MbjKXCUJpkxExCHacp9_gdjrZI9__hR-qpF1nMx4tiG-AeDN6A0TgL4AYA_8t395--iNHes3vHClhwO8Pc8enuyh5eX-JK1Ov2926vhJ_vvbyaYdjpaf7qCzISjMnKrpMtxeU5agyakvBRVViU9XZrR0Q9XiVSstRNddBcM0G0VDZjDRwISgzLTKsWInIEAWyQnPF6rohoRRJvCJc2FlUjJ4o3MzySV5LMx-Fcjab21sI63Y-rAfsN1LRUyEX0i4kA7B3n0QjWdJGTt7FNSE75dJTfriYmyW3Q36awPsY7MfmolcEvPtfA6xTmi6K9kwfJJBP5zHo8kGUtKs00wK8swNgLa2LSwDeYQVYfyyz0cC744uW6cd-3f_Bc3m8k7hG9_6ryXyr17uZZ7PVAi5sOqeQPr23-DcAAP__wlKeMQ)**

Scores of Federal whistleblowers have contacted my organization, O'Keefe Media Group, through our confidential lines within the last several months.

We have been overrun with credible sources, and, as I expected, following President Trump's swearing-in, leads began to pour in from government workers and officials who want the truth to be heard.

Each lead must be meticulously vetted, and each story must be investigated, filmed, produced, and released, costing us thousands of dollars in man-hours and travel expenses.

But the result is the same: We expose wrongdoing and let the chips fall where they may. And now, with President Trump in charge, I’m guessing those falls will be more dramatic than ever.

Last week, we exposed Jamie Mannina, a self-proclaimed "spy hunter" who was working as a top advisor to the Joint Chiefs of Staff within the Pentagon.

“Was” is the keyword here. Mannina was fired the day we released our investigation into him, during which he claimed he was working with current and retired Generals to "explore what we can do to protect people from Trump."

How many more Jamie Manninas are there, with nearly 1.7 million people working for the federal government?

How many are plotting right now to undermine the policies of the new administration and actively work against the American people?

Thousands is the answer. Maybe hundreds of thousands.

**[And with your help, I will work from dawn until dusk to expose them all.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUkcGumzAQRb9m2IHMGGyyYJEWsav0qiqt9DaRsQdiBQM1diL69RUoivSWPvfI155Rbhltv9UgvwHizZoVEIGfATEG_ltdLj_8liJ9pE-OtGPA7y_zgW930qr4PMeF6Y_16ea2lH_-PfK3HbaF3u6rMiOn7LhT2SSmLlDlvU6oziWXZY5VKZJbTaIrSqMZP52k6XKGopKS5yWJvmJM8cTWyLBkOSJDlMgywzUToiKpNSk8IRTsKMp6TxRudrqTN8qOW6Znl4z1LYRlPR7WArYr6egpUxOZOewGYDvfiXpyZKwa_ByXHbkhVZ7SbY6pnVLXpYcJvI3BXdc5ek3Am68aoNjT_aLojvRFAvn93AeTv4hWblF2mIA3rgMUys1xCsAbLAHFdRqtAd4Ml7-_zrwb7vcDHsvjjcIlzp8_q8TXZnnacbSrkFCw4ZjC_ulHjf8DAAD__7p4nGw)**

**[Are you in?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUkUGPpCwQhn9NedNggdIePMx8xu-w2WT2MLubuUwQSpuMiEHojvvrN5pOJ3vkeZ_wQpVy62zHvQX5CohXazZABP4CiCnyn-r9_XvYc6S3_M6RDgz438O84dNdtBIfL2ll-m27O99X8tefW_m0477S031UFuSUnQ8qu8y0AlU56ozaUnJZlXip6uzaamEuZSX0SE3Dx6oamCBOUqNAyYamyWyLDCtWIjJEiawwXLO6vpDUmhQ2CIKdRcUYiOLVLl8UjLLzXmjvsrm9xrhu58N6wH4jnQIVaiHj42EA9v6LaCRHxqop-LQeyE25CpTvPuV2yd2QnybwPkX3ufkUNAHv_tUA6yM9LkruTB8kUjjOYzTlg2jlVmWnBXjnBsBaOZ-WCLzDCrD-XGZrgHe_5fQ6_T98E80Jz-XxTuGa_MePSxZas97tPNutliDYdE7h-PStxb8BAAD__ybnnEU)**

Our mission is nearly impossible as we will be working against decades-in-the-making embedded infrastructure within the federal government.

Through hiring practices and by intent, our federal government is filled with workers who share the same mindset as Hillary Clinton and Kamala Harris. And, as we've seen repeatedly, they operate in secret, plotting and planning against American interests.

While President Trump will purge visible leaders who will work against him (and has already started), we need to find and expose second-tier, unknown players.

It will take an unmatched degree of vigilance from both me and you. I'm willing and happy to put in the work, but I need your help to make the magic happen. So please support OMG's work today and give all you can for the biggest impact.

Thank you so much for all that you do, and as always . . . stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

body:
Your contributions have been instrumental in strengthening the America First Majority in the House.
Donor Appreciation Week is here! Take a look >>>
|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

**We're honored to recognize you as one of our most loyal supporters, and we're thrilled to present you with the prestigious Golden Gavel Award.** This distinction is reserved for individuals who have made a significant impact to our House GOP Majority.

name: Family Research Council Action
subject: Please pray for President Trump and the 119th Congress with us
body:
As a nation, we stand at a pivotal moment.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfkrda0cdmllgv7cest6tj3d98ian70hie1crli8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, **As a nation, we stand at a pivotal moment. With new leadership****in Congress and the White House****, the decisions made in the coming months will deeply impact America 's future.**At Family Research Council Action (FRC Action), we work everyday in Washington to advance biblical values like faith, family, and freedom. But we know lasting change comes only through prayer and God's guidance.**_[**_Will you pray with us today?_**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0h587p9sm3phjfs3jnon69v2vkjdpgg7kn6g7cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)_** With the 119th Congress having been sworn in, already our team is on Capitol Hill talking to members and their staff about the need for pro-faith, pro-family, and pro-freedom policies in 2025 and beyond.
---
[ **Sign the Prayer Pledge**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrs5e7nd0imhgum59vpjb2egbp5cou320gm4cbl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
---
Our new leaders have their work cut out for them. The list of issues they must address is unprecedented in its scope and severity. Everything from terrorism and national security, to war raging abroad, to $36 trillion in national debt, competition with China, unprecedented illegal immigration, creeping one-world government, and more. Ultimately, as believers, we know that success for our country will only come from humbling ourselves before the Lord. Acknowledging Him as sovereign, provider, protector, and creator. [**We need to pray our leaders seek the Lord in the new year, that they appeal to Him every step they take in Washington, D.C., and learn to place their trust in Him, if they don't already know Him**.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcp05katjf5atuae9a8cadabqq9srq82e77l62i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) The apostle Paul, under the inspiration of the Holy Spirit, commanded the Church to continually pray for all those in positions of authority: _First of all, then, I urge that supplications, prayers, intercessions, and thanksgivings be made for all people, for kings and all who are in high positions, that we may lead a peaceful and quiet life, godly and dignified in every way. This is good, and it is pleasing in the sight of God our Savior, who desires all people to be saved and to come to the knowledge of the truth. (1 Timothy 2:1-4 ESV)_
---
[ **Sign the Prayer Pledge**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za6ouduuej4896bur0j07hiubrej1g9jl2fsdgo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
---
In light of this command, **[Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) invites you to join us in praying the following prayer for the 119th Congress and the Trump administration:](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zah55vn0uisodiifdj9fr4dthkaft9t04d85bo1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)**
---
|
---
_Father, we ask that You bless President Donald Trump and his team. Give them wisdom as they assemble the next administration.__We pray for the selection of federal leaders who understand what the founders understood: our rights do not come from the government. Instead, governments are put in place to protect the rights that You, our Creator, have given us. These rights include life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.__We pray that the chosen leaders would be strong men and women of character who prioritize the well-being of the people they serve over their own personal ambition. We ask that You would show them grace and cause them to turn toward You. Save those who are lost and use those who already serve You to be a light for Your kingdom._ _We ask that integrity, truth, and wisdom would prevail and guide President Trump, his cabinet, and Congress as they lead the United States of America during this critical time in our nation's history._ _In addition, we ask that You bless the 119th Congress and use America's representatives and senators to institute justice and promote righteousness. May they live up to their oath of office and serve their constituents well by doing what is right, even when it is unpopular._ _We acknowledge that Christians cannot afford to be complacent. Together, we must remain prayerful and vigilant, especially as a new Congress and president take office. May the Church stand strong for the truth of Your Word and fulfill its mission to be salt and light so that the people in this and all nations would be saved and come to the knowledge of the truth.__May all that is done be to Your glory and for Your name's sake._ _In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen._
---
[ **Sign the Prayer Pledge**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq6eigo6d4jd2g3reem1uts1f1rq4l6g459a50eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
---
|
---
|
---
# **FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001
---
Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) operates as a social welfare organization organized under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to FRC Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. Your contribution will be used in support of the general mission of FRC Action. FRC Action does not accept contributions designated or earmarked for the purpose of influencing an election.
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z60eudhvd85dalqii34t4broq5sncrr10vklbljo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4shh60pr246h22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpdf2t7b81rbfdehi7h3rbfq7r8ln7dee49ou4ao_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlgot1jehrsflukg32auh3l8j106lspoc6d42nk8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6ctimcor1c9gm49fg)

name: DOGE Survey via House GOP
subject: GONE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need your help to shrink the size of the government! Complete the DOGE Survey today >>

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

But House Republicans are on board, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpjcm6ro28csb2iju23hgns4h4gflqong51o6770_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2cph2bs "Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?")**

---
| |
---
| | **DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY**
**Issued By House GOP HQ**

**PATRIOT: Friend

STATUS: [INCOMPLETE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhe98s1cgclarhfam3fh9qcg8pa30hjb8pb9c0b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2cph2bs "INCOMPLETE")**
---

---

Government bureaucrats will cry foul when they see all the waste and fraud DOGE intends to cut, and we're here for it.

DOGE has a LOT of work to do to drain the swamp and get the government working for the people of this great country, and that starts now.

**[Will you please complete House GOP's DOGE Survey today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0r4j24bhm0ag2m6ortr42pr6eceog9ksao40dt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2cph2bs "Will you please complete House GOP’s DOGE Survey today?")**

Take care,

House Republicans

name: Dr. Naomi Wolf
subject: A Journey Across Divisions
body:
But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zruj11hbsfhp52ttfdvs1d9so2pq1rg9onigo1t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) Friend,

By this point, I’m used to criticism from some of my former colleagues along the lines of “What Happened to Naomi Wolf?” They’ve called me a “conspiracy theorist,” a “covid denier,” and a traitor.

**But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.** From my first book, _The Beauty Myth_ , in 1991 to ten other international bestsellers, including _Give Me Liberty_ , _Facing the Beast_ , and the co-editorship of _The Pfizer Papers, _my focus has been consistent: on basic human rights, freedom, and individual liberties.

What _has_ changed is that by pursuing these values, and speaking out for individual autonomy — _particularly during the lockdowns and vaccine mandates _— I’ve come up against forces bent on silencing dissent, enforcing conformity, advancing government narratives, and abolishing personal privacy.

**At no time in history has there been more danger to the individual.**

The merger of a collectivist corporatocracy with centralized governments around the world has created an Orwellian mess. It threatens free speech, free exercise of religion, freedom of movement, and personal privacy.

Not only presidents but also an army of unelected bureaucrats, have cracked down as never before in our lifetimes, by:
* Implementing mask and vaccine "mandates"
* Preventing the free exercise of religion
* Allowing favored groups to protest, while silencing opposing voices
* Demolishing small businesses
* Gathering and weaponizing Big Data
* Censoring free speech in the physical and digital public squares

I’m proud to work with some of the bravest advocates for freedom at Daily Clout. In the recent past, my team of volunteer researchers doggedly pursued and reported the truth about Pfizer’s cover-up of a flawed safety study, and documented side effects of their mRNA COVID-19 vaccines, as exposed in _The Pfizer Papers: Pfizer’s Crimes Against Humanity_.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zicddffd6tcbgjef9oahdcrtbsc5qv11ohsfu75g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) But speaking up isn’t without risk...

In speaking out against these threats, though I’ve been vilified by some former allies... _I’ve found some unlikely new ones_.

Among the latter is The Atlas Society, the leading nonprofit engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual liberty. Unlike other groups, The Atlas Society took an uncompromising stand against lockdowns and mandates — and rejected government bailouts.

The Atlas Society elevated my voice, even as I was censored and shadowbanned.

And I want to return the favor.

**I’m partnering with The Atlas Society to raise $25,000 in the next month to distribute 10,000 copies of their Pocket Guide to Free Speech on campus and at student conferences.**

[_**Donate today to help The Atlas Society reach the rising generation with the principles of liberty! Your contribution of $10, $35, $50, or more, helps them create innovative methods of shaping young hearts and minds to fight for liberty. Click to donate now. >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zteic470di9sijh8grb6dagd0amfcp00ffaiad90_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rifqupv5h8lbjpchrh57mh7v0c2knp4tj77v40_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
I’m a big believer in the power of coalitions. From my days as a political consultant to my co-founding of DailyClout.io, I’ve worked to find common cause with others who care passionately about liberty’s priorities, even when we don’t agree 100% on policy issues. For me — and The Atlas Society — our shared priority is engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual autonomy.

>From their animated Draw My Life videos on topics such as Free Speech, Cancel Culture, and *Disinformation,* to their Pocket Guide to Free Speech and their graphic novel of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ , The Atlas Society is advancing creative means to advocate for our most precious individual liberties.

They design their content and programming specifically for the 15–20-year-old demographic — a generation currently besieged by "woke," authoritarian indoctrination. It is vitally important that we support counter-messaging to this key demographic if we’re going to save the republic.

[_**Support the rising generation with the principles of liberty by donating $10, $35, $50, or more, to the Atlas Society. Click to donate now. >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z43prvukrm2gmh0g3tc8s4q65tc04i7216475ha8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

I’m grateful to The Atlas Society for doing this work — but I’m also grateful to them for reintroducing me to Ayn Rand. As a philosophy and literature scholar, I was, of course, aware of Rand’s oeuvre, but it wasn’t until recently that I began to appreciate the magnitude of her moral courage in standing up to totalitarianism.

**The Atlas Society is out there persuading young people to choose to change course.** To choose to reject the “discrimination society” in which bureaucratic elites and corporate cronies discriminate against citizens who refuse to submit to a never-ending new parade of mandates, restrictions, and codes in all walks of life.

That’s why I support The Atlas Society in their work to provide a clear, objective alternative to the harmful woke ideology that has swept the country I love.

Like The Atlas Society, I am a staunch advocate for individual liberty. I always have been.

I believe the individual must have the freedom to think, choose, and act according to his or her conscience.

It’s up to you, me, and organizations such as The Atlas Society to protect the freedoms of the rising generation by teaching them the principles of liberty that are no longer taught in schools.

[_**Donate today to make your investment in freedom. Together, we can help The Atlas Society instill a passion for reason, individual agency, and liberty in the next generation. Click below to rush your contribution and help The Atlas Society reach their goal of $25,000 toward their next groundbreaking AI production! >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zutdc3543srdn9vf6act7co78d3uc3mr2a91f1g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziricfta4vuar2ckktaausm1a3mh8ncsoerpodjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zulg1v85v47mplrt7vj578jdjr2eqkksi064m470_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j5vrhapmk9bh83mbt45sp1eakivup4in2u89i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zocs5sodc1dcj0v4q3ihrueptrhs0m1pb04ov418_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqmdpj2u64hmgsaj8vhtqscuscokbp97a4eu48go_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjfrqtdpagq4qr8akq7tperaqnaf5b55cluompo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrb77uapr43nm597716sveqhmhhjn7o3c10osiho_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
Thank you,

Dr. Naomi Wolf

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---
| |
---
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2hpj3tqhk6a1s1v6jimooib6775ih05q1lq820_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cp74c9g69oh1k8gn48n24hjmcpr5cphm2oj1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfeofsbver9ag0u0caab0tflovq3lu2ubi8u80k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zifdbaj74ca2q7tcuh8np3rd7kao6bvfgitodoo0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6ctimcor1c9gm49fg)
