name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv37e24l7b818rnscc6el18b5kuudc9tb2os3tno_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1lsg77vckuuua5gvrgs4oqukvh6iutctrni2ufo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmjeu9mg6ec339pd40hps2fiudrl1qd5l8gtt4q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7mi8lnkfb3pb5oc3fln7cfjr51bi0egos8qhp9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zirlp2r7u3c8o26joegpfsbdqnfoink3ga2rb60o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z98h3kp4vq6cpllsaki8pi41cbdvp7s912kev5sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdhqlu0h3grlrq5v4q0ucfv20r5vef5imq3uedo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z12ro1n9m4hgb91nt3mokci99jeflji1mv5v2b80_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztdp4odhdjbrlihjpdovaukhjfb67dlkg9td34dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2gnd0ald33h0m7b8mcrkme0e8fp9s6poobpoej8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1771tmor7pltf0kgu51439escsb71humer0qda8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq4t9k66q3bd9ieir38ctieko7fcjheiprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cp74c9g61oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zkq36gmpstt7ug8hhbnd45c52n6m49bv192i7qfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmubh9ck74q0i2d4vimj0puucgg13hq34oc6o4g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clj66ob2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td29f0e41-0565-4e3c-bd02-576441bf347e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| ** POST-INAUGURATION APPROVAL POLL ** Do you approve of Donald Trump as our new President? [[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdfce694e-25ac-4496-9349-50abf849da0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[YES](https://default.salsalabs.org/T171cf528-aa27-4d78-97c9-317a85549208/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)****[→](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9e4b870-9845-4a58-8375-49475fd6f4d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39c1805c-30f0-4c7c-8bdf-fbac540e26f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c5f1a3e-bb52-4e1c-b75f-2cffd2914595/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ NO ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c961033-307a-4c5a-a15a-6e0828d7b4db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[→](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te039ec25-8f5d-40ee-8ad5-89028b98a1f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01fa5304-c471-4470-af67-a27694bbc9a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| We just watched Trump return to the White House and we're dreading the return of the circus to Capitol Hill. We need to hear from 37 Democrats from Newington about their thoughts on Trump. Your input will be key to our strategy for 2025. **Do you approve of Donald Trump as our new President?** [[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95e4eed5-f49e-4e38-b80e-90303166946e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[YES](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb965f84a-59bb-4182-bf4d-67125bb271be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)****[→](https://default.salsalabs.org/T999a848e-5f05-4af1-ace1-c29c82fb6ca6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**[]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f84bed3-0971-4324-95d2-760d0961d2dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6334d5c5-780b-4e71-a33a-989481b77d7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ NO ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc63fb248-5041-4a26-baaf-1af626dafcc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[→](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b9ce005-f3e9-4668-b39c-0bc925b8e8c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te279cf3d-6fdf-4a34-aebc-433858e237e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you for letting us know! | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebcc222a-d808-4b71-95d8-d4f512ac7b62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Look at what we accomplished in 2025 – thanks to YOU!

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/2024-accomplishments-1?utm_source=cc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20251017_ORGOP_Accomplishments1&utm_id=pc)
---
| | Friend, In 2024, the Oregon GOP made significant strides to strengthen our movement and lay the groundwork for a brighter future – **and it’s all thanks to supporters like YOU.** Together we are growing our movement, empowering Republican candidates, and showing Oregon what real leadership looks like. Every door we knocked on, every training we hosted, and every voter we registered brought us closer to making a meaningful impact across our state. **Here are some of the highlights from our efforts last year:** • Conducted **3 in-person candidate trainings for 40 potential candidates** , with more on the way in 2025 (be on the lookout for more information). • Reached out to **all filed Republican candidates** in the state, offering them tools to succeed. • Provided data support for **36 Republican candidates** during the primary and general elections. • Helped register **22,234 new Republicans** – __more than 1.5 times what Oregon Democrats registered!__ Every step we took was a testament to the hard work and dedication of our volunteers, supporters, and grassroots leaders like YOU. As we look to 2025, we’re committed to building on these accomplishments and continuing the fight for Oregon’s future. [**_Will you help us keep the momentum going? >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/9-KdCVjzpEJN/dFlMUTIybXV6M0Y2TWpMNElzdEh6eFVHQ1VEMTdEV1ZlM0pPeWlZc0RKYjJuY09ZQVNPTnVpWjh2Wll1OHBTMjVkTVRWcUx1M0FubVNYejNlWC90SDlUWlRzSVlVMUVsWjE2cE1LSGhhZnc9S0/)

name: Dr. Naomi Wolf
subject: A Journey Across Divisions
body:
But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvajimf5gqcqedna0a5ed0fag6icra0p3ckbvh20_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs) Friend,

By this point, I’m used to criticism from some of my former colleagues along the lines of “What Happened to Naomi Wolf?” They’ve called me a “conspiracy theorist,” a “covid denier,” and a traitor.

**But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.** From my first book, _The Beauty Myth_ , in 1991 to ten other international bestsellers, including _Give Me Liberty_ , _Facing the Beast_ , and the co-editorship of _The Pfizer Papers, _my focus has been consistent: on basic human rights, freedom, and individual liberties.

What _has_ changed is that by pursuing these values, and speaking out for individual autonomy — _particularly during the lockdowns and vaccine mandates _— I’ve come up against forces bent on silencing dissent, enforcing conformity, advancing government narratives, and abolishing personal privacy.

**At no time in history has there been more danger to the individual.**

The merger of a collectivist corporatocracy with centralized governments around the world has created an Orwellian mess. It threatens free speech, free exercise of religion, freedom of movement, and personal privacy.

Not only presidents but also an army of unelected bureaucrats, have cracked down as never before in our lifetimes, by:
* Implementing mask and vaccine "mandates"
* Preventing the free exercise of religion
* Allowing favored groups to protest, while silencing opposing voices
* Demolishing small businesses
* Gathering and weaponizing Big Data
* Censoring free speech in the physical and digital public squares

I’m proud to work with some of the bravest advocates for freedom at Daily Clout. In the recent past, my team of volunteer researchers doggedly pursued and reported the truth about Pfizer’s cover-up of a flawed safety study, and documented side effects of their mRNA COVID-19 vaccines, as exposed in _The Pfizer Papers: Pfizer’s Crimes Against Humanity_.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh06bcjbkq0bh2sadn45guljs5o8o0k9vmp1rrb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs) But speaking up isn’t without risk...

In speaking out against these threats, though I’ve been vilified by some former allies... _I’ve found some unlikely new ones_.

Among the latter is The Atlas Society, the leading nonprofit engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual liberty. Unlike other groups, The Atlas Society took an uncompromising stand against lockdowns and mandates — and rejected government bailouts.

The Atlas Society elevated my voice, even as I was censored and shadowbanned.

And I want to return the favor.

**I’m partnering with The Atlas Society to raise $25,000 in the next month to distribute 10,000 copies of their Pocket Guide to Free Speech on campus and at student conferences.**

[_**Donate today to help The Atlas Society reach the rising generation with the principles of liberty! Your contribution of $10, $35, $50, or more, helps them create innovative methods of shaping young hearts and minds to fight for liberty. Click to donate now. >>**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh85kc8mpg8m8tv5ukogp36qvcdn16vrhpgmic4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4h7fr7fafovolp42c40tv1hdk91h6mcqem1qskg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)
I’m a big believer in the power of coalitions. From my days as a political consultant to my co-founding of DailyClout.io, I’ve worked to find common cause with others who care passionately about liberty’s priorities, even when we don’t agree 100% on policy issues. For me — and The Atlas Society — our shared priority is engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual autonomy.

>From their animated Draw My Life videos on topics such as Free Speech, Cancel Culture, and *Disinformation,* to their Pocket Guide to Free Speech and their graphic novel of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ , The Atlas Society is advancing creative means to advocate for our most precious individual liberties.

They design their content and programming specifically for the 15–20-year-old demographic — a generation currently besieged by "woke," authoritarian indoctrination. It is vitally important that we support counter-messaging to this key demographic if we’re going to save the republic.

[_**Support the rising generation with the principles of liberty by donating $10, $35, $50, or more, to the Atlas Society. Click to donate now. >>**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3l63oq6ku0nvcjktaekvdkvhqs1ldan8v8p31o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

I’m grateful to The Atlas Society for doing this work — but I’m also grateful to them for reintroducing me to Ayn Rand. As a philosophy and literature scholar, I was, of course, aware of Rand’s oeuvre, but it wasn’t until recently that I began to appreciate the magnitude of her moral courage in standing up to totalitarianism.

**The Atlas Society is out there persuading young people to choose to change course.** To choose to reject the “discrimination society” in which bureaucratic elites and corporate cronies discriminate against citizens who refuse to submit to a never-ending new parade of mandates, restrictions, and codes in all walks of life.

That’s why I support The Atlas Society in their work to provide a clear, objective alternative to the harmful woke ideology that has swept the country I love.

Like The Atlas Society, I am a staunch advocate for individual liberty. I always have been.

I believe the individual must have the freedom to think, choose, and act according to his or her conscience.

It’s up to you, me, and organizations such as The Atlas Society to protect the freedoms of the rising generation by teaching them the principles of liberty that are no longer taught in schools.

[_**Donate today to make your investment in freedom. Together, we can help The Atlas Society instill a passion for reason, individual agency, and liberty in the next generation. Click below to rush your contribution and help The Atlas Society reach their goal of $25,000 toward their next groundbreaking AI production! >>**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4vijf57oqtou07h9c904ng3dqlj0gv4jmpcbt40_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zllubtfvka9t6rvd3jue6h0s6l58hkfn6tlvnil8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1mengmb1cark0j3lq7bhcksh2dvpgqatqqejbt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaskj16bscspvhrg7u3ghms0fq0kjqrv43fslkto_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zphf8io34qkm9gkqge6v34q938rlir1ack1coph8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd6punsi74cp340r9ejvkm5072f594sckv5pbngg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv8s78vmt41ht2sdeu5je4gqk5geor3t86m2jr4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4q7v674jsmahvdm5p49uvh59sn1ip4vgi6sqcsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)
Thank you,

Dr. Naomi Wolf

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---
| |
---
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqsiinnq0cmia347nm6e8fc8vnmsa3tsp354dk28_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj69p32c9h648d245p25oh4ctj6epb1c1g64p324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmb8fmvla612uku7rask5ggnilvr6j79gkp0mjp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o32chh2bs)_

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37ncclbc2ppc5cac7hqhi0i289kr8ceuu78b3s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4v5i30q3t304puhsjhug8408esqumpt72butb30_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovhv8gtic88s5ruj0mr7ei5dq3b9g9r33l235u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zglfpq2mijv6r1vc6b91mdlffsdm15e6bcnht5ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs4b4ada2fqcaicfa49ni0v8fml0s5bqokoaroro_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h2bs)

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg29k73dsip0goip90sk43himhubcb8mhjq6bj90_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cji64p34s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssms59nte2jnvpf5dsece2cbrb4g09kdc6sqgjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2c0cevah17dm63hce123a5rd164f7af0vgfv28_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clgm0o34c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: This is the NARROWEST MAJORITY in 100 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t play around

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._tJTeXDWvyvNMvPMA)
---
| | Peter, we have the narrowest majority _**in nearly 100 YEARS.**_ And to make matters worse, the Democrats are wasting no time building their war chest to flip it.

Here’s what you need to know: ➔ GOP control could shrink to just 215 seats with upcoming vacancies.➔ Not a single defection can be afforded to pass President Trump’s bold America First agenda.➔ The Democrats are ready to exploit every crack in our defense to block Trump’s policies and derail the conservative movement.

We can’t let them win.

Democrats are already pouring millions into their efforts to undo everything we’ve fought for. If we don’t act NOW, we risk losing our ability to deliver the bold, conservative agenda voters demanded in November.

If we’re going to put up a fight, we need to get ahead of the Democrats on fundraising starting RIGHT NOW.**[**If you can, please consider chipping in to defend our slim majority. Every dollar counts in a fight as critical as this.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-d6EoJKJw)**
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning._BW9uWxBvm8qUyg0TRThA)
---
[ DEFEND THE MAJORITY](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-5RZcWQOQ)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Congressman Troy Downing
---

## [Pres. Trump Signs Executive Order Withdrawing the U.S. from World Health Organization ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/CXUpFYZFP0uGsNsmyBqW0Q~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpc1H4P0R3aHR0cHM6Ly9hbWdyZWF0bmVzcy5jb20vMjAyNS8wMS8yMS9wcmVzLXRydW1wLXNpZ25zLWV4ZWN1dGl2ZS1vcmRlci13aXRoZHJhd2luZy10aGUtdS1zLWZyb20td29ybGQtaGVhbHRoLW9yZ2FuaXphdGlvbi9XA3NwY0IKZ475zJBn7-R2oVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Trump has also been vocal about the WHO failing to maintain its independence from “inappropriate political influence of WHO member states” and the U.S. having to pay “unfairly onerous payments” that are disproportionate to its population.
[Read more >](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/CXUpFYZFP0uGsNsmyBqW0Q~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpc1H4P0R3aHR0cHM6Ly9hbWdyZWF0bmVzcy5jb20vMjAyNS8wMS8yMS9wcmVzLXRydW1wLXNpZ25zLWV4ZWN1dGl2ZS1vcmRlci13aXRoZHJhd2luZy10aGUtdS1zLWZyb20td29ybGQtaGVhbHRoLW9yZ2FuaXphdGlvbi9XA3NwY0IKZ475zJBn7-R2oVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

## [J.D. FOSTER: It’s Time To Stop Doling Out Taxpayer Cash To High-Tax States](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_SuWUPPu-fx3bV8gDEuDJA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpc1H4P0RYaHR0cHM6Ly9panIuY29tL2otZC1mb3N0ZXItaXRzLXRpbWUtdG8tc3RvcC1kb2xpbmctb3V0LXRheHBheWVyLWNhc2gtdG8taGlnaC10YXgtc3RhdGVzL1cDc3BjQgpnjvnMkGfv5HahUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Before the Trump tax cuts, about 30% of taxpayers itemized, and typically the deduction for SALT drove much of the decision. The Trump tax cuts nearly doubled the standard deduction while capping the SALT deduction at $10,000. According to the [Tax Policy Center](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/fja3iZdtk8bCDWw5w9x-Jg~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpc1H4P0RaaHR0cHM6Ly90YXhwb2xpY3ljZW50ZXIub3JnL2JyaWVmaW5nLWJvb2svd2hhdC1hcmUtaXRlbWl6ZWQtZGVkdWN0aW9ucy1hbmQtd2hvLWNsYWltcy10aGVtVwNzcGNCCmeO-cyQZ-_kdqFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA), now only about 9% of filers itemize.
[Read more >](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_SuWUPPu-fx3bV8gDEuDJA~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpc1H4P0RYaHR0cHM6Ly9panIuY29tL2otZC1mb3N0ZXItaXRzLXRpbWUtdG8tc3RvcC1kb2xpbmctb3V0LXRheHBheWVyLWNhc2gtdG8taGlnaC10YXgtc3RhdGVzL1cDc3BjQgpnjvnMkGfv5HahUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

name: Dr. Naomi Wolf
subject: A Journey Across Divisions
body:
But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Friend,

By this point, I’m used to criticism from some of my former colleagues along the lines of “What Happened to Naomi Wolf?” They’ve called me a “conspiracy theorist,” a “covid denier,” and a traitor.

**But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.** From my first book, _The Beauty Myth_ , in 1991 to ten other international bestsellers, including _Give Me Liberty_ , _Facing the Beast_ , and the co-editorship of _The Pfizer Papers, _my focus has been consistent: on basic human rights, freedom, and individual liberties.

What _has_ changed is that by pursuing these values, and speaking out for individual autonomy — _particularly during the lockdowns and vaccine mandates _— I’ve come up against forces bent on silencing dissent, enforcing conformity, advancing government narratives, and abolishing personal privacy.

**At no time in history has there been more danger to the individual.**

The merger of a collectivist corporatocracy with centralized governments around the world has created an Orwellian mess. It threatens free speech, free exercise of religion, freedom of movement, and personal privacy.

Not only presidents but also an army of unelected bureaucrats, have cracked down as never before in our lifetimes, by:
* Implementing mask and vaccine "mandates"
* Preventing the free exercise of religion
* Allowing favored groups to protest, while silencing opposing voices
* Demolishing small businesses
* Gathering and weaponizing Big Data
* Censoring free speech in the physical and digital public squares

I’m proud to work with some of the bravest advocates for freedom at Daily Clout. In the recent past, my team of volunteer researchers doggedly pursued and reported the truth about Pfizer’s cover-up of a flawed safety study, and documented side effects of their mRNA COVID-19 vaccines, as exposed in _The Pfizer Papers: Pfizer’s Crimes Against Humanity_.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) But speaking up isn’t without risk...

In speaking out against these threats, though I’ve been vilified by some former allies... _I’ve found some unlikely new ones_.

Among the latter is The Atlas Society, the leading nonprofit engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual liberty. Unlike other groups, The Atlas Society took an uncompromising stand against lockdowns and mandates — and rejected government bailouts.

The Atlas Society elevated my voice, even as I was censored and shadowbanned.

And I want to return the favor.

**I’m partnering with The Atlas Society to raise $25,000 in the next month to distribute 10,000 copies of their Pocket Guide to Free Speech on campus and at student conferences.**

[_**Donate today to help The Atlas Society reach the rising generation with the principles of liberty! Your contribution of $10, $35, $50, or more, helps them create innovative methods of shaping young hearts and minds to fight for liberty. Click to donate now. >>**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
[Donate](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
I’m a big believer in the power of coalitions. From my days as a political consultant to my co-founding of DailyClout.io, I’ve worked to find common cause with others who care passionately about liberty’s priorities, even when we don’t agree 100% on policy issues. For me — and The Atlas Society — our shared priority is engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual autonomy.

From their animated Draw My Life videos on topics such as Free Speech, Cancel Culture, and *Disinformation,* to their Pocket Guide to Free Speech and their graphic novel of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ , The Atlas Society is advancing creative means to advocate for our most precious individual liberties.

They design their content and programming specifically for the 15–20-year-old demographic — a generation currently besieged by "woke," authoritarian indoctrination. It is vitally important that we support counter-messaging to this key demographic if we’re going to save the republic.

[_**Support the rising generation with the principles of liberty by donating $10, $35, $50, or more, to the Atlas Society. Click to donate now. >>**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I’m grateful to The Atlas Society for doing this work — but I’m also grateful to them for reintroducing me to Ayn Rand. As a philosophy and literature scholar, I was, of course, aware of Rand’s oeuvre, but it wasn’t until recently that I began to appreciate the magnitude of her moral courage in standing up to totalitarianism.

**The Atlas Society is out there persuading young people to choose to change course.** To choose to reject the “discrimination society” in which bureaucratic elites and corporate cronies discriminate against citizens who refuse to submit to a never-ending new parade of mandates, restrictions, and codes in all walks of life.

That’s why I support The Atlas Society in their work to provide a clear, objective alternative to the harmful woke ideology that has swept the country I love.

Like The Atlas Society, I am a staunch advocate for individual liberty. I always have been.

I believe the individual must have the freedom to think, choose, and act according to his or her conscience.

It’s up to you, me, and organizations such as The Atlas Society to protect the freedoms of the rising generation by teaching them the principles of liberty that are no longer taught in schools.

[_**Donate today to make your investment in freedom. Together, we can help The Atlas Society instill a passion for reason, individual agency, and liberty in the next generation. Click below to rush your contribution and help The Atlas Society reach their goal of $25,000 toward their next groundbreaking AI production! >>**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
[Donate $10](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jPSA0UPrMWP1uitH0fttKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9MTBXA3NwY0IKZ44YzpBn7OdLJVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $35](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TeN2pE--A9q5jOYsH3bmLw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9MzVXA3NwY0IKZ44YzpBn7OdLJVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $50](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8a52mBIuBrS87PSgzqr5Aw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9NTBXA3NwY0IKZ44YzpBn7OdLJVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $100](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Jl-g2g-EFp2rA7-w4qgvsA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9MTAwVwNzcGNCCmeOGM6QZ-znSyVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate $250](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7pA37KpgkPsOeXgoCZPPKg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9MjUwVwNzcGNCCmeOGM6QZ-znSyVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate $500](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DP655Qczv9k_qkvhCvTSbw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9NTAwVwNzcGNCCmeOGM6QZ-znSyVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aVkf7NM48Ue0u8mrMfozbQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpc2YSP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTIyJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnjhjOkGfs50slUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Thank you,

Dr. Naomi Wolf

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---
| |

---

Restore Our Nation
---

It is vitally important that we support counter-messaging to this key demographic if we’re going to save the republic. ~~ I’m grateful to The Atlas Society for doing this work — but I’m also grateful to them for reintroducing me to Ayn Rand. As a philosophy and literature scholar, I was, of course, aware of Rand’s oeuvre, but it wasn’t until recently that I began to appreciate the magnitude of her moral courage in standing up to totalitarianism. The Atlas Society is out there persuading young people to choose to change course. To choose to reject the “discrimination society” in which bureaucratic elites and corporate cronies discriminate against citizens who refuse to submit to a never-ending new parade of mandates, restrictions, and codes in all walks of life. That’s why I support The Atlas Society in their work to provide a clear, objective alternative to the harmful woke ideology that has swept the country I love. Like The Atlas Society, I am a staunch advocate for individual liberty. I always have been. I believe the individual must have the freedom to think, choose, and act according to his or her conscience. It’s up to you, me, and organizations such as The Atlas Society to protect the freedoms of the rising generation by teaching them the principles of liberty that are no longer taught in schools. ~~ ~ ~ ~ ~~ Thank you, Dr. Naomi Wolf The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

body:
This special election could tip the balance of power in Congress.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vcgN4UmXID-uymTxD8r-UDFHPWOhfSIk2aiMESW73ZZwMtG3UjEOt3mFya3xsvvKqQrquKQ3upcT24CDKTCaBSc79s_YeE_Vr83LuHEKL9LrQETFFgzpCwBXW8PlgvjLE0Q6RkyO3vzlog-Mcrvmq1RSN0Ie4a-J4mfqXc8sH5KoDuHrnCTmam-b6HK0HL0Bf7BJJ33tvVcX8rE3_z_NjC58w0Pqqo7J&c=vZgzl8FfXD4YcR-ZfH7v5Nd15ji7IPe0Q5k1u4y_rwACQWTjyez8IA==&ch=KWRaTVn-vUfX9AdCYXuAA2tyrMAwqJKktC39iaMA4wrw_Q0hDMbOIw==)

| | | | Team,
One of Donald Trump's very first acts after being inaugurated as President of the United States was to give a full pardon to roughly 1,500 convicted felons who were involved in the violent, destructive, and deadly January 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol.
Trump's unprecedented pardon for violent felons and domestic terrorists explicitly encourages even more political violence. It is a direct attack on the rule of law and our right to live in a peaceful society free from the threat of violence. And it is yet another step toward realizing Trump's authoritarian vision for America.
But we can do something about it. We can fight back right now. This special election will be a golden opportunity--right during Trump's first 100 days--to rally the nation against Trump's unpopular and un-American abuses of power.
---
| | | | [In April, Josh Weil will be going up against Donald Trump's handpicked crony, Randy Fine, in an election that could tip the balance of power in Congress. Can you contribute $5, $25, or more to fight back and stop Trump's attack on our democracy?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vcgN4UmXID-uymTxD8r-UDFHPWOhfSIk2aiMESW73ZZwMtG3UjEOt3mFya3xsvvKBbHN7YA_Y_BHkKjDtpwVb5dtIeTXf29gxD1O1-uJ9u8NdvYiEi0mr43yieQWfrG6ekiaAt3jVoxFbA74R3kNVIPEi9E-8ehg642ZcTA0C_jj1hK8FyDZJoROimeSeLdKe8T_cuBwLUDHeMrUMRP8sXBAvXd-9apB6dhXm4ogut0=&c=vZgzl8FfXD4YcR-ZfH7v5Nd15ji7IPe0Q5k1u4y_rwACQWTjyez8IA==&ch=KWRaTVn-vUfX9AdCYXuAA2tyrMAwqJKktC39iaMA4wrw_Q0hDMbOIw==)

[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0nHpxMEWb6D13IhSIXu23QcsCYYvnN7GhJWnd_MzcNA14P97S8pS3sQpSCbsdOZ0OEnr06Nnvgy8hdY6OaKSKMQJahbLR8PRbhSar5-IKAcltSuAK4_QxMNKMBiDjIfu9ugzjgXCMRSkYg3sf-AHEEo%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0kwQudCZguoMGRHRqvo6HfSNV6RWivorQQ0a1kD3hcRYyAfqIT0w4xNeMGucRfTBGJ_3ukUHoFzQMnkMRsJ-_atBY_39MEmyxz1kI921M_3qW3SvKLvzKL0z8p5mPvPDRvmmaxcy7soSOO1uPv6tzoA%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0neoXmgB8cxQNx6K8NHUv3ZC6W3Qah-iIUeh7axWkIY5H3rFCSuKXdVwbE-YRGMPF-lQJj2FrjxcQ_HeK5iVmjWGpETelUYanqldr3vdJ1AACIeg8ftdOQ1ZmE5GlTSru60C9gJED6-j-4w9--OnL8A%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0jfJnrk_dln4UqdkbsZcW8fO9GuDfzuy3LOYk5-J_dzONS4UyQKJ3neCwmG4hdnzWWLa9i1ZUq5vc4bBdN3zRoyh87DipxhjrNLhvQYW12PcWooox-ghBRmPaJLQEUdt54IC0irQLEkItzsySGbLDHQ%3D)
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0hX4hpfQl4GDfWALHrbHH8522Z-YWcPRXFoJdhrNgjdDhZtxnVET35PPQ8ZhYbszbFbcuLnxeKmnVPjQV_BvWCpODiCN3gF8NMVvpKw-xtCoGG39JYunBDeY5CC65hTMfE1o73hoRJWGza-bPRaB2oE%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0lnCA7yJ7nQIho9GXpHsZ-Z95HpvlkD1cWJpLZzwfxbaRoeUz02RbQpCoTxVsaZMnzo-PqQ5jE4-lhMT2GALE_oL6VIg0jZhh9asKpY3OfV3RAiHUdvBIlU8TAp6TGusERY_bjhXKYoocBTR5Hn-bys%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0s6pD-1SlJmYtl0aio3SzEPBf7alxtBvJDBml7DZeGTbY3l5qjqRL68nOGX0NrmtV4XD2SROBHNUoYuz01nOKOkifdlAptC-Jy6fKo4UzmLw9WUcw11aExhZHvUZk_0luKXEzmFKosPIKZHSmxPVcEM%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73291f1e828b4bae9703465bc5c480c2&_e=YkUiMJkmf_W5j2JNwe3g_iwpOlbm5-AFDq0EQsCZwQPVDlay7WoV8KGrjI2s-Wll-vnMLdJDeDBHGW675HrBlpas0Z2KYicLafvbf-exLTfHQiBenjSpP_4rBLon0FRfCyuxuWaW56nHNCBntuYYI0mvCy8GWmwiJP8gHQlsPa3-E4-MdWiX312pHkibwHPh90CtbmPnFxFDCutjCTghmZL6dskupKukLuaEDTZDBbLrR7YVBun17kqNTAgWZEI2HM1GEH7ykeKbaVff7T-F6GnWkkw6C8KnUEpNOaB56n5Iu8WWXHhD1tZeWIlkOa1hrL-tqEwy6M5KGyvKP7BC0tCeGFXzXebuHArbCTzC9Kchns8bCvawHyjLv1x79Ke0Z79F4UoGqWCR4X6paExm8o5ht7NopykdAIUxVsu-C_Xt8wMtW2vwugh8ajeKXPTOeHgEiJ6e-8IG4wpm96_NCJqCI6kiW9S58sWujuWaWtw%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! After their crushing defeat in November, they’ve launched their _2026 Recruitment Fund with one mission: flip the House and force their radical agenda on America. They’ve already started recruiting candidates and are preparing to flood key districts with their lies and far-left propaganda. They’ll stop at nothing to stand to thwart the America First agenda. Friend, make no mistake – this isn’t just politics. This is a full-on war for the future of our nation. If we don’t step up NOW, they’ll outspend, outmaneuver, and overpower us. We cannot let that happen. The stakes are too high, and the consequences are too severe. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We need every patriot to stand up and fight back. name: Dr. Naomi Wolf
subject: A Journey Across Divisions
body:
But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=889b8b64bf0d4ca387c3b6041da64d3f&_e=L_cgAF4S13vLLrk860BaVzizMplOEdZ_PzoY81WLmd2FrOoQYFniIUjYnZ_2_tzuTEFAmoW7aTV3_lSaTsBfXie1Ow-Exc3MyICsVLxq8uuVr-gWnHbxnOaAASie4R3a_snneNdsoyYPa76C95EoMGj_6a2eNCByUZi6p_1e4R4Ks_fXtNzuAV91-mZSwtznOtKUrh6_bw4xeLe6zr2BYz7BgxZfkmVMWY1zNHOUiN0rNC6gktS6cy7mEVgc1B2RbrqrgTiTlhXWYfky3Auli1khtS6OiNxf1XcSSMrkcNg%3D) Friend,

By this point, I’m used to criticism from some of my former colleagues along the lines of “What Happened to Naomi Wolf?” They’ve called me a “conspiracy theorist,” a “covid denier,” and a traitor.

**But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me.** From my first book, _The Beauty Myth_ , in 1991 to ten other international bestsellers, including _Give Me Liberty_ , _Facing the Beast_ , and the co-editorship of _The Pfizer Papers, _my focus has been consistent: on basic human rights, freedom, and individual liberties.

What _has_ changed is that by pursuing these values, and speaking out for individual autonomy — _particularly during the lockdowns and vaccine mandates _— I’ve come up against forces bent on silencing dissent, enforcing conformity, advancing government narratives, and abolishing personal privacy.

**At no time in history has there been more danger to the individual.**

The merger of a collectivist corporatocracy with centralized governments around the world has created an Orwellian mess. It threatens free speech, free exercise of religion, freedom of movement, and personal privacy.

Not only presidents but also an army of unelected bureaucrats, have cracked down as never before in our lifetimes, by:
* Implementing mask and vaccine "mandates"
* Preventing the free exercise of religion
* Allowing favored groups to protest, while silencing opposing voices
* Demolishing small businesses
* Gathering and weaponizing Big Data
* Censoring free speech in the physical and digital public squares

I’m proud to work with some of the bravest advocates for freedom at Daily Clout. In the recent past, my team of volunteer researchers doggedly pursued and reported the truth about Pfizer’s cover-up of a flawed safety study, and documented side effects of their mRNA COVID-19 vaccines, as exposed in _The Pfizer Papers: Pfizer’s Crimes Against Humanity_.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=889b8b64bf0d4ca387c3b6041da64d3f&_e=L_cgAF4S13vLLrk860BaVzizMplOEdZ_PzoY81WLmd2FrOoQYFniIUjYnZ_2_tzuTEFAmoW7aTV3_lSaTsBfXie1Ow-Exc3MyICsVLxq8uuVr-gWnHbxnOaAASie4R3a_snneNdsoyYPa76C95EoMKZTI2y6jdYWdkl0dub2actIOjAOYe8FdyQBU8zqpXL49qKdGQHYXlaECKv8TZ-X-NyaUpbegHHKIgezUxV22lbCKyf7gKzZLZesAcjXXh3rWmsFsZWd-kAOXUD1eQNOSx06ONqR12acxiOcL3tb558%3D) But speaking up isn’t without risk...

In speaking out against these threats, though I’ve been vilified by some former allies... _I’ve found some unlikely new ones_.

Among the latter is The Atlas Society, the leading nonprofit engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual liberty. Unlike other groups, The Atlas Society took an uncompromising stand against lockdowns and mandates — and rejected government bailouts.

The Atlas Society elevated my voice, even as I was censored and shadowbanned.

And I want to return the favor.

**I’m partnering with The Atlas Society to raise $25,000 in the next month to distribute 10,000 copies of their Pocket Guide to Free Speech on campus and at student conferences.**

[_**Donate today to help The Atlas Society reach the rising generation with the principles of liberty! Your contribution of $10, $35, $50, or more, helps them create innovative methods of shaping young hearts and minds to fight for liberty. Click to donate now. >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=889b8b64bf0d4ca387c3b6041da64d3f&_e=L_cgAF4S13vLLrk860BaVzizMplOEdZ_PzoY81WLmd2FrOoQYFniIUjYnZ_2_tzuTEFAmoW7aTV3_lSaTsBfXie1Ow-Exc3MyICsVLxq8uuVr-gWnHbxnOaAASie4R3a_snneNdsoyYPa76C95EoMIseoTM0hqwCR-TNr2dF_Rk9hupTrEdGBsEIQeTrJMyEBTOvzO_bfS39MHDkjouK9HqXRqnS63Mp1QMrS_UaDoiIWPjVHrXYmY7ECTl9WpzBI0_rK378sVFAx2kY07iDT0kYFN1JP8hF_i-apLEu0NM%3D)
[Donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=889b8b64bf0d4ca387c3b6041da64d3f&_e=L_cgAF4S13vLLrk860BaVzizMplOEdZ_PzoY81WLmd2FrOoQYFniIUjYnZ_2_tzuTEFAmoW7aTV3_lSaTsBfXie1Ow-Exc3MyICsVLxq8uuVr-gWnHbxnOaAASie4R3a_snneNdsoyYPa76C95EoMBDPYPrR1n-9ccfn_N9phEzFAtW7sIoUUO7ispM1v-P8FXGbfRsSvt-cTAPpx77fszCoOGtaw0KBQmirYwG_CxmSkvMJPPyuYx0mOHlH6uAjYirLuLD2NTNuk42YXx3WuqdY7Fl1jdL5EFC-r5PcS0A%3D)
I’m a big believer in the power of coalitions. From my days as a political consultant to my co-founding of DailyClout.io, I’ve worked to find common cause with others who care passionately about liberty’s priorities, even when we don’t agree 100% on policy issues. For me — and The Atlas Society — our shared priority is engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual autonomy.

From their animated Draw My Life videos on topics such as Free Speech, Cancel Culture, and *Disinformation,* to their Pocket Guide to Free Speech and their graphic novel of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ , The Atlas Society is advancing creative means to advocate for our most precious individual liberties.

They design their content and programming specifically for the 15–20-year-old demographic — a generation currently besieged by "woke," authoritarian indoctrination. It is vitally important that we support counter-messaging to this key demographic if we’re going to save the republic.

[_**Support the rising generation with the principles of liberty by donating $10, $35, $50, or more, to the Atlas Society. Click to donate now. >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=889b8b64bf0d4ca387c3b6041da64d3f&_e=L_cgAF4S13vLLrk860BaVzizMplOEdZ_PzoY81WLmd2FrOoQYFniIUjYnZ_2_tzuTEFAmoW7aTV3_lSaTsBfXie1Ow-Exc3MyICsVLxq8uuVr-gWnHbxnOaAASie4R3a_snneNdsoyYPa76C95EoMG1-yZ4Hqh95YpIGB1kwO0pOI8XeY3aGIfUbBMCanTGvVnqnt75F7MQDd_fRIM_Bou0AoxH4k_qiahNPsnCNI7UYUmRIVsKXp6Dhuhe_aoFM6j69w9sbUnqhs98AlkBERE3vQ_t5YxVXr1vgcrYgcAs%3D)

I’m grateful to The Atlas Society for doing this work — but I’m also grateful to them for reintroducing me to Ayn Rand. As a philosophy and literature scholar, I was, of course, aware of Rand’s oeuvre, but it wasn’t until recently that I began to appreciate the magnitude of her moral courage in standing up to totalitarianism.

**The Atlas Society is out there persuading young people to choose to change course.** To choose to reject the “discrimination society” in which bureaucratic elites and corporate cronies discriminate against citizens who refuse to submit to a never-ending new parade of mandates, restrictions, and codes in all walks of life.

That’s why I support The Atlas Society in their work to provide a clear, objective alternative to the harmful woke ideology that has swept the country I love.

Like The Atlas Society, I am a staunch advocate for individual liberty. I always have been.

I believe the individual must have the freedom to think, choose, and act according to his or her conscience.

It’s up to you, me, and organizations such as The Atlas Society to protect the freedoms of the rising generation by teaching them the principles of liberty that are no longer taught in schools.

[_**Donate today to make your investment in freedom. Together, we can help The Atlas Society instill a passion for reason, individual agency, and liberty in the next generation. clean_body: But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me. | | | Friend, By this point, I’m used to criticism from some of my former colleagues along the lines of “What Happened to Naomi Wolf?” They’ve called me a “conspiracy theorist,” a “covid denier,” and a traitor. But the truth is that I haven’t changed. The world has changed around me. From my first book, The Beauty Myth , in 1991 to ten other international bestsellers, including Give Me Liberty , Facing the Beast , and the co-editorship of The Pfizer Papers, my focus has been consistent: on basic human rights, freedom, and individual liberties. What has changed is that by pursuing these values, and speaking out for individual autonomy — particularly during the lockdowns and vaccine mandates — I’ve come up against forces bent on silencing dissent, enforcing conformity, advancing government narratives, and abolishing personal privacy. At no time in history has there been more danger to the individual. The merger of a collectivist corporatocracy with centralized governments around the world has created an Orwellian mess. It threatens free speech, free exercise of religion, freedom of movement, and personal privacy. Not only presidents but also an army of unelected bureaucrats, have cracked down as never before in our lifetimes, by: Implementing mask and vaccine "mandates" Preventing the free exercise of religion Allowing favored groups to protest, while silencing opposing voices Demolishing small businesses Gathering and weaponizing Big Data Censoring free speech in the physical and digital public squares I’m proud to work with some of the bravest advocates for freedom at Daily Clout. In the recent past, my team of volunteer researchers doggedly pursued and reported the truth about Pfizer’s cover-up of a flawed safety study, and documented side effects of their mRNA COVID-19 vaccines, as exposed in The Pfizer Papers: Pfizer’s Crimes Against Humanity. But speaking up isn’t without risk... In speaking out against these threats, though I’ve been vilified by some former allies... I’ve found some unlikely new ones. Among the latter is The Atlas Society, the leading nonprofit engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual liberty. Unlike other groups, The Atlas Society took an uncompromising stand against lockdowns and mandates — and rejected government bailouts. The Atlas Society elevated my voice, even as I was censored and shadowbanned. And I want to return the favor. I’m partnering with The Atlas Society to raise $25,000 in the next month to distribute 10,000 copies of their Pocket Guide to Free Speech on campus and at student conferences. I’m a big believer in the power of coalitions. From my days as a political consultant to my co-founding of DailyClout.io, I’ve worked to find common cause with others who care passionately about liberty’s priorities, even when we don’t agree 100% on policy issues. For me — and The Atlas Society — our shared priority is engaging young people with the principles of free speech and individual autonomy. From their animated Draw My Life videos on topics such as Free Speech, Cancel Culture, and Disinformation, to their Pocket Guide to Free Speech and their graphic novel of Ayn Rand’s ANTHEM , The Atlas Society is advancing creative means to advocate for our most precious individual liberties. They design their content and programming specifically for the 15–20-year-old demographic — a generation currently besieged by "woke," authoritarian indoctrination. It is vitally important that we support counter-messaging to this key demographic if we’re going to save the republic. I’m grateful to The Atlas Society for doing this work — but I’m also grateful to them for reintroducing me to Ayn Rand. As a philosophy and literature scholar, I was, of course, aware of Rand’s oeuvre, but it wasn’t until recently that I began to appreciate the magnitude of her moral courage in standing up to totalitarianism. The Atlas Society is out there persuading young people to choose to change course. To choose to reject the “discrimination society” in which bureaucratic elites and corporate cronies discriminate against citizens who refuse to submit to a never-ending new parade of mandates, restrictions, and codes in all walks of life. That’s why I support The Atlas Society in their work to provide a clear, objective alternative to the harmful woke ideology that has swept the country I love. Like The Atlas Society, I am a staunch advocate for individual liberty. I always have been. I believe the individual must have the freedom to think, choose, and act according to his or her conscience. It’s up to you, me, and organizations such as The Atlas Society to protect the freedoms of the rising generation by teaching them the principles of liberty that are no longer taught in schools. - Thank you, Dr. Naomi Wolf The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Snow, sleet, and ice blanketed a large swath of Texas from Austin and San Antonio to Houston Monday night and Tuesday morning, prompting the National Weather Service to issue its [first-ever blizzard warning](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2uozAQxfGngc7IHj4cChfb0GXbLdGAx2G0xo5sE5I8_VXS3_7op6P_v-t8RfYcbn9xJ1OeLs4goRdSCYDZIvvX3NXWLNKOqiajdKv7ru_7sd6MtT2hHpWWSq5Wa7VcBtLtqtF1DoeuZvPBpAJQqoV2aOzinL2MbUejhvFiq06S5RJTUzYq9MTs_Cs-KDVr3GtvtlLuuWr_VDBVMJ3n2bj4hGGLRy4xfEYVTIHOXMG0eH6_MVlxYgocbuLrCR8PzowBxRqPUJiycJxyEYV3EgvhscdQhMf_JNYNk6dcJ2PvJ3vPedBVJ287sv8-Kr8mehj4CQAA__8k1mzq) for Beaumont. **Good morning!** On this day in 1906, author [Robert Ervin Howard](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tuwyAUgOGngY0IjrmYgaGLt3TtaJGcQ0DCJsIol7ev0r3zL33S_3Nez7HUst--40ZhvFJbQYIRUgmAFWOp71VzDBeJXnEKyk3OaGOM5znMSfsUrXXJerA2KYUmuuusE5KajeElfDCpAJSaYLInvKSEs580eQd-RqYlYRmtn0amQa94pPpuD-qna9t4DXmM-8GmLwYLg-Xa9rh_CoNlZBK1JBJxR4EURxYtid4u1IcgkdszdmSw8B7w_iy1lsM6puVti6X-6ePf3UeA3wAAAP__tXpXTw) was born in Peaster. The creator of Conan the Barbarian, he is one of the best-selling fantasy authors of all time. The National Weather Service issued its first-ever blizzard warning for Beaumont yesterday morning. ## Snow Blankets Houston
Snow, sleet, and ice blanketed a large swath of Texas from Austin and San Antonio to Houston Monday night and Tuesday morning, prompting the National Weather Service to issue its [first-ever blizzard warning](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2uozAQxfGngc7IHj4cChfb0GXbLdGAx2G0xo5sE5I8_VXS3_7op6P_v-t8RfYcbn9xJ1OeLs4goRdSCYDZIvvX3NXWLNKOqiajdKv7ru_7sd6MtT2hHpWWSq5Wa7VcBtLtqtF1DoeuZvPBpAJQqoV2aOzinL2MbUejhvFiq06S5RJTUzYq9MTs_Cs-KDVr3GtvtlLuuWr_VDBVMJ3n2bj4hGGLRy4xfEYVTIHOXMG0eH6_MVlxYgocbuLrCR8PzowBxRqPUJiycJxyEYV3EgvhscdQhMf_JNYNk6dcJ2PvJ3vPedBVJ287sv8-Kr8mehj4CQAA__8k1mzq) for Beaumont. That warning expired at noon yesterday. Several thousand customers lost power in the Houston area, and grid operator ERCOT issued an [internal transmission emergency alert](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdEZ4bUMoXFxDl2uvRAavgyWDI3YTwt-fkquvmWo08_R-ruPVp5y227df0fErlhEasLJREmAMPuVzNFVwUxN6VaFTne6ssdb21eJmaFXnNVhzmSacDNhO9Tpg9Da0EGOV3HusUQBKadBtHaYYw6XXBvsO-ksQpsGQuOw1L8j48hTzWZ6413NZq-wW5jsJ_SVgEDAcx1HH8oJ2KQ_isr1LAoYNDxIw4D4XlonogSR59xutiSiVTeKK-w23-ZRUHrz8JXpi-bmsdhfuR8o5UdsJ09xWn_IHgP818nTwGwAA___4nGba) for South and Southeast Texas early Tuesday morning. The grid’s power supply and operating reserves remained stable, however. Local news stations [compiled photos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u3CAUhJ8Gd1j44J91QZGGbtOmtDAcbBTMsQxZdt8-8tVtbzOaYjTfaP48l6cJMaTttzlQlbenBQQMXHQcYHEmxM_SN06tws1dg6qb5DT0wzDMza5W2c_WG2mlgRF6MSDMq8cRnButEFMT1F0mOoCukyDH1q3eu8cse5wnmB-O9QJdKHS1ZceCb5N9_NALr9bS0US1l3JmJn8x0Ax0rbW1Mdi_sNO_XCjdKQY6Yc0MdCRrIgN9Mxlo0d3-lnOnQpnnRJWvuIWUQtp4IW7pQO6oJh4SP81VMifPy478G8DNhYaBbi7lzhpiDHmcWC-2w4T4tbH8eNpLwf8AAAD__xbUbxY) ## More Buoys Installed in Rio Grande
Shortly after President Trump’s inauguration on Monday, [crews installed more buoys](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOwyAQRL8GOixYsDEFxTXucu2VFs6CsxI2Eebi5O9PSX_dFDPz9H4u8yVQpn39Dlv07ZnKDBJ6IZUAmDFQfs2Go18kOsWjV1bb3vR97_jNuyjtEiwOaTTG6mTdkIIepLmOo0SjOfn3mVQASmnQQ4dLSjg6baKz4EZkRkakVmrXbrHFZzhSfpVHrN21bDz7W2v3g-kvBhOD6TzPLpWn2eN5vAsMpndkMH2mYikVYxXLb3mJSkWsNewYBW0brTU0KjuvHu8n5UzHYJmR6xYof1jtX_mHh78AAAD__wIWXY8) in the Rio Grande to deter migrants from trying to cross the border illegally into Texas. The floating barriers had been a point of contention between state officials and the Biden administration since they were first installed in 2023. Gov. Greg Abbott also [shared a letter](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFv8yAQgOFfA1si7jgMDAxZ_E35pkrtZuEANhKuI_uaOv--Sveu7_BI7_t1uMba6uf0Py458FHWARWak4IT4pBibc-BZAqjSh5kDmC1NWSM8XIOSDkCJSQAdIbQYuqgGFdSyRC7m6zhhSlABNCou3MaS0nOa8reondJkMqp8rqdec6cj7iX9lwfeTvf1kW2MDPfd6EvAnuB_fGqAvt_W54u47gyD28fAvudI3_tAntwDkihJtuB9RYJlNxCun_X1ureWUFqWmJtvzr_ufsI-BMAAP__r7hT9Q) he wrote to President Trump, asking him to “protect Texas and the entire U.S. from the invasion along our southern border.” Trump signed several executive orders on his first day in office aimed at enhancing border security and clamping down on illegal immigration. Meanwhile, users of the CBP One app—introduced by the previous administration to help migrants schedule asylum hearings—received an alert stating that all [pending appointments had been canceled](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAUAL8GO4w-QNaC4hq7vfZKg_JYSRCMvF3cv7_s9ddPZpL5uc93G2JIj2-7o6HL5xk6ULzrOcDsbIjvWTbOLJ0b-wZNr4VWUik1NpuBAbQX0vkVvbWLH3DRAKiUBrHe5NoE85F1PUDfCxBD6xbv3W0UEkcN480x2aELlM-WNiS8bPHxnV94tmvem2g2oqMw8cVgYjDVWlufLxi2_CyU0wdiMCWshcG0LgfPCbk9Dl62J3GXa-J0PveDW7eHFAqdlkJOzWncUUOMoQyaye6x2xD_ivTvgpeB3wAAAP__B-xgtg) after Trump was sworn in. Since that function was rolled out in January 2023, over 900,000 migrants had used the app to schedule hearings and to be admitted to the country.
## Austin Couple Missing Since July
Today marks six months since a UT Austin graduate student and his wife [went missing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGnwR0WDDjEBcVt3OW2W1rjMDijYBwZEif79Ktk6-1_nU86X6fxhJw4z_9xIV-fcR1BQSeVlgBjQE6v0TbBTyr0uiGvnXGd7bquby4eoNcRNUxOm6gtkekUan1w1loKR9ewf48pDaC1AXNowxRjOPbGUu-gPwZhFQWu69bWC1V6YonptT5oa8_r0iR_qfVWhPknYBAw7PvexvXp8F4q53ciYMi0FwFD3DBf5Xz_XjDLM25r4kzyinVC-dvLhUvhPEvO8kM1mw-3nVPicnDCqnlBTh-4_vnEw8NPAAAA___JcWIz) as they were traveling through Mexico on their way to Chile. Known for their adventurous spirit, Frank Guzman and Caroline Katba last made contact with their families on July 22 from Coatzacoalcos, Veracruz, Mexico, a week after embarking on a two-month road trip to Chile. In September, Guzman’s professor told his family that he hadn’t joined his online class, prompting a frantic search for the couple. Without evidence of a crime, assistance from U.S. and Mexican authorities has been limited. In October, UT Austin [closed its investigation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGu4yAQheGnwd1EMGBjChfbuLvbbhlhGCejYIgMjpN9-tW9_dZH-qTz__m6fnlOnG-__UZTe6_lihJ7kAoQr9Fz-lxNF6dFRqc6mpTVtjd937vuPg1qWCzqQNKP0q4D9XG1XktcZFCSVMfTNyYVolIa9XCJy7rG0WlDzqIbozCSIreyX9qdGr19XdOnvGi_hLJ1abq39qxC_xI4C5zP87w8Xgd9jwJnvzcOiQTOmc4qcE4l-CRw_oEEzqEcz0RQG6cEG9fK-QYbvTkU4Pyi2vjmG5cMOz3L3iimD4RUKkVYPnA08EdtnGHdfX7A7fi7-QzB7yVxJnj4tniBMw4Ogu2d7m0EZ4jAmBhhwcHAoPXojKTRrmO3T_F5ckpcByuMvG2e08_R9t_yrwn_BQAA__8NFIcM) into Guzman’s disappearance. A private investigator is now handling the case, and the family is trying to obtain access to phone and bank records. Guzman has been [listed as a missing person](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00MGKwyAYBOCnMbcE_dVYDx4Wltyy9LbHoPU3EUyVKE379kt73-vwMQPzOy-zjSne1x-7o2nPkBegIHvKeoDF25hei-i8cdRr1qFhiisppJS620zQloG2QXmNo5DcOyekQwkjdUhRdtG8yygDYIwDHwfvQvAXzQVqBfriiaDoY8vH0DZs-LQ1pFd-4DHc8t4ls7VWKuFfBCYC03megy91-MBhzQ8Cky2lEpj2ctsITHOsNd7XKx413z_xNzYb05vMume8BwqC90z1bLzO3WF8OWNKsY6KCLruNqbPdPv3i4eBvwAAAP__OP5fdg) by the Texas Department of Public Safety, and a GoFundMe campaign has been set up to assist the family with the search.

clean_body: Snow, sleet, and ice blanketed a large swath of Texas from Austin and San Antonio to Houston Monday night and Tuesday morning, prompting the National Weather Service to issue its for Beaumont. That warning expired at noon yesterday. | | | | | | Wednesday, January 22, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1906, author was born in Peaster. ## Trump Declares Energy Emergency
President Donald Trump [declared a national energy emergency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvhSAUhX-Nbhi4ylMHhi5ur2tHc4Wr0CAYoM_67xvf3u0k5-TLl_P1nJ_ovAvbJ-6kyhpn4CAZFwxgNuj8NXe1USsRUFuTEn3by04OI9RWcT4gdu04dg-jaewX7EUvpZAdPnBYde3UTeMCQIh24G2zcFiFluPCjV562VcdJ-NKTM13dKFYWv0VX5QaHffaK1vKkav2o4Kpguk8z0aHRd9lBdONrmDi4p0rmEr62Q9WIjOkPSZiAYuLAT2jQGm7GO2UNgr6YvR7YDAubMy6zDxt6Fk87nW-AWhMopyZdZtlOuaSG1t2XydljtN57_LjVt92dP6tWv677qXgLwAA__8gAXHm) on Monday, signing an executive order pulling the U.S. out of the Paris climate agreement and erasing several Biden-era fossil fuel restrictions Trump revoked Biden's order [setting targets for electric vehicle sales](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOrCAUxvGnwQ4DRxjGguI2dnPbLQ3IcWQXxcBRM2-_mS222_pLvvzz-3iMDxdT3J7_3YqW5jyCAM2F5ABjcDG9RtUEOyMCdg1aaTqjlb730CxWogGD4PpeKK-CD52ap5tSc3BmumvRRPt-ExJAyu4uutYLmOWkey_C5I02TAkMkXJpP3PcaME5vfKJpZ3y2iS7EO2Vdf8YDAyG67raggdhqe-dweCPGjeslcHgDsqVU3Fb3XMhRzFvDAYqx7rzgmf-wsp9DLjxXAIWTosjXpG4FhxPTq48kTiITvBfAslgaIoN-xVTivX27n2uLqafPvrL67TwHQAA__9wOm0g) and froze money earmarked for EV charging stations. The action also directed federal agency heads to identify emergency authorities to [expedite energy production](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OrCAUx58GOidwANGC4jZ2c9stDcpBzwbBMOxsfPvNTLLl1v_P_D7u891Torz99we6FssMAkwnZAcwB0_pmjUPLiICKo5OWmWNNsMIfHcxRqOtNXYJcQDdW6-CWvUi4-gR-4GTe7UJCSClGoS6LQKiXM24iLAu1limBQZqpd4-C-W2Y0xXeWK9reXgye2tnQ-m_jGYGExtx51SemkMprMkWi8GE2as29VhflIt-cDcGExGjP2o-67Vr-PsAq7JV3x0v94D64b5HefVhfObUqJH__qzHZ7eG7z9xePp4CcAAP__JPdjSQ) and processing. According to Trump, the goal is to make the U.S. a “manufacturing nation once again.” In addition, Trump signed orders reversing bans on coast water drilling and electric vehicle adoption and lifting the freeze on LNG export permits. [Read the full text of the order here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGSrCAQheGnwUwLWhnHgOAmZHPTDa1WGu0thClgxpq333LzfYHznfq_HvMDOXDc_uNBpvo0gwTdStUCzA45fOahccYTAfUNGTX2ox70fYJmN3dQ6LQfpnVUepq89xoWGG49EqDSsmFzrUkFoFR_l323SPBq1dMi3bqMehSDJMc15e47caw7-fBJb8rdmo4mmL3WZxH9PwFWgD3Pszt3rrSnV6FuS28B9pmpsKNYGUOLa-UUiwB7uQKsVALsKwbCsnPcWjwo84qxpUh5-wiwTTbueXIIXG7Xne1ADr98_SvH28BPAAAA__8mCWHu).
## Laken Riley Act Passes Senate
The Senate voted 64-35 on Monday to approve an amended [Laken Riley Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCngQ4LFghxQfE37vK3V1prWMfcYRMZFMtvf3L6q2c0n-brMT4w5bQ9_-NKvs1lBAlWSCUAxogpn6Ph0c9EQJqTV047a-y9B754ayaYewq2n2SId2UdOgzS9Wi0ixPx5K81qQCU0nepu0nCrD79GCZnHTOSYmpl775L2tpCcz7Lm_YulJVnv7T2qkz_YzAwGI7j6E5cSrlSBsNGR2UwVNqwkXhhrVRFxh_axJ4ynQJDExK00Te46W5pa-a7j68j5Zzq7cKfK6b8wdpf598efgMAAP__n2Fbnw), sending the legislation back to the House for final consideration and expected passage. Named after a 22-year-old nursing student who was murdered by an illegal Venezuelan immigrant last year, [the act would allow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhSAYBeCngQ0DP3DxDgxd3G7Xjgbh50qLYoRofPvG7t1OcpLz5Xy9xpdLOa3vT7egbbGMwEEzLhjAGFzK16hosBERUFK0wkijle6fQGcrUYQQMWJU3PRKR_QPDkFHjkKZB9Jk7zUuAISQPZfdxCEKr58TD34y2hDFMaRW9u67pLXNGPNVDtw7Xxaa7dzaVon8IDAQGM7z7PxUVzzr3RMY7khgqLi6hsxt214OrCy7H1zZnjJezPlGYKC7DduZck71caPvxaX8h7T_Th8WfgMAAP__QUJaSQ) for the mandatory detention of non-citizens convicted of, or charged with, burglary, larceny, theft, or shoplifting. Some Senate Democrats, [despite the bill's bipartisan support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX8NbETcEexkYOjiLV07WhiOmBabCK6J8u-rtHPX96T3Pn0fl_nic8n79d1v5DjVGTVapUEhztHn8pyPMrpEhGQkORjNaI_2dEa5OgAbIUFYaED0IRpATWPUOsFiAg4yu9eaBkQAc9LmsGhMEOx50TEsox3FUVPMXNvhs-adV0rlWe_UDqFusriV-daFeRM4CZx4pTWX8uoETmvdaKdHFzh12j2TwMnq82BHq_4CFWmroXnuKrXvzs0zRVX8F-2q5UJP5QMLnGRz8fbIpeQ-vIium8-_L5L_M3J3-BMAAP__Y6djSA), were frustrated by their inability to amend the legislation as it surpassed the 60-vote filibuster threshold.

The bill will mark the first policy legislation of the new Congress. President Donald Trump said he would sign it “within a week or so.”
## Rare Snowfall Blankets the South
A historic winter storm, driven by a polar vortex, has brought record-setting snow and ice to the Gulf Coast, with cities like Houston and New Orleans experiencing [rare and significant snowfall](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnMR0RHMCEguI26XLbLS1-DgkrbCxg483br7z9lqORRp_m477cXS55e_x3K9qR6gIMFGWcAizR5fJeJIk2IQIKgpZroZVUVwPkaYWclTDSIwacmYsypuCNRB2M0UEgyfZcYxyAc3Fl4uIZJB6U8SwGr5WeJMOYR22Xz5q38cRU3vWF7RLqSop9jrH3Sfyb4DbBze0bHv2sztBGDgUnuH11it-j4Yo01BLpkbeBjfZR20r7Vg8q0ATBZzCaGx6cEoljgjniNRlvkiTNxv3IpeQ-n6TH6nL5JYy_LnlZ-AkAAP__F41i1A). Travel across the South is paralyzed, with widespread school and airport closures in cities like Tallahassee and New Orleans, as freezing temperatures and strong winds persist. Follow [live updates here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1v8yAQxz8NbERw4OAMDM_iLc_a0QJz2FdhE9nUVvrpKydSt453v9P9Xz7u_d1TpmX872d0NZUeJDRCKgHQR0_52RseXUIE1Bydsto2pmlvwCcXtE_ah5B8bFtjLAJEbSJeYYhJo-Xkzm9SASilW6kvQUJSQ3MLMg7BNpYZiZFqWS-fhZY6YcrPsuN6GcrMs5tqfWxM_2PQMegO9HV6MwbdVss6b-ealoorg27B45x_AyjxRuJ1KnD5LiLTjiLkMoqtfNWJry4-DsqZtutpZpw95Zd4_auM3cFPAAAA__8Dd2He). New Orleans is seeing what meteorologists are calling its biggest snowstorm since 1895, with up to six inches expected. Here's a photo of the [French Quarter blanketed in snow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FyhCAUheGngW4d7kUEC4o0dJs2pXMVWMmgOEp217fPmD7tKb4z_9d9uFPKaX180hJsjWVAgeom4IY4eEr5HFrubQwBg-TBgpZatcr0yGfbSkMtRBGjViMpQdh1IioNnYnST8iTvTQBiADSCNmMAiNMqh-Fn0atNGtF8KmWvfkuaa1ziPksz7A3U1l4tnOt28HkB0PH0L2vlaHb6KxlXSiXNbzeDN1Rqf4cDB0YA1oBSuw0KqNNr_lu_fZKOaeju-4eC6X8x9f_cp8WfwMAAP__oXVUPg). Even Florida beaches have seen snow, making this a "once-in-a-generation" event, with snowfall in the Panhandle nearing record levels. [See a photo collection here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z89qhDAQgPGnSW4rk0k0esihsKSnbY-FXiTqRKfEP2hY2bcv9t77xw--r0f7CJx4GT_CTC7HtUXA8gbqhtgOgdOrNXJwkQhJS3LKaluasm5QTg6sMZpqqqyu0ECD2MQYddNHQFX1QbK7NFCISukadNEBRtWXTQdD39nSCgM0cF734mflJU8U02t90l706yyTm3LeDqHfBHqB_jzPgpcjh3EP81UI9JtAf_fv3_f6cwu3KNDL3Q3bySnxUV3-OAdOf17-7-_p8DcAAP__qdlP-w).

clean_body: President Donald Trump on Monday, signing an executive order pulling the U.S. out of the Paris climate agreement and erasing several Biden-era fossil fuel restrictions | | | | | | Wednesday, January 22, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1984, Apple's iconic aired during the Super Bowl. Directed by Ridley Scott, the ad is considered one of the most effective commercials of all time. Our readers helped write today's edition by sending us their favorite life advice in response to our request last week. Instead of our usual Wednesday Wisdom section, today we offer wisdom from our readers. We've selected four to share, but rest assured--we've read and appreciated every single one. Please let us know how you liked it by replying to this email. If you're looking for an investment opportunity in an incredible robotic technology, look no further than today's sponsor, . | Trump Declares Energy Emergency President Donald Trump on Monday, signing an executive order pulling the U.S. out of the Paris climate agreement and erasing several Biden-era fossil fuel restrictions Trump revoked Biden's order and froze money earmarked for EV charging stations. The action also directed federal agency heads to identify emergency authorities to and processing. According to Trump, the goal is to make the U.S. a “manufacturing nation once again.” In addition, Trump signed orders reversing bans on coast water drilling and electric vehicle adoption and lifting the freeze on LNG export permits. . Laken Riley Act Passes Senate The Senate voted 64-35 on Monday to approve an amended , sending the legislation back to the House for final consideration and expected passage. Named after a 22-year-old nursing student who was murdered by an illegal Venezuelan immigrant last year, for the mandatory detention of non-citizens convicted of, or charged with, burglary, larceny, theft, or shoplifting. Some Senate Democrats, , were frustrated by their inability to amend the legislation as it surpassed the 60-vote filibuster threshold. The bill will mark the first policy legislation of the new Congress. President Donald Trump said he would sign it “within a week or so.” Rare Snowfall Blankets the South A historic winter storm, driven by a polar vortex, has brought record-setting snow and ice to the Gulf Coast, with cities like Houston and New Orleans experiencing . Travel across the South is paralyzed, with widespread school and airport closures in cities like Tallahassee and New Orleans, as freezing temperatures and strong winds persist. Follow . New Orleans is seeing what meteorologists are calling its biggest snowstorm since 1895, with up to six inches expected. Here's a photo of the . Even Florida beaches have seen snow, making this a "once-in-a-generation" event, with snowfall in the Panhandle nearing record levels. . | ➤Sean Hannity is set to interview President Donald Trump today, giving the Fox News host the first Oval Office interview with Trump since he returned to the White House. () ➤Judge Aileen Cannon blocked special counsel Jack Smith from releasing his report on President Trump’s classified documents case to Congress, arguing that it could deny two former co-defendants a fair trial. () ➤ Florida became the first state to officially call the Gulf of Mexico the "Gulf of America," following President Trump’s executive order directing federal agencies to adopt the name. () **➤ President Trump’s executive order limiting birthright citizenship faced opposition Tuesday, with over 20 Democratic attorneys general and civil rights groups filing lawsuits. () | Flying together with our sponsor Mowing Down a $70B Opportunity The $70B commercial landscaping industry is overdue for a smarter way to mow. After all, some 50 million acres of mowable grass exist in the U.S. alone. Enter and its fully electric, autonomous mowers. They tackle acres of grass with zero emissions and cutting-edge precision, making manual labor look prehistoric. That’s why With Graze’s next-generation robotic mower set to begin production this quarter, they’re scaling to meet this moment head-on with their most advanced robotic tech yet. | ➤**Former Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson was hired as the next head coach of the Chicago Bears less than 48 hours after the team’s loss to the Washington Commanders during the NFL’s divisional round. () ➤ An 11-year-old baseball card collector now owns a 1-of-1 Topps baseball card featuring 2024 NL Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes. The card is projected to be worth north of $500,000. _**[They believe they're about to _BLOCK_ several of these America First patriots from assuming cabinet positions!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8gubpfn43td9keeclpk129a6ra6fkp0dmg1rqb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7clhm2o73c3h2bs)**_

subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dSeaBcOEdM9pc5dmMSCItm3hfMaIk3KxiIYhYOCwglJgrLfv2A77mTsX9d6QgYkmN5Y9nl11MSHm_kL6oiGH1hZMtwyF2x6lDHZvUz3OAjkX3yDRD05gG2wF2vd_C5-pUUB5XEG_oO2_z6E8AAWn7Sg%3D)
