| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dRS2cqdxNG2hTy4ZHGjOX9SgI3jvojdTZNxy6h9nTrHR_JkX6yecp7-iy7z4gZoFhkui88GoTYGUzeOIZmTlqyMhTrRLH6tV5tUPw8qaARzmlHcZVLpj0u3BFGonEXyj0xQwT-Q3CJPXLA3apAWApW8%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dSuM-JwBEIxJpsbg0gm19YdmecxG9kDE_y1r479ouqlx0Sq1mOY3cAgOicUwhATdQoAFtrNfrAAuJxR-3P9Krk68DtdIC45dJ4uBEmIeg-Zm-60JqToo23RLcj9Hq_OGaENPD1r48rftJXejR0oX-Ec%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6ders3wa7gofYLUrIu7YIouJzQVWvVQtJgSzbxef7NvDHIjArRvd8OeBPsJbBoURmFwT1buG4EKJqvLkz-6BW8J5CKRWPzzpv5qSPds_MXvOUhaTakfEnO3PZR88D2ybURDRA1QX2uUqQ2SvTphTnFBQ%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dSTm3n2EGi8fV9PzksorZWeVrRL7vwH1zBRXPC0TevOYOzv0TYq5CLJr_mk8G32rq0FNRJrhOMX6TcwFSY-Qi2UyOVecSQ99JxJPyeYbH9UlOTiDmgHqBU6RZeKTb2ikg-YojYzhtE8hleD15lokEMM%3D)
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dWpmeu6WwyTE30JPzoqIIET38Sdr1a5dVO5KM_HdZv4aLivwOlAZfNwcQNrQjPboZlG0ohpn0JDul9nBFENjjYtzQ0zK1Dn5INXAw3Hu0Fi74-xMeadFNYIsVoweXRUiUqYZpEEInqQ2La3l8lGH5AU%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dS2UG4e-KVK3PSaWtGl9LD90Edn0Tze0VtY0RPqL9FRJTvdz4oR0w8XQPqvmGk9QzFDHfTgdF5mM3Agj_15yR9C1aREckyCimt7c8fu-z9DGA1JqzP6T4_vdrf6P4UBvEQXiK2kB1AfBFRQCIo-oDlw%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dVYEhBYILaavNgbPPTxCTcJiVp8cEPjqMnkM1_nuBAsKfV8YeEX5NL0MDhDJwUw4wKRHFOaEszNBZhl8tvKDDYoTyWg4JfOqF03xvmptRoYrQd1VENKhNNkRlNmlOh7D2oOMuNyb_TvsqI6ebqSvOWk%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dZikR3P4O8KfywHmyKYfxlcNUA0hXeZg-hNN6U-OPPslMc-pafExALpbQxGsD6V2vhjoCENdTBdByXpJPEF42rpGN5EjL7oI9PLuCou4K2EyLZ0V_KBXHk7RNoA8pWp1Nsg3ir0oBojjnsRWzzGeLbs%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ab7b2a513e483da92048d477adc093&_e=XfwP98NJLm18tqLRYVxwhsceNBZ4Q_tb8myUFg8q-67ZNfn3oUqoLcmHVZ3Ns9MuD_mQmepCcuKhc500GCKtTCBA0ihd35o6P0SCB3q1xxomwkBs56G7c28tK3MrDrUKequKS6wIQioatNq7X6kQ6ihqP64xkmlHVSDezB5tawxijeZ4gC26AgrLCd3ZzDqRvMsNTiXZgXjaPlYtTqdZBAsN_JwsxHq8kTtB9yU-vypuT8BAlp7Uem49dK5oYNUSFcg1CRy9kGQVa5uJ5AgPvZ7wv2Q_sh350bHoBXOfK41JYBXgxMhxlsWFMdPWqglV5NOx-8zGmfv8uw0nTxE6dfj3YvA-lgDx0mOOh8t8dpRTHCrtx4UQGqCdzabBspMQuTODMY-F0hmfc3xBlv3xRrsZZoqlWdNAv_pfWsrVgtkFh1XLcyxvLSfKJhn7UKT6apBnrWyb_zUtJ5Bsrjbx221ThtV_U53zZk2Gz0p2wg8%3D)

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Trump is ALREADY BEING SUED

| | | **Trump is _ALREADY BEING SUED._** It only took a few hours. Right after the inauguration, he got to work. On day one Trump started signing executive orders to **SAVE THIS COUNTRY!** He declared a state of **EMERGENCY** at the border. He ended birthright citizenship. He’s banning Gender Identity. And the Left is fuming. Just hours after he signed these orders the Left launched lawsuits to stomp him from all across the country. These executive orders could **SAVE AMERICA** , but with these lawsuits it could put our plan on pause for the next 4 **YEARS! ** The Democrats know they can bog us down in court **FOREVER** so that’s exactly what they’re going to do. If we don’t act now then we won for **NOTHING!** We need to take every one of these cases directly to the highest court. Add your name now and tell SCOTUS to review all of these challenges.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)
Team,
“We have a responsibility to ensure that everyone gets a fair shot in life.”
That’s what my parents taught me growing up, and I’ve carried that lesson every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State.
**I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot.**
**[If you’re with me, will you make a founding contribution of any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-1?refcode=em20250122-1&refcode2=46_181023_YhiNA-&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)**
I’m ready for this work. I’ve investigated radical extremist groups, taught civil rights and voting rights law, and I ran for Secretary of State to make sure government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted.
Some people didn’t like that very much — but I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities.
**I’m running for Governor to truly make government work for everyone.** We need transparent leadership, safe schools and neighborhoods, and good education and childcare. Every Michigander should be able to pay their bills, put food on the table, and take care of their families.
**[That’s what I’m ready to fight for as Michigan's next Governor. Please, will you chip in $5 today to become a founding donor and help us launch this campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-1?refcode=em20250122-1&refcode2=46_181023_YhiNA-&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250122-1&refcode2=46_181023_YhiNA-&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)**
I love Michigan and I believe in our future. We’re tough, we work hard, and we never back down from a fight. Let’s make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, stay, and call home.
I can’t do this without you. Working together, I know we can do all of this, and more.
Let’s go.
— Jocelyn Benson
* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Jocelyn Benson is running for Governor to fight for Michigan families and make government work for everyone. **[This could be a very competitive election, so if you’re with us, chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-1?refcode=em20250122-1&refcode2=46_181023_YhiNA-&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-1?refcode=em20250122-1&refcode2=46_181023_YhiNA-&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)**
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=2&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=3&akid=46%2E181023%2EYhiNA-)

Jocelyn Benson for Governor
23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116
Ferndale, MI 48220
PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Deep state attacks Hegseth with lies & smears
body:
Call your senators and tell them to confirm Trump’s nominees NOW.

| Patriot-

---
| **** Yesterday, in a disgusting attempt to smear the Secretary of Defense nominee ahead of his Senate confirmation vote, the mainstream media released an affidavit from Pete Hegseth's former sister-in-law. In it, she claims that Hegseth's ex-wife, Samantha Hegseth, was afraid for her safety during their marriage.
However, Hegseth's former sister-in-law is a left-wing Democrat with an ax to grind against the administration and had an acrimonious divorce from Pete Hegseth's brother. **_Pete Hegseth 's ex-wife has firmly and unequivocally stated that there was no abuse during their marriage. _In 2021, both Pete and Samantha signed a court document confirming that the relationship saw no domestic abuse.****
****This is yet another attempt by the deep state to sully the name of one of President Donald Trump 's Cabinet nominees because they are afraid of the change he will bring to the Department of Defense.** It is similar to how the Democrats tried to smear Brett Kavanaugh during his Supreme Court nomination hearings. American voters, like you, are the reason this administration is in charge. Therefore, it's up to us to ensure he is able to implement the policies he promised us.
**We need you to make calls and send emails to your Senators, whether Republican or Democrat, and tell them that they _must_ confirm Pete Hegseth.** **[Our Pete Hegseth action page helps you do both easily and seamlessly](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a95c6c8f/1edb9794a95ba8b9).****
**The American people aren 't messing around, and Donald Trump's administration isn't either. It's time to unify and take our country back! **_Call and email your senators today!_****_
_**In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin
P.S. Russell Vought is President Trump's nominee for the Office of Management and Budget, a critical position in President Trump's efforts to make America great again, has his second hearing today as well. Democrat Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer has declared war against Vought, so if you have just another couple of minutes today, [**please use our Russell Vought action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a95c6c8f/1edb9794a95ba8bb) to send an email on his behalf as well. Additionally, **when you speak to senate offices in support of Pete Hegseth, you can also mention your support for Russell Vought in the same phone call.****** **__** **** ************

name: Rep. Brandon Gill
subject: Will you co-sponsor the Remain in Mexico Act?
body:
This will be transformative.

undefined
| | | | |
---
Friend - I just introduced my very first bill:
**[The Remain in Mexico Act](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Let me be blunt, this might be the most important fight of our generation.
[ACT NOW: BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR OF THE REMAIN IN MEXICO ACT](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Why? **Because Democrats have declared WAR on our border.**
They have openly aligned themselves with the same interests as _**criminal drug cartels**_ , _**foreign governments trafficking poison and humans into our country**_ , and _**terror cells that lie in wait**_ , embedding themselves in our nation through an open border.
Under President Trump’s leadership, we had a strong border. The Remain in Mexico policy WORKED:
* Fewer illegal crossings.
* Fewer fraudulent asylum claims
* More deportations of dangerous criminals.

But then, in 2021, the Biden Administration took over, and what did they do?
**They gutted EVERYTHING.**
They opened our border wide for the cartels...They enabled human trafficking... They invited chaos into our cities.
_**_[ENOUGH IS ENOUGH](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**_
The Remain in Mexico Act is our first step to take back control... But allow me to state the obvious:
**Democrats won’t give up their open-border obsession without a fight.**
That’s why I need YOU in this battle.
America is at a breaking point and I need **AS MANY PATRIOTIC AMERICANS AS I CAN GET** to become **CITIZEN CO-SPONSORS** of my **Remain in Mexico Act**.
**__[Will you help me secure our border and STOP this madness](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**
[ACT NOW: BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR OF THE REMAIN IN MEXICO ACT](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Together, we can make our voices heard loud and clear: We will not tolerate an open border, and the death and destruction that comes with it.
_**_[Will you step up before it’s too late](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?**_
Yours Sincerely,
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Congressman Brandon Gill
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjW/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjT/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RjU/?__vbtrk=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMTc4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=20a43f102ea055118c08d99fd1614184cdb9ae94bfe05fa00775447693c822ccfad10dff4f74cdb510f4d60a6e9fbee100c0f3ce88c8772204dd0cb9c2064623 So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! body:

body:
Do you think the Senate should confirm ALL of Trump’s nominees?

Friend,

As you're reading this, Senate Democrats are lobbing endless attacks at President Trump's nominees in a desperate attempt to stall his America First agenda.

_These radicals hate Trump so much that they 'll gladly smear every single one of his nominees - especially America First Patriots like Pete Hegseth and Pam Bondi - if there's even a chance of slowing our momentum!_

But there's one thing that matters more than anything else when it comes to these confirmation decisions...

_... And that's what the American _PEOPLE_ think! _

With Senate confirmation hearings now underway for many of President Trump's nominees, we need to hear YOUR opinion right away.

That is why we've commissioned this Official **[Nationwide Flash Poll](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu8cjb9ohsuq5s9t7eprg98paorod8d5e8sq9os8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cljm0or6c1h2bs) **so _YOU_ can share your input directly with the Senate GOP.

---
| Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. Starting in February, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond.
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our first four sessions:
Fall River 🗓️ February 1, 2025 ⏰ 12:00 PM 📍 VFW 486 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA
Holyoke 🗓️ February 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Holyoke Public Library, 250 Chestnut Street, Holyoke, MA

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future | Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. Starting in February, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond. Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed. Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in. Here are the details for our first four sessions: Fall River 🗓️ February 1, 2025 ⏰ 12:00 PM 📍 VFW 486 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA Holyoke 🗓️ February 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Holyoke Public Library, 250 Chestnut Street, Holyoke, MA Lawrence 🗓️ March 1, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Parkside Apartments Community Room 260 Haverhill St, Lawrence, MA 01840 Worcester 🗓️ March 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 765 W Boylston Street, Floor 2, Worcester, MA Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts! == Let's build a stronger Massachusetts, starting with you. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

When you confirm your contact information, it will ensure you get exclusive updates about what the USO is doing around the world, opportunities to get involved in our work and early access to exciting offers like our exclusive 2025 USO T-shirt.
**So please:[Update your contact information for 2025 now!](https://links.e.uso.)**

Thank you!

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b78184e3eb324a14a81bd9e685c61489&_e=Gyq7A1Bu4sSADYKqx0Vw_G5hugg-IqG0_POdlapFSAJTN9uM39piZRFCf6xI5gUuLFZKbLGsWMtf9Vq1JBM8Mh3KmA6vE7Zou087yWxn08NF2zFMi1NxOtIQwwztx-4onlAbAN0_tARdnJYULr3lGUw5vF9rwaflxuXKfvVOmN4VOM49S2rE2fIqQHeNMPX1x_ldivvUTkN5_1UkqgBS2pfRKhMFxyNHxbziZUBk35YzzubQJEeZhtqq1x3fkcsWjQKqnwjpMi2xjIJcwGExphs_XsZkFbndyDnUhVa4b6v-N8LULaQpMD2C11FLSYU3s9l8C9L9hN0NadQMQ_VG2ID9Z2sjJEfHDHvaUT6j0Q0hF7X7ndS5m9PIrWViTVvjkmV0XLb4WgJEa11YWyreJfaWuv6u7Ujk3oOvv19a2zQNLfwKTXt2blt0Ii2xAIfe)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b78184e3eb324a14a81bd9e685c61489&_e=Gyq7A1Bu4sSADYKqx0Vw_G5hugg-IqG0_POdlapFSAJTN9uM39piZRFCf6xI5gUuLFZKbLGsWMtf9Vq1JBM8Mh3KmA6vE7Zou087yWxn08NF2zFMi1NxOtIQwwztx-4onlAbAN0_tARdnJYULr3lGUw5vF9rwaflxuXKfvVOmN4VOM49S2rE2fIqQHeNMPX1x_ldivvUTkN5_1UkqgBS2pfRKhMFxyNHxbziZUBk35YzzubQJEeZhtqq1x3fkcsWjQKqnwjpMi2xjIJcwGExphs_XsZkFbndyDnUhVa4b6sA1-MSuqWMi1GhXCiCD88xucNbwo8dGvXayMxZNTQFJLMjMXlJXWcQebclrPBQQ_-SRYxqCsMjh2NXEuIiL3Fd187dNqgWj85SVN_NgPg0ho8fwIc2JwVLjIGdDz4oaxD7AgTQkMDRlhInERpMqABf)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b78184e3eb324a14a81bd9e685c61489&_e=Gyq7A1Bu4sSADYKqx0Vw_G5hugg-IqG0_POdlapFSAJTN9uM39piZRFCf6xI5gUuLFZKbLGsWMtf9Vq1JBM8Mh3KmA6vE7Zou087yWxn08NF2zFMi1NxOtIQwwztx-4onlAbAN0_tARdnJYULr3lGUw5vF9rwaflxuXKfvVOmN4VOM49S2rE2fIqQHeNMPX1x_ldivvUTkN5_1UkqgBS2pfRKhMFxyNHxbziZUBk35YzzubQJEeZhtqq1x3fkcsWjQKqnwjpMi2xjIJcwGExphs_XsZkFbndyDnUhVa4b6voBw_hlWTRldiOWPrj6tNBjAug9iR2lcT8Iigu64Sds5q63mG9e7mefDxii4fg97-bnCAVrtxOPV07kw1vKHmmvPXd0HRsEpK4ZKzWr2KNtyioNDsd-pK1xjYBl9CHu72-mzMZLDJhoKJtPtQPx5Q5)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b78184e3eb324a14a81bd9e685c61489&_e=Gyq7A1Bu4sSADYKqx0Vw_G5hugg-IqG0_POdlapFSAJTN9uM39piZRFCf6xI5gUuLFZKbLGsWMtf9Vq1JBM8Mh3KmA6vE7Zou087yWxn08NF2zFMi1NxOtIQwwztx-4onlAbAN0_tARdnJYULr3lGUw5vF9rwaflxuXKfvVOmN4VOM49S2rE2fIqQHeNMPX1x_ldivvUTkN5_1UkqgBS2pfRKhMFxyNHxbziZUBk35YzzubQJEeZhtqq1x3fkcsWjQKqnwjpMi2xjIJcwGExphs_XsZkFbndyDnUhVa4b6veM9CHaAPmhxCRonOi8-hj0ML3Eo--HYfUwmv2fQvwX0BMfr1rvO5hYPM-68rAhLSvbDK2PgJtsfjlu16fuakaZ7q5tryJK-VQ-WqD4bFa-t2uNkaRwEwy9zZUUAvVa03GJ_K2qGiddLBe7DPkziwA).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=b78184e3eb324a14a81bd9e685c61489&_t=3zcZQs5BLjYiK9xU0_YwhnP08M-FN0AN6uMmS7bJadyFnsNOpW6sPf1N7tPVQxVu2xDV-asYTx62E6TDw010bpgLbsmZK6pjrUOnMRcRMQhtJjnqZtCPLakDeefQN28K)

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: Welcome, Katherine García!
body:
Evergreen welcomes a bold leader in clean transportation to our board
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3262866/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi friend,

I'm honored and thrilled to share some much-needed good news with you today that Evergreen has welcomed **Katherine García** , a nationally recognized leader in advancing clean transportation solutions, to our Governing Board.

Katherine García is the director of Sierra Club’s Clean Transportation for All campaign, where she has built an inspiring track record of success, protecting public health and improving air quality by reducing emissions from the transportation sector. This includes many successful efforts at the state and local levels.

As one of the country’s preeminent experts on fighting pollution in our transportation systems, she brings unparalleled expertise and a demonstrated ability to deliver real progress for communities nationwide. Katherine also currently serves on the National Center for Sustainable Transportation Leadership Council and the League of American Bicyclists Board of Directors.

**Here’s what Katherine had to say about joining Evergreen:** |
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3262867/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| There’s no doubt that these next four years will be difficult, but together—and with leaders like Katherine, we can cement the progress we’ve fought so hard for and set the stage for transformative action in the years ahead. [**We hope you’ll consider making a contribution today—whatever the amount—to support this critical work.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3262868/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3262869/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Onward, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Collaborative

Friend,

The upcoming inauguration of President Trump _should_ mark the beginning of a new chapter in American history.
---
**But sadly, when President Trump takes office, he’s immediately facing a $486 MILLION witch hunt led by my opponent, corrupt New York Attorney General Tish James.**

She’s announced that she’ll continue to pursue this wrongfully imposed fine even after President Trump takes office.
---
The worst part? The unconstitutional judgment against him is written in such a way that he has to pay interest on that massive sum...
---
**_...meaning he’s effectively being fined $112,000 _PER_ _DAY_ as President!_**
---
This kind of LAWFARE poses a grave threat to our free Republic, Friend.
---
_The Left couldn’t defeat President Trump at the ballot box, so corrupt radicals like Tish James are trying to stall his agenda by bleeding him dry._
---
She cares more about destroying her political enemies than going after the real criminals that are ravaging our state.
---
**That’s why I’m running to FIRE Tish James and end the politicization of the Office of Attorney General.**
---
_But our country cannot wait until 2026 to stop this $486 MILLION (and counting) scam_ ...
---

President Trump's new Border Czar Tom Homan **[refused to be shamed](https://substack.com/redirect/2783a43b-6b89-4376-aacd-74af379ef205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by CNN's Dana Bash for carrying out plans to deport criminal aliens from across the country which started on day-one of the Trump administration.
"I.C.E. is back doing their job effective today! They haven't been able to do it for 4 years!" **[Homan explained with a big smile.](https://substack.com/redirect/2783a43b-6b89-4376-aacd-74af379ef205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2783a43b-6b89-4376-aacd-74af379ef205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Bash pressed him on exactly who would be first targeted in the enforcement. "You said several times that it is the people who pose the biggest public safety threat to Americans, is that still the case?"
"Yes, people who are in the country **[who have a criminal conviction, that's our priority," ](https://substack.com/redirect/2783a43b-6b89-4376-aacd-74af379ef205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**Homan answered.
Homan continued to lambast "sanctuary cities" for making his new job infinitely harder by not allowing I.C.E to arrest and deport illegal migrants already in jail.
"If they don't give us access to them, we gotta go to the neighborhood and find them, and we will find them!" Homan promised Bash.
Watch the full tense interview below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2783a43b-6b89-4376-aacd-74af379ef205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Scott Jennings goes on EPIC Inauguration Day rant on CNN, dismantles entire democrat panel**
CNN Republican Scott Jennings **[took a major victory lap in front of his woke CNN colleagues](https://substack.com/redirect/ebd80f25-0b38-406e-8d9c-a0b49eaa711b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on inauguration day, and some of them didn't handle it so well...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ebd80f25-0b38-406e-8d9c-a0b49eaa711b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrats on the panel said they felt "shocked" by Trump being inaugurated again despite everything they tried to throw at him.
"Wow, we have a president again!" Jennings joked sarcastically. "I was watching Trump today, the words that came to mind were gritty, resilient, determined and audacious."
Van Jones pressed Jennings on Trump's decision to pardon the non-violent January 6 participants, saying it served as a poor example to others who would engage in riotous activities.
"As though we've never had a moment in recent American history where people were not punished for rampaging around,... it was the summer of 2020!" Jenning fired back. "And those people were never even charged!"

# Trump's Cabinet picks stood like spartans against a bitter democrat onslaught
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1043caf7-eccb-4127-92ae-f97ca9133544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f7b181ed-5fb9-451d-9c0c-bc8e50508e10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Support Mayor Giuliani and get access to his latest exclusive content by becoming a PolitiBrawl paid subscriber
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Hu9BYKwETQ8zNpVPGkjFUnR9pIR9W0Xgmy457c7a0ec?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155433140)
This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm. He articulated a vision for a "warrior culture" at the Pentagon, promising to be a "change agent" in an institution that desperately needs one. His responses to Senators like Elizabeth Warren, who tried to pin him down with her usual sanctimonious blather, were nothing short of masterful. Hegseth didn't just defend himself; he turned the tables, leaving Warren looking like the petty politician she is. His commitment to the military and understanding of its needs were clear, and the Democrats' attempts to portray him as unfit only highlighted their own lack of understanding of what our military needs...

| | | Hi Friend-
With President Trump back in the White House, we are off to a tremendous start.
During the election, President Trump promised to take bold, decisive action to get America back on track and within 24 hours of taking the oath of office, he has kept his promise.
**President Trump has...**
---
| | | **Declared a national energy emergency** to unlock America’s vast energy resources.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Stopped asylum abuse** and birthright citizenship.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Restarted construction** of the Border Wall.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Restored in-person work requirements** for federal bureaucrats and imposed merit-based policies to remove unaccountable government officials.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Halted the weaponization of government** by the Department of Justice.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Put a stop to the wasteful foreign aid** that fails to advance America’s interests.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Returned the America First trade policies** that unleashed our economy.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Protected America’s legacy** by restoring the name of Mt. McKinley and renaming the Gulf of America.
---
| | |
---
| | | **Reinstituted the death penalty.**
---
| | |
---
| | | **Ensured the federal government will only recognize male and female biological genders.**
---
| | |
---
_This was just Day One._
**As your voice in Congress, I will work with President Trump to enact each of these important policies into law and Make America Great Again.**

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Hypocrisy Has Entered the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
Greetings from Gay Valimont, the mom who is against gun violence, for our veterans, and striving to improve healthcare for FL-1 and beyond. Sadly, at Donald Trump’s inauguration, many noted that he chose not to place his hand on the Bible while taking the oath of office—a break from a longstanding tradition observed by U.S. presidents. This symbolic moment underscores a pattern we’ve seen throughout Trump’s career: **professing values for political gain while failing to uphold them in practice. ** Veterans, Christians, and Americans at large look to this gesture and assign respect, hope, and bipartisanship to it. _Trump has once again disrespected tradition in favor of a headline._
---
---
But when it comes to Donald Trump, it’s all about the spectacle, not the substance. Time and again, we’ve seen hypocrisy in his actions—whether it’s claiming to fight for working families while enacting tax policies that benefit the wealthy or using religion as a political prop without demonstrating true moral leadership. **[This campaign isn’t about empty promises or shallow symbolism—it’s about real solutions that improve lives. If you, too, are sick of the stunts this man pulls, donate today to my campaign to change Congress in our favor. Your support, whether its just $5, can save thousands from disappointing leadership..](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100784465/523889272/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODczZGVjYmItZDFkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dbAkD3Ccidy8sSQ4JKYkD8xnb02lx5ey9-hF4OsuYWg=)**

clean_body: | | | Greetings from Gay Valimont, the mom who is against gun violence, for our veterans, and striving to improve healthcare for FL-1 and beyond. Sadly, at Donald Trump’s inauguration, many noted that he chose not to place his hand on the Bible while taking the oath of office—a break from a longstanding tradition observed by U.S. presidents. This symbolic moment underscores a pattern we’ve seen throughout Trump’s career: professing values for political gain while failing to uphold them in practice. Veterans, Christians, and Americans at large look to this gesture and assign respect, hope, and bipartisanship to it. Trump has once again disrespected tradition in favor of a headline. But when it comes to Donald Trump, it’s all about the spectacle, not the substance. Time and again, we’ve seen hypocrisy in his actions—whether it’s claiming to fight for working families while enacting tax policies that benefit the wealthy or using religion as a political prop without demonstrating true moral leadership. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Only we can help my district, and America, with real action. Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

**[Claim Your 7-Level Infrared Night Vision Binoculars - 50% OFF!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19957/6374453/1fb91233b187e899df07f83a0fa2ddb426f90314/c838071beef72c03b77a9faaef259731312756fc) **

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19957/6374453/1fb91233b187e899df07f83a0fa2ddb426f90314/c838071beef72c03b77a9faaef259731312756fc)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 50% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your Night Vision Binoculars before we run out](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19957/6374453/1fb91233b187e899df07f83a0fa2ddb426f90314/c838071beef72c03b77a9faaef259731312756fc)**

P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: You can send diapers to the fire victims
body:
| [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7e80a362e2284afc87338f4136c29294&_e=LVy6THg-LeF8-mkpZZtHF8tq3DDStq0HtX5v8mUZLCGjIgBlv2HLAGs9UTfbtjF1VXo3HlY0yNVenlogrBXrHNNoiEMx61FEsyLK_IeLosB0N7_RSDb9kPyulhtCIXrVnC8eXG01swOHdOZXF1YH4dVL0LCVPGkVVb-qD8xSjCvSI3d3UkAPCU8IoosdajisNzhMt-hTU8XriamE1aw2QtZDZrtmRlmQ7nrTx_p__xMFGSpTTrsjmvP82tSu0j3VLb0FTmRSTv2RbpsWgXuys1fWEMBog7duS0Bxm7YeTZ-Dc_0b7iQqVy0zYOoM0l1y1WMV1N54-m7FmPnjOEsyubQmfIGjNqk_Bx5TSgxByibS5REvscEan8LnkLz5mtHe)
---
#
Peter,

As you've most likely seen, parts of beautiful Southern California are being destroyed by ruthless flames.

My family and I are safe, but many are not. As we pray for the protection of all those in the fire's path, there is something else you can do to help these victims.

Live Action is partnering with EveryLife to send diapers to families impacted by the fires. From now through the end of the month, every gift of $50, using this link, will enable a box of diapers (6 packs!) to be sent to a family in critical need. Will you step up now for these families? [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7e80a362e2284afc87338f4136c29294&_e=LVy6THg-LeF8-mkpZZtHF8tq3DDStq0HtX5v8mUZLCGjIgBlv2HLAGs9UTfbtjF1VXo3HlY0yNVenlogrBXrHNNoiEMx61FEsyLK_IeLosB0N7_RSDb9kPyulhtCIXrVnC8eXG01swOHdOZXF1YH4dVL0LCVPGkVVb-qD8xSjCvSI3d3UkAPCU8IoosdajisNzhMt-hTU8XriamE1aw2QlUV2QZDsDIq4m3SuARNWGNAlN0cRpHd7O_IFKYiC2zy_hAoCnuq07OFzVYUofYzVG6twUHT1Xkg0fJv3DdzXw_tsnKwt-VI81BuoKPZrvH545MWdmlsW7a95mQOWwgn8UU1amRFJTtB2uq-PK_rCPrMKDRfP1uRMGMf3Ws9A5Cb)
With 5 already dead and over 2,000 buildings destroyed, news reports are saying this is one of the most destructive fires in recorded history for this region of California.

Over 130,000 have been evacuated so far and many are struggling to meet basic needs, unsure what they'll be returning to after the flames subside.

In these stressful moments, practical necessities make all the difference, especially when babies are involved. That's why we're partnering with EveryLife to provide diapers to families in need.

EveryLife is coordinating with CityServe and Convoy of Hope, working tirelessly to ensure the diapers reach California families in need by any means necessary.

This means all you need to do is fill out the donation form with a gift of $50 or more, and the rest will be taken care of for you.

Send a box containing 6 packs of diapers to a family in need: **[https://give.liveaction.org/ca-wildfires-diaper-drive/](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7e80a362e2284afc87338f4136c29294&_e=LVy6THg-LeF8-mkpZZtHF8tq3DDStq0HtX5v8mUZLCGjIgBlv2HLAGs9UTfbtjF1VXo3HlY0yNVenlogrBXrHNNoiEMx61FEsyLK_IeLosB0N7_RSDb9kPyulhtCIXrVnC8eXG01swOHdOZXF1YH4dVL0LCVPGkVVb-qD8xSjCvSI3d3UkAPCU8IoosdajisNzhMt-hTU8XriamE1aw2QrWKaJueaYRuot8qGLqYlmZd4aw8lOLJx7PK2mgfMaJkc-E_a62BD1MrtIizpk3tNoUSOSIj9EI4peFf2pGHTmSw9dVu-rgqP1jeo17PhhEhja-EqUVwpGtwElCQQsHvZ_Gz1d-VG2FYpPnF9yDsTL7fJ8lva_gh4Xi8IJER9ds3)**

Thank you for standing with us to help children and families affected during this critical time.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**Founder and President**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7e80a362e2284afc87338f4136c29294&_e=LVy6THg-LeF8-mkpZZtHF8tq3DDStq0HtX5v8mUZLCGjIgBlv2HLAGs9UTfbtjF1VXo3HlY0yNVenlogrBXrHNNoiEMx61FEsyLK_IeLosB0N7_RSDb9kPyulhtCIXrVnC8eXG01swOHdOZXF1YH4dVL0LCVPGkVVb-qD8xSjCvSI3d3UkAPCU8IoosdajisNzhMt-hTU8XriamE1aw2QvnmlcPvVrIZxyL9683bp2LHWawZdoK8_E5_iyD79HYXBnB8s0UZe-xmpIenzvU-s48lkXe2IyqUy6PMkViDqD99yI003XTHiwyFIysxAL4NLtQIbjLrXLZWLZ_X8Y4GWUB568Qbg2jFSSyA7d_Q1xU85QjdtQc4ScU5Kwrjc3P4)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=7e80a362e2284afc87338f4136c29294&_t=sPQ4l1icfVBl4XRE6tlEZkFL4sPomLXrfORt8W3g7s0aTJh-vm7NS4F78cj9Q7bp8RDszSWFzeKwRGoPix2GSqQW3h5z6ZhgD3WFAi_8vzfH45u1lNqxrW4EnjCT4zr2)

subject: You MUST know why it needs to end!

body:
The Electoral College was created to give slave states more electoral power without counting enslaved Americans as citizens.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22785%2E4449941%2E0-l01K)
---
**FIRST:** The Electoral College was created to give slave states more electoral power without counting enslaved Americans as citizens.

**THEN:** The Electoral College handed candidates who lost the popular vote the presidency 5 TIMES since its creation – **including Trump in 2016**.

**NOW:** Senate Democrats are stepping up to end this archaic practice for good: [**Look, we’re setting an emergency $5,000 goal to start a campaign to abolish the Electoral College and activating our 3X-MATCH to end this threat to our democracy once and for all! subject: House Republicans need your signature.
body:
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*

---

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Houston halfway through winter storm as concern shifts to frozen roads,** " Houston Landing's**Hanna Holthaus** -- "Houston is halfway through the worst effects of Winter Storm Enzo and has so far avoided severe damages, said Mayor **John Whitmire** Tuesday evening.

Whitmire urged residents to keep sheltered in place for the next 24 hours.

"It's halftime, we've got third and fourth quarters to go," Whitmire said at a press conference.

The predominant risk will be the snow that melted Tuesday that will freeze on the roads overnight, Whitmire said. The city saw 22 nonlethal vehicular accidents Tuesday, and Whitmire thanked employers for closing their businesses which allowed workers to stay home.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/c12f87ee-a06f-4877-9fa5-9562f8c3abcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Houston Fire and Rescue Department has started transporting residents to warming systems for the first time. Almost 1,100 people have used the 10 city sponsored warming centers so far, with no reported deaths in Houston.

The Harris County Sheriff's Department [reported at least one death](https://substack.com/redirect/07c943ef-3f4a-4bb0-bf25-fc17aea7f8a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) potentially due to cold exposure earlier in the day.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/c12f87ee-a06f-4877-9fa5-9562f8c3abcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Other concerns, such as widespread power outages and water pressure loss, have not had the impact of previous storms. Centerpoint reported 73 outages affecting 1,385 customers as of 5:30 p.m., and Houston Public Works said the water system remained strong.

City offices and HISD schools will stay closed Wednesday, but the airports will open. TSA will start accepting passengers at 9 a.m., arrivals at 10 a.m. and departures will begin at 11 a.m.

"We've got to be very safe and smart from here on out," Whitmire said. "If we follow precautions and the common sense we've used up to this point, we're going to look back at this storm as a challenging experience where Houston met its challenge."" [Houston Landing](https://substack.com/redirect/c3c3dbe8-f7a6-4f03-8370-17e9d2e6db38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS "Houston halfway through winter storm as concern shifts to frozen roads, " Houston Landing'sHanna Holthaus -- "Houston is halfway through the worst effects of Winter Storm Enzo and has so far avoided severe damages, said Mayor John Whitmire Tuesday evening. Whitmire urged residents to keep sheltered in place for the next 24 hours. "It's halftime, we've got third and fourth quarters to go," Whitmire said at a press conference. The predominant risk will be the snow that melted Tuesday that will freeze on the roads overnight, Whitmire said. The city saw 22 nonlethal vehicular accidents Tuesday, and Whitmire thanked employers for closing their businesses which allowed workers to stay home. The Houston Fire and Rescue Department has started transporting residents to warming systems for the first time. Almost 1,100 people have used the 10 city sponsored warming centers so far, with no reported deaths in Houston. The Harris County Sheriff's Department potentially due to cold exposure earlier in the day. Other concerns, such as widespread power outages and water pressure loss, have not had the impact of previous storms. Centerpoint reported 73 outages affecting 1,385 customers as of 5:30 p.m., and Houston Public Works said the water system remained strong. City offices and HISD schools will stay closed Wednesday, but the airports will open. TSA will start accepting passengers at 9 a.m., arrivals at 10 a.m. and departures will begin at 11 a.m. "We've got to be very safe and smart from here on out," Whitmire said. "If we follow precautions and the common sense we've used up to this point, we're going to look back at this storm as a challenging experience where Houston met its challenge."" FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. * **TOP NEWS**

“**Houston halfway through winter storm as concern shifts to frozen roads,** ” Houston Landing's**Hanna Holthaus** — “Houston is halfway through the worst effects of Winter Storm Enzo and has so far avoided severe damages, said Mayor **John Whitmire** Tuesday evening.

Whitmire urged residents to keep sheltered in place for the next 24 hours.

“It’s halftime, we’ve got third and fourth quarters to go,” Whitmire said at a press conference.

The predominant risk will be the snow that melted Tuesday that will freeze on the roads overnight, Whitmire said. The city saw 22 nonlethal vehicular accidents Tuesday, and Whitmire thanked employers for closing their businesses which allowed workers to stay home.

Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS “Houston halfway through winter storm as concern shifts to frozen roads, ” Houston Landing'sHanna Holthaus — “Houston is halfway through the worst effects of Winter Storm Enzo and has so far avoided severe damages, said Mayor John Whitmire Tuesday evening. Whitmire urged residents to keep sheltered in place for the next 24 hours. “It’s halftime, we’ve got third and fourth quarters to go,” Whitmire said at a press conference. The predominant risk will be the snow that melted Tuesday that will freeze on the roads overnight, Whitmire said. The city saw 22 nonlethal vehicular accidents Tuesday, and Whitmire thanked employers for closing their businesses which allowed workers to stay home. » The Houston Fire and Rescue Department has started transporting residents to warming systems for the first time. Almost 1,100 people have used the 10 city sponsored warming centers so far, with no reported deaths in Houston. The Harris County Sheriff’s Department potentially due to cold exposure earlier in the day. » Other concerns, such as widespread power outages and water pressure loss, have not had the impact of previous storms. Centerpoint reported 73 outages affecting 1,385 customers as of 5:30 p.m., and Houston Public Works said the water system remained strong. City offices and HISD schools will stay closed Wednesday, but the airports will open. TSA will start accepting passengers at 9 a.m., arrivals at 10 a.m. and departures will begin at 11 a.m. “We’ve got to be very safe and smart from here on out,” Whitmire said. “If we follow precautions and the common sense we’ve used up to this point, we’re going to look back at this storm as a challenging experience where Houston met its challenge.”" FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Peter,

_**[FIRST-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f735c8eec2ab4acfb85a011657abe3af&_e=an2JguS1Hb587Orm9btO03k6p3awGIL61AGC6GpyTnTEizjXB6zzjNooWbsyvi9qvmPyxjpGnbXhS_cbP_HxNPebJsPsJ-14ZIZ24GfibwMJnSWxGZxheuuclpCIgYD8PEmRkuFQp9a2MxO4cmtUwnsKX8BuYU6ZeTaE3IiqHMK4q4LbyK-jFLryFCFnIz4VHzbae2EetFD7bGtnLFwg5XUNO1HCveJoFPLoh5j7u-QFe4rWJmIKmFMdYMNN8H86g_ZE4ei5jVVmukTDUZJ80z05LjhouKcKlgfMVpzRuqIPT3AQmrlvFxr4X8pv28TVTfwFR3MDBRfktZD4ut6bMw%3D%3D)** Congress passed Title IX in 1972, which explicitly ensured that male and female students and athletes in educational settings were treated equally and fairly. This includes ensuring that males and females are treated equally and fairly in sports, from intramural sports to college athletics.

**[THEN-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f735c8eec2ab4acfb85a011657abe3af&_e=an2JguS1Hb587Orm9btO03k6p3awGIL61AGC6GpyTnTEizjXB6zzjNooWbsyvi9qvmPyxjpGnbXhS_cbP_HxNPebJsPsJ-14ZIZ24GfibwMJnSWxGZxheuuclpCIgYD8PEmRkuFQp9a2MxO4cmtUwnsKX8BuYU6ZeTaE3IiqHMKRLceUkscgoAsxx8kojfzJQNylG-rb_oEtoaWD0KWcnzMyszCEyXuTFBJehuRRpSLN2fTMctHf0tXXQ3GTiAVk59TY3t8mC2HTYyrtO3DLVH4J_vUylqEofBGavTZwFxdF6e2CHSGynh_aztM5ptsuimpTkzu-aJYLiAOoP2ZXXA%3D%3D)** The Radical Left began demanding that biological men who identify as transgender women could compete in women's sports, threatening to withhold Title IX federal financial assistance for schools that would not comply. This led to biological men all over the country infiltrating women's sports and instantly becoming the top athletes, regardless of age or sport. Notably, female athletes like Riley Gaines were ROBBED of trophies and championships after training their whole lives.

I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act to clarify that including male athletes in women's sports IS a Title IX violation and clearly defines males and females as the biological sex assigned at birth. I need your help to make sure that our Senate Majority passes this bill._

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f735c8eec2ab4acfb85a011657abe3af&_e=an2JguS1Hb587Orm9btO03k6p3awGIL61AGC6GpyTnTEizjXB6zzjNooWbsyvi9qvmPyxjpGnbXhS_cbP_HxNPebJsPsJ-14ZIZ24GfibwMJnSWxGZxheuuclpCIgYD8ZdCu5iLDOOBTDMQala99GS_3GDiFDmmzabTmTxe_E2_MR0hk-RLc6SQuhdW8ZORNl-sfPwrVe16ehB47P3VsYZtsFbQ9SHv9S4-Ab1prt7w3zrrxFkD8D7BxyX0--cwEaOeI2KAVhc6nZE7XTEWr3RU1vc0naQciB0x07fEKSHA1yDePdF6Gf-LVVdfElH4LnbPqJ_yu5Bfx_488SBJGPw%3D%3D)

---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Monday’s inauguration
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2228%2E135344%2EzgEYM0)

Friend,
I wanted to take a moment to reflect on Monday.
Presidential inaugurations are historic occasions -- a chance for our leaders to conduct a peaceful transfer of power, showing the rest of the world that our country is committed to the ideals of free and fair elections.
The start of a new administration also brings new announcements, policies, and orders, with which we might agree, or in some cases, strongly disagree.
I was proud to represent Michigan at the inauguration. I spent the day with a colleague from Michigan, George Kullis, the Township Supervisor in Holly where I live.
George is a Republican, and when it comes to national politics, we probably disagree on a lot. But at home, in Holly, we both care about protecting our neighbors -- their pocketbooks and their kids -- and we work together to help them.
It’s never far from my mind that I was elected by Michiganders on the same ballot as President Trump. My mandate is to work with the President wherever possible if there’s a chance to get something done -- particularly if it’s going to lower the cost of living or help Michigan families get ahead. And when the President spoke about helping the auto industry, and competition with China, I saw areas of mutual interest.
But my job is also to speak up if I see actions being taken that are harmful to Michigan and to our democracy.
I’ve written to you over the past few weeks about my framework for my approach as a Senator during the next administration. When something comes up that I disagree with, I’ll ask myself: Is it tactical or strategic? Meaning, is it something short-term and for shock value but probably won't last -- or is it strategic and long-term? And then, is it reversible or irreversible? Will it cause damage that can’t be reversed with a new administration? Does it pose an irreversible risk to our democracy?
We saw President Trump issue a raft of new executive orders and pardons, and it’s the first time that my framework is making contact with reality.
There were multiple executive orders of concern, but I took particular note of the pardons issued for those convicted of crimes on January 6, 2021 -- especially as someone who barricaded herself in her office that day and watched bloodied Capitol Police officers defend our Capitol.
When he issued those pardons, the President sent a signal that those who commit violence on his behalf -- even assaulting law enforcement officers -- won’t face punishment under the law.
That’s a signal that political violence in support of President Trump is acceptable, and potentially pardonable, moving forward. It puts the rule of law, and our democracy, at risk. It’s not about partisan politics, it’s about law and character -- and it’s a signal that can’t be unsent.
Thank you for your support as I embark on my third week as Senator, and my first under a new administration. I will continue to put my focus as a leader on helping Michigan wherever possible, and speaking up when our rights or our democracy are under threat.
Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan25.mLp_Iw&refcode=em250122-1&t=2&akid=2228%2E135344%2EzgEYM0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-jan25.ld21Cu&refcode=em250122-1&t=3&akid=2228%2E135344%2EzgEYM0)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan25.mLp_Iw&refcode=em250122-1&t=4&akid=2228%2E135344%2EzgEYM0)**
---
****

East Lansing, MI 48826

It’s never far from my mind that I was elected by Michiganders on the same ballot as President Trump. My mandate is to work with the President wherever possible if there’s a chance to get something done -- particularly if it’s going to lower the cost of living or help Michigan families get ahead. And when the President spoke about helping the auto industry, and competition with China, I saw areas of mutual interest. But my job is also to speak up if I see actions being taken that are harmful to Michigan and to our democracy. I’ve written to you over the past few weeks about my framework for my approach as a Senator during the next administration. When something comes up that I disagree with, I’ll ask myself: Is it tactical or strategic? Meaning, is it something short-term and for shock value but probably won't last -- or is it strategic and long-term? And then, is it reversible or irreversible? Will it cause damage that can’t be reversed with a new administration? Does it pose an irreversible risk to our democracy? We saw President Trump issue a raft of new executive orders and pardons, and it’s the first time that my framework is making contact with reality. There were multiple executive orders of concern, but I took particular note of the pardons issued for those convicted of crimes on January 6, 2021 -- especially as someone who barricaded herself in her office that day and watched bloodied Capitol Police officers defend our Capitol. When he issued those pardons, the President sent a signal that those who commit violence on his behalf -- even assaulting law enforcement officers -- won’t face punishment under the law. That’s a signal that political violence in support of President Trump is acceptable, and potentially pardonable, moving forward. It puts the rule of law, and our democracy, at risk. It’s not about partisan politics, it’s about law and character -- and it’s a signal that can’t be unsent. Thank you for your support as I embark on my third week as Senator, and my first under a new administration. I will continue to put my focus as a leader on helping Michigan wherever possible, and speaking up when our rights or our democracy are under threat. Elissa 👋🏻 Wait, before you click away! 🇺🇸 United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests. What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread. But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator. **Trump’s proposed policy is a direct threat to Virginia's jobs and economy. Virginia has one of the largest populations of federal workers in the country.**

The Virginians who have devoted their lives to the service of our country — including engineers, law enforcement officers, public health officials, military analysts, emergency responders, and more — should not have to worry about their livelihoods being ripped away from them.

**Virginia needs genuine leadership that prioritizes its people — not partisan interests.** That’s why I’m running for Governor – to advocate for fair, transparent policies that keep Virginia’s economy strong and keep our government truly accountable to the people.

But I can’t do it alone. I need your support to continue pushing back against Trump’s reckless agenda. Together, we can safeguard the hardworking Virginians who rely on a fair, effective government to succeed.

clean_body: The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade three years ago... | | | | The Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade three years ago immediately stripped millions of Americans of their fundamental right to choose if or when to have children – and has left millions more scared and outraged. Congressional Republicans have signaled they want to move to outlaw abortion nationwide. A nationwide ban on abortion would override the protections here in New Jersey and endanger the lives of countless women across this country. With a Republican majority in both the House and Senate, and Donald Trump in the White House, it is more important than ever to be staunchly pro-choice and defend reproductive freedom in this country. While we may face many setbacks on the path ahead, I will not rest until we pass a clear, comprehensive law restoring reproductive freedom for everyone, everywhere in this country. I am proudly pro-choice and believe that the right of every person to choose what to do with their own body is an essential human right. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: VoteVets.org
subject: The purge is beginning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Peter,
We’ve walked you through our approach as we head into the next Trump administration. We have to be more disciplined, more focused, and more efficient. We can’t jump on every single crisis Trump manufactures, because that’s part of his strategy — distraction.
VoteVets is going to be working hard to focus your attention on what truly matters, and where we can have a definite impact.
One piece of that is taking shape before our eyes. In advance of taking office, Trump’s National Security Advisor announced sweeping terminations of experienced, apolitical professionals from the National Security Council. It’s a purge of those deemed to be disloyal to MAGA, plain and simple.
Now that Trump occupies the White House, those efforts have expanded. Yesterday, he started by firing Coast Guard Commandant Admiral Linda Fagan. By all accounts an effective and seasoned leader, Trump viewed her as insufficiently loyal — so, she’s out the door.
To be clear, Trump has ultimate authority over these senior leadership positions. He has the power to dismiss officers. But he is not immune to the consequences.
These purges will have direct impacts on morale, on recruitment, and on the retention of qualified and experienced leadership. They will have serious and lasting impacts on National Security. We will all be worse off — and that is why it is so important that we sound off on this.
VoteVets is going to make sure that we extract a political price for every qualified officer Trump forces into retirement. We are going to make this hurt. And make no mistake: **By the end of this, every American is going to know that Trump is making our nation less safe.**
[**Chip in to VoteVets — $5 or anything you can afford. Seriously, any amount at all helps, because every dollar helps us spread the word about the damage Trump is doing to our National Security.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250122-1-120&t=1&akid=34103%2E3013755%2EvUnsYW)**

| | 52 years ago today, _Roe v. Wade_ established a precedent that protected a woman’s right to choose at the federal level. But ever since Donald Trump’s handpicked SCOTUS nominees overturned _Roe_ in June of 2022, our country has been a patchwork of complicated, often conflicting and contradictory state laws, including a strict abortion ban in Kentucky. The end result is a waking nightmare for tens of millions of women nationwide. Trump and Congressional Republicans have made it clear they won’t do anything to protect reproductive freedom, making it even more critical that we never give up this fight. **We need to show the GOP that any further attacks on abortion access will be met with resistance.** [**Will you sign our petition in support of protecting abortion access at the federal level? We want to get 2,000 signatures in the next 48 hours to make it clear to the GOP that when they come for our rights, we won’t go quietly.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100790190/523903753/-1639457631?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQxMDVmMC1kOWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0dPqRDThFHxelEOJIA8v6aa7pLkONBZAwgMkNjuxDk=&emci=dd98279d-dcce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d34105f0-d9d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=19018609) | | | [Protect Reproductive Rights!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100790191/523903758/-1639457631?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQxMDVmMC1kOWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0dPqRDThFHxelEOJIA8v6aa7pLkONBZAwgMkNjuxDk=&emci=dd98279d-dcce-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d34105f0-d9d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=19018609)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Standing with Minnesota, Election Integrity Must Come First
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQy9kBGIy40AggmIQq2TMP7pq-upbQPVShSWcgwlcz3cEN9ImHyBuYEWnxATw)
---

Minnesota’s state House is facing a crisis that strikes at the heart of our democracy.
With Democrats fleeing the Capitol to deny quorum and questions of election integrity looming, Minnesotans deserve answers.
I stand with my fellow Minnesotans who are fighting for transparency and accountability. The recent revelation of missing ballots and the legal battle over a tied House is deeply concerning.
We need Minnesotans, like you, now more than ever to let the radical Left know that we will not tolerate anything less than honesty.
**[Please sign the petition to demand integrity in Minnesota’s elections.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQy9kBGIy40AggmIQq2TMP7pq-upbQPVShSWcgwlcz3cEN9ImHyBuYEWnxATw)**
---
| [ SIGN THE PETITION](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQy9kBGIy40AggmIQq2TMP7pq-upbQPVShSWcgwlcz3cEN9ImHyBuYEWnxATw)
---
The stakes couldn’t be higher. While Democrats walk away from their responsibilities, we’re here, standing firm, ready to protect the values that make Minnesota great.
This isn’t just about one state House seat; it’s about defending the democratic process we all depend on.
Together, we can push for answers, uphold integrity, and ensure Minnesotans get the representation they deserve.
**[Please sign the petition to demand integrity in Minnesota’s elections.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQy9kBGIy40AggmIQq2TMP7pq-upbQPVShSWcgwlcz3cEN9ImHyBuYEWnxATw)**
Thank you,
