name: Shontel Brown
subject: Roe should still be the law of the land
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Today would be the 52nd anniversary of the historic Roe v. Wade decision.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100790259/523903993/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250122Roe_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQxMDVmMC1kOWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSc9nrRFNFDum8u-kqal_lWZ7ykLNnX54XxLWgJR_B0=) Peter,

Today would be the 52nd anniversary of the historic _Roe v. Wade_ decision until it was overturned in 2022, leaving Americans without federal abortion protections. Since then, GOP politicians have worked tirelessly to restrict our rights.

Not long ago, extremists tried to strip away abortion access in Ohio, and voters showed up to enshrine their freedoms in the state constitution. In fact, in nearly every place where abortion was left up to the people, they made their voices clear: **abortion rights are human rights.**

Despite this, Republicans have signaled that this is only the beginning. During debates, Trump **REFUSED** to answer questions on whether or not he would sign a national abortion ban into law, and the GOP draconian playbook – Project 2025 – explicitly calls for the FDA reversal of access to mifepristone.

**We cannot leave this up to chance. With the Republican trifecta in Washington, all reproductive care, from abortion to IVF, is under threat. It’s critical that we work together to protect our rights.**

[**In honor of what should be the 52nd anniversary of Roe v. Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Florida Freedom Fund
subject: Florida’s Border Security Plan Starts NOW — Call Your Legislators Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
Dear friend, A new day is coming to America! On Monday, President Donald Trump returned to the White House, and his priority will be ending the disaster that is Biden’s border policy. This chaos has affected us here in Florida, and we’ve fought back — but it’s time for it to end. **Contact your **_**[REPRESENTATIVE](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=709b1502a489402188db5bac3b23bc86&_e=j_36Ax_CZBcvt_mQZEkOCYc3Nt2hRxs7Ntqc8451x3quWhOA12q8mXAPVOr9or1CueekA9jwbk7eLzSaHtm5tL62kf1LBEnrEw38HzdSPAoCPm4GHKMPEcZ77naWc_03dhxcj1udNT3zu2Vl7X8ZtXskLcMCm7Sjv1LPhfjd0zYKLi8c8t4hWOtuGsBUFaiinUDjb8mo2PUyrGpBe8ffbYElRIg3sjm40wGVDYqu2-ZnryRJUXvzOENxDynX7soX07KaAESpIPde9qTYl6MZqrXePI867fY3Ablw0bFg-aX2oD5qNrO5f-Ed3eJzAAxJ-4gnKz6VihlOYKAvWdNVQPlTdLRDH2VKkU21q3pS0KY43oDr7dQHUYeQzLg01jqW9gAXeri80vQaagvTBjEmf-A0UHE8-2ank8wVOBZbEdKsmxb3OIFepjoiqHOFsB4VZbBaVjzFA6i6OYbF6znI_H7U8RH-6iRICqNIqZ0eSPGUwvzE-VxstMTVYa6jD-85x-n5AGiurGD_Z2n-mOteIektYD-jeHHy9FlUzUFHvZ_YaQk-kaj0JV0vtAdYLVbo5s-dScGNbrCAosFmcms3vz2w4Wsw4CCR0Qs1CmAcQLTlIyN25DcfR0Njqivg0K4w) and [SENATOR](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/u/click?_t=bc9491309104472aae4991b59e968283&_m=709b1502a489402188db5bac3b23bc86&_e=j_36Ax_CZBcvt_mQZEkOCYc3Nt2hRxs7Ntqc8451x3quWhOA12q8mXAPVOr9or1CueekA9jwbk7eLzSaHtm5tL62kf1LBEnrEw38HzdSPAoCPm4GHKMPEcZ77naWc_03dhxcj1udNT3zu2Vl7X8ZtXskLcMCm7Sjv1LPhfjd0zZszAGB4v-fSiVeeGqW6R-qodQy7v2Ehd141bxA0qwWl1jvJLiu4CTclEWhXWmBYIvqkUIfOHpqhQe4aqb5SpSKEUzv8Y40a_OTfEokPsD3SuHltJNDEH4HnSJ1oAkl5_lw8B2WFQ4NWzRkjEDeoPQ0XhGLf3PHLDUnnelWPesGODjY4d5s68cKuCsgSKV2mzFmU_jRxkbN_DM47UYGAoBUnd_KANsV_h-z2or-4CIKBrKvtiobGdNgIjNMnaZ7vtfUVRJ_-zJroYeclEswewDLrUKkRQw9B8Yo0OSaQ_SHiSBs2whqHBM-Frwe5251qGCIEVYbD9JGc0gzQgy83OhlgRhaBh6wuQhpZY9xQQIsbDTt8jcnHtRF3fedL_YZC0X1XtmndeopDSwNqK6o10nSuP4JWe9Gm9OPOPFwXXigLO0RQahAO0_TFz3XNDyrTmM%3D) **_**and urge them to support President Trump and Governor DeSantis’ call for a special session to tackle illegal immigration head-on. The time to act is **_**now**_**, not later.** Governor Ron DeSantis has already proven Florida’s commitment to securing our borders. From strengthening E-Verify to calling out the federal government’s failures, Florida has been at the forefront of the fight against illegal immigration. As we prepare to work alongside President Trump to tackle the crisis head-on, we need **a Special Session of the Florida Legislature**. Governor DeSantis is calling for immediate action to implement vital proposals like:
* **Maximizing participation** in the 287(g) deportation program to remove dangerous illegal aliens
* Creating new **state crimes** for entering the U.S. illegally
* Expanding penalties for **voter fraud** and strengthening our identity verification systems
* Repealing **in-state tuition** for illegal immigrants

This is Florida’s moment to lead the nation — but we can’t do it without your help. It’s crucial that we have a legislature that is ready to act quickly. **_Call your legislators today and demand that they support Governor DeSantis’ call for a Special Session to address illegal immigration_. **Florida has always led, and with your voice, we’ll continue to lead the fight for American workers and families. Thank you for taking action!

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Right now
body:
---
Derek, Hours after being sworn in, Donald Trump began signing disastrous executive order after disastrous executive order. Here are just a few of the actions he’s taken so far:
* Attempted to end birthright citizenship, which is in the Constitution.
* Pardoned nearly all of the rioters charged with storming the Capitol on January 6 — including those who committed acts of violence.
* Rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid.
* Withdrawn the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement, a deal instrumental to combating climate change.

But we won’t give up. Right now, it’s critical that we build the long-term infrastructure to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. [**To do that, we’ll need your help. So we’re asking: Can you pitch in $3 to the DNC’s new 100-Day Fight Fund? clean_body: Derek, Hours after being sworn in, Donald Trump began signing disastrous executive order after disastrous executive order. Here are just a few of the actions he’s taken so far: Attempted to end birthright citizenship, which is in the Constitution. Pardoned nearly all of the rioters charged with storming the Capitol on January 6 — including those who committed acts of violence. Rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid. Withdrawn the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement, a deal instrumental to combating climate change. But we won’t give up. Right now, it’s critical that we build the long-term infrastructure to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for everything, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

subject: Official Focus Group for Your Area

body:
Does your area support Trump’s nominees?

Friend,

The Senate is now deep into confirmation hearings, and Democrats are only escalating their attacks against President Trump's nominees.

_**[They believe they're about to _BLOCK_ several of these America First patriots from assuming cabinet positions!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8be924e03f74af3b104437476afb7b9&_e=BvFkl9b5bsNXBATgwSKOuqsKrQH8R2x4-I_yGRrIX3HY0E964VkxIPhHij0H7MYzLDEuxkJXYd1IZEunXtw3abNdr84maRdodyObZc7sRyrQpIV3p54PvJzVxtkF4il_Fh9cFXjqoXyHEzh1bqjUPx_z6j8CAjX3PvQxOPGukL-Ajkjy9D2XiwWM_1HXoCd-i1WADdLjowrSbeyAR3aqUrKgm2DI_fp7tr5pofyvdx3FSe7iti09h1_877Zuo6XhOJ10Xhrg0BylHQo9e1lkB6uCkoLomEX99XNw9YGIfT-JI57oL5_6XYx58zdnG3H2DvOKaC1EVF5iZMpwESjAdrnDwtMqGWeYrGfmzDN06OXflsn1ajrc8Wh6kYyHby038yUQMecEx5yQ_b6WW2Foz88iYA8Ujkm4Nh15KZDHtGpUiyTgpcGOxGc1bFAj0InVHryPKwogGZJdAF6NEyWHLeXDbqlsmu0uBUC7ceEZGeM%3D)**_

name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Survey: Trump's voting access executive order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012225_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: On his first day in office, President Donald Trump rescinded former President Joe Biden’s 2021 executive order promoting voting access and expanding voter registration.
Biden’s order expanded access to voting and accurate election information in many ways, such as allowing federal agencies to share data with states that seek to establish automatic voter registration efforts and making federal workers and resources available to assist at polling locations. Now Trump has taken that away.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this order. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you agree with rescinding this order that helped promote voter access and expand registration?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=012225_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=012225_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012225_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012225_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012225_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012225_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? Have you read the book, "Who Moved My Cheese?" Strategic book. I read it when I was fresh out of college. It's a small book...I can still remember picking it up at Barnes & Noble, walking over to the coffee shop in the bookstore and reading it all over one cup of coffee within about an hour or so (yes, I still paid for it, and I have it on my shelf to this day).
In short, the book lays out the business strategy of moving wherever the cheese is. Don't cling to your old ways of thinking and doing when the cheese/prize has clearly moved on. Be flexible. Reinvent. Reimagine. Better yet, be the first mouse to move and reap the majority of the spoils.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/042d23a1-76da-4474-82a2-e6db7c009e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This is exactly what came flooding back to my mind when I saw [Mark Zuckerberg ](https://substack.com/redirect/042d23a1-76da-4474-82a2-e6db7c009e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)doing his song dance routine from podcast to podcast, sporting a gold chain, an oversize baggy black t-shirt, with curly-carefree hair. The only thing he was missing was a gold tooth to make the ensemble complete. Who knew? Zuckerberg was MAGA all along. He was just a billionaire-prisoner like the rest of us - minus the billions. He was, essentially, silenced by big-tech just like the rest of us - except we don't own the big-tech company that silenced millions of Americans and donated over $500M dollars to "secure" our 2020 elections.
Mark is not repentant. Mark is a rat with the good sense to move with the cheese. Biden's out. Trump's in and that means something.
[Listen](https://substack.com/redirect/042d23a1-76da-4474-82a2-e6db7c009e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to my show, _[The Kathy Barnette Show](https://substack.com/redirect/042d23a1-76da-4474-82a2-e6db7c009e9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , on the #1 talk radio station in Philadelphia, covering most of the mid-Atlantic states, including PA, NJ, MD and DE.
[Advertise With Me](https://substack.com/redirect/3b3dee1e-5d02-4f42-a508-1e9d58702632?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP
subject: RNC winter meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
They expect us to take the fight directly to the Democrats and let the voters know who is responsible for the problems their policies created. | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=57a3fa70ab&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Fellow Republicans,

I just got back to the office from the RNC winter meeting and wanted to write this letter to you right away.

Since Washington State is still considered deep blue on the Presidential map, I thought that the RNC wouldn't have paid attention to the inroads we made with voters in 2024 - **like how our statewide candidates put up their best performances in years for their respective races; and how our party flipped the Chinese International District in the heart of Seattle to be the best performing Trump district in King County.**

They told me something that I was surprised by... that they have been closely following our voter data in the most recent election cycles and they agree that even though Washington State didn't go fully red on the Presidential map, they know we can flip key Congressional Districts in 2026 to help expand our House majority in D.C. **We can help stop the Democrats from derailing the President's agenda that is helping so many millions of Americans.**

They laid out the path to victory, a similar path that the California Republican Party used to accomplish success in recent elections. They confirmed for me that even though we did not go red for the President, we can make sure Republicans maintain control in D.C.

**The challenge ahead of us now is the same that every other blue state had before they succeeded** \- we need to start earlier than the Democrats and we need to stay aggressive for the next 2 years.

name: Nancy Northup
subject: Roe was not the end of our story
body:
On this anniversary, we are ready to defend | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100793128/523913174/2141984067?sourceid=1150327&utm_campaign=25emrge-0109aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUzZWI5NC1kZWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MVeueCfiYOUosYBku8Wlgl4ZyiO3axWZjZVj6ni67A=&emci=664d8dfd-38d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=1e53eb94-ded8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100793129/523913176/2141984067?sourceid=1150327&utm_campaign=25emrge-0109aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTUzZWI5NC1kZWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MVeueCfiYOUosYBku8Wlgl4ZyiO3axWZjZVj6ni67A=&emci=664d8dfd-38d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=1e53eb94-ded8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

This is a heavy week, but our resolve remains strong.

On Monday, long-time reproductive rights activist and former president of Planned Parenthood Federation of America Cecile Richards passed away. Cecile was an indefatigable force in the movement. She didn't just believe in the power of a life in public service. _She embraced it proudly and fearlessly._

Losing her on Day 1 of a new U.S. administration that threatens the reproductive health and freedoms she spent her life defending is a pointed reminder that **we must carry on the fight, no matter what.**

Today, we mark 52 years since _Roe v. Wade_ was decided: the landmark U.S. Supreme Court decision recognized the right to abortion in the U.S. and protected our constitutional right to make decisions about our own bodies. In the years since, that right has faced relentless attacks, and _Roe_ was ultimately overturned by the U.S. Supreme Court in 2022, pushing the U.S. into the shameful position of being **one of just four nations to ROLL BACK protections** for abortion rights over the last 30 years.

The reversal of _Roe_ was devastating—but it is not the end of our story.

Now thanks to dedicated supporters like you fueling the fight against the Trump administration's extremist anti-rights agenda, **it's our turn.**

With you by our side, we are doing the work to protect and advance reproductive rights—today and for the long haul—step by step, proudly and fiercely.

**Together, we will move forward.**

Onward,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

subject: 52 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. Peter,

On this day 52 years ago, the United States Supreme Court issued a landmark ruling in Roe v. Wade that, for half a century, guaranteed a woman’s right to an abortion.

In June of 2022, that all changed . The Supreme Court defied years of precedent and overturned Roe , against the will of medical professionals, civil rights advocates, and most importantly — the American people.

Everyday since, we’ve witnessed unabashed attacks on a woman’s fundamental right to bodily autonomy across the country. It’s clear what happens next: Until we pass a federal law protecting a woman’s right to choose, these horrific policies aren’t going anywhere .

And that’s exactly what I’m fighting for in Congress. Will you chip in $, $, or even $1 to my campaign today to safeguard abortion rights and make some real change in Washington? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25?amount=]

DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25]

- George

But now, with Trump **BACK** , justice is finally here.

January 6 wasn't just a date--it was the day Democrats declared war on Patriots like **YOU** and me.

I'm Brandon Straka, founder of the #WalkAway Movement. **I stood up for America,** and they came after me with false charges like "impeding law enforcement" and "trespassing."

Their goal? To **SILENCE** and **DESTROY** anyone brave enough to speak out against their radical agenda.

They thought they could **RUIN** my life. They **BULLIED** me, stripped me of my rights, and tried to erase my voice.

But **TRUMP IS BACK** --_and he 's NOT MESSING AROUND._

**President Trump just issued me a _FULL PARDON_.**

This isn't just a **GREAT** victory for me--it's a victory for **EVERY** Patriot who has been persecuted by the Radical Left.

It's proof that **JUSTICE** is possible and that Trump is the **ONLY** leader willing to fight for **YOU**.

_That future starts**NOW**. But only if we keep fighting._

The Radical Left will stop at **NOTHING** to silence Patriots like me. But together, we can send a message they can't ignore.

Let's show them we're **STILL** here, we're **STILL** fighting, and we will **NEVER** back down.

body:
Does your area support Trump’s nominees?

Friend,

The Senate is now deep into confirmation hearings, and Democrats are only escalating their attacks against President Trump's nominees.

_**[They believe they're about to _BLOCK_ several of these America First patriots from assuming cabinet positions!](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkc-O4ywQxJ8G34icBsP44MPos3L5NKvVXvaIOrjjoMGA-JO8_orJzn1viKKK_lX__jAf6LwL-w88aPm02eRiQi7WFAr8Tpj5LdpWDIww8fHMAYwYtmWbrUI10HLWQk9qVnoc7sus5SRIa1CoZ3kDNd_UBlLTPF0VShzc0nPGM8BZST3JE6C92TcxyTcScAXJ5Iiecj19EiUbw56plEypXb2zGE42HoNf7rWmwsQ7gwuDSyHbMp2eLmTa-gsGl47A4GLx6gJVjinl-EDPU_SePwQnnrC7xaXVwxy0uXYwsdKBzjNQ_bLEli0xsUY4XpV0y5dULRPr___9Av6N81eweCR0e2Bi_VZMQJOfvcXS9hxbegB_nM3P91fma9CXOYZKoTKx3lrYMrriws5A5c6X-1msNTdioPCoKRZXXexfySEvW3o6711Rmslx7xhfXdV_3uljgT8BAAD__yfKrHQ)**_

We delivered historic victories in this past election, but if we’re to turn this country around, we’ll need even BIGGER wins in the future. | | | | We have already seen what the Radical Left’s agenda has done to our country, and we need to be prepared with an army of new Republican voters who are ready to reject them when they try to take back power. — New Jersey Republicans | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2025 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. name: Josh Weil
subject: Giant MAGA attack on my district - good sign??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100794035/523916019/-491556796?refcode=250122_Serve_Weil_GiantMAGAads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU0YTVjNy1lMGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHsnG73hiZoJ50OLIFWHc4nJHhm6AGQG4d-_HTKmkvE=)

Friends, As you know, I am the Democrat running in the FL-06 Special Election which is set to take place on April 1st. Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters. Florida’s Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooting in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine. In recent days, the _**full frontal MAGA assault on my district**_ entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100794036/523916020/-423390815?refcode=250122_Serve_Weil_GiantMAGAads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU0YTVjNy1lMGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHsnG73hiZoJ50OLIFWHc4nJHhm6AGQG4d-_HTKmkvE=) _The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday._ These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because _**no one**_ in this district __**knows him**__. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida. If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn’t feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us _**but only if we can keep up with their spends**_ in the _few weeks_ left until E-Day. So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised $500,000 since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster. **If just 1 out of every 20 people we send this email to donate $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up.[Can you help us keep up with the dark money pro-MAGA PACs flooding into this race by making a donation of $5 or more split with Serve America and me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100794037/523916021/-423390815?refcode=250122_Serve_Weil_GiantMAGAads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU0YTVjNy1lMGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHsnG73hiZoJ50OLIFWHc4nJHhm6AGQG4d-_HTKmkvE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100794038/523916022/-2031701896?refcode=250122_Serve_Weil_GiantMAGAads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU0YTVjNy1lMGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHsnG73hiZoJ50OLIFWHc4nJHhm6AGQG4d-_HTKmkvE=) That MAGA needs to flood the airwaves so early on in this race is a good sign for us - with your support we’ll soon be flooding the airwaves with ads of our own. Thank you in advance for your support. Josh Weil
Democrat for Florida’s 6th [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100794039/523916023/-423390815?refcode=250122_Serve_Weil_GiantMAGAads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU0YTVjNy1lMGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHsnG73hiZoJ50OLIFWHc4nJHhm6AGQG4d-_HTKmkvE=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100794040/523916024/-2031701896?refcode=250122_Serve_Weil_GiantMAGAads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGU0YTVjNy1lMGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHsnG73hiZoJ50OLIFWHc4nJHhm6AGQG4d-_HTKmkvE=)

name: Trump Victory AR15
subject: “Morning in America” Again: Celebrate With the Victory AR-15
body:
The sun rises on a new era...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621)
---
| | |

_January 22nd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
The sun rises on a new era... Like Reagan before him, President Trump stood in the Capitol Rotunda yesterday... And just like that historic morning in 1981, hope has returned to America. The storm clouds have parted. The darkness is lifting. And once again... it's **Morning in America.** Yesterday, our 45th President became our 47th President. The first President since Reagan to reclaim the White House and restore American greatness. To commemorate this historic "Second Morning in America" moment... Patriots across the country are claiming something special: **The**** __**[**_MAGA Victory AR-15_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621)

[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621)
---
[**Click here to see it now >>**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621) Each rifle tells the story of Trump's triumphant return: **✓ Custom "45/47th President" laser-engraved artwork**! **✓ American Flag Victory-themed Cerakote with Presidential seal**! **✓ Built to presidential-level standards!** Like Reagan's morning... this rifle represents more than just metal and machinery. It represents the restoration of American strength, pride, and excellence. Every detail of the [ _MAGA Victory AR-15_](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621) has been crafted to presidential standards: **✓ Full-auto-tested reliability** (you get a LIFETIME WARRANTY!) **✓ Proof-tested for “sniper rifle” accuracy** (You get a Sub-MOA precision guarantee!) **✓ Hand-built by master gunsmiths** in Alabama (made in the USA baby!) **Plus****:** You get a **FREE 2-Day LIVE Rifle Tactical Training Course**($1,500 value) and 5 MORE free bonuses! Celebrate This New Morning in America: **> > **[**Reserve Your MAGA Victory AR-15 Now****!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621) **WARNING****:** Don’t get pushed to the back of the line. Extended wait times apply the longer you wait to reserve your hand-built, one-of-one, collector’s rifle because only 20 rifles go into production at any one time.
Thank You.

P.S. When your grandchildren ask about the morning America came back... make sure you can show them [**THIS**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19959/6374453/7cf270a6d7cac1b597a2c153a3efdc86c04a1978/d5f25b690bf775a0a00e97bd54ae34cc23110621) ← Check availability while you still can.

Look, Peter: Maine’s second district re-elected me because they know I am someone who will work across the aisle and put working families first.

|
#
---
Hey Peter, Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the landmark decision _Roe v. Wade_ – a Supreme Court decision that said the right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom is protected by the Constitution. And we know the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ are no longer. While reproductive rights and abortion care are safe and protected here in Oregon, anti-choice extremists nationwide have used the _Dobbs_ decision that overturned Roe to send us back to the dark ages on reproductive rights. The Supreme Court’s _Dobbs_ decision shook the foundation of reproductive freedoms we took for granted. Since then, the country has faced wave after wave of attacks from every corner — activist groups, conservative judges, state legislatures – you name it. Over 20 states, including our neighbors in Idaho, have imposed harsh restrictions or outright bans on abortion. For so many folks in Idaho, the closest they can get to safe reproductive health care is by coming to Oregon. That's one reason I'm proud of Oregon’s strong stance on protecting reproductive rights. But we have to fight on. The _Dobbs_ decision reminds us that no right is untouchable with the current Supreme Court. That’s why I've teamed up with 20 governors across the country to be part of the Reproductive Freedom Alliance. Together, we’re a nonpartisan coalition working to safeguard and advance reproductive freedom. We governors represent over 170 million Americans, and we’re fighting to ensure their rights are protected. Here in Oregon, we aren’t backing down. When there were moves to threaten access to mifepristone, I secured a three-year supply to ensure continuous availability of this medication abortion. We've put in place protections for every provider who prescribes it and for every person who comes from out of state seeking care. We’re holding the line. [_**With today marking the anniversary of the landmark Roe decision over 50 years ago, it’s crucial to renew our fighting spirit. name: Rick Larsen
subject: 52 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
This should not be political whatsoever, and a strong majority of the American people agree.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100796031/523923042/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjEzN2RkYS1lM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RlzSDhxOJoQKVg-xHJR3W8hlmgcE-Ai7Du-NimZ7N0=&emci=afd84f07-30d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=5f137dda-e3d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the historic Supreme Court decision in _Roe v. Wade._ In 1973, the Supreme Court established the legal right to abortion. This decision marked a crucial moment in the fight for reproductive rights, recognizing autonomy over our own bodies and safeguarding the right to make family planning decisions. For decades, _Roe v. Wade_ has been a symbol of progress and a cornerstone of reproductive freedom. However, the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health_ decision in 2022 has posed a significant challenge to the principles established by _Roe v. Wade_. This decision allows states to impose restrictive abortion laws, and undermines the foundation of reproductive rights. This catastrophic decision jeopardizes access to safe and legal abortion services. Since then, in communities across the country citizens have been living with the devastating and deadly consequences of this ruling. In the years since the _Dobbs_ decision, there has been an escalation in attacks on reproductive freedom, including a forced vote in the House by the radical right-wing majority attempting to limit abortion care. I want today's anniversary to serve as a reminder to stay true to our commitments to reproductive freedom. My commitment to you is that I will remain a steadfast advocate for reproductive freedom in Northwest Washington and in the halls of Congress. **I will protect your ability to make decisions about your body — and to keep the politicians, judges, and radical extremists out of it.** Abortions are deeply personal medical decisions that should be between someone who is pregnant and their doctor. Abortion is health care, and people have the right to make their own decisions without government interference. This should not be political whatsoever, and a strong majority of the American people agree. As long as I have the privilege of serving the people of Northwest Washington in Congress, I will stand for the right to safe and legal abortions. More soon. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: This should not be political whatsoever, and a strong majority of the American people agree. | | | | Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the historic Supreme Court decision in Roe v. Wade. In 1973, the Supreme Court established the legal right to abortion. This decision marked a crucial moment in the fight for reproductive rights, recognizing autonomy over our own bodies and safeguarding the right to make family planning decisions. For decades, Roe v. Wade has been a symbol of progress and a cornerstone of reproductive freedom. However, the Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health decision in 2022 has posed a significant challenge to the principles established by Roe v. Wade. This decision allows states to impose restrictive abortion laws, and undermines the foundation of reproductive rights. This catastrophic decision jeopardizes access to safe and legal abortion services. Since then, in communities across the country citizens have been living with the devastating and deadly consequences of this ruling. In the years since the Dobbs decision, there has been an escalation in attacks on reproductive freedom, including a forced vote in the House by the radical right-wing majority attempting to limit abortion care. I want today's anniversary to serve as a reminder to stay true to our commitments to reproductive freedom. My commitment to you is that I will remain a steadfast advocate for reproductive freedom in Northwest Washington and in the halls of Congress. I will protect your ability to make decisions about your body — and to keep the politicians, judges, and radical extremists out of it. Abortions are deeply personal medical decisions that should be between someone who is pregnant and their doctor. Abortion is health care, and people have the right to make their own decisions without government interference. This should not be political whatsoever, and a strong majority of the American people agree. As long as I have the privilege of serving the people of Northwest Washington in Congress, I will stand for the right to safe and legal abortions. More soon. There's no question that national Republicans have embraced this brand of division and hatred for political gain.
Let’s get one thing clear: Californians pay **$83 billion** more in federal taxes than we get back. Those dollars have gone to communities across our borders that are in need after experiencing disaster.
**In our time of need, we’re simply asking for the help we deserve.**
Wildfire victims deserve an America that is United when it counts, like now. I’ll do everything in my power to help bring resources into Los Angeles so that they and our communities can recover.
Thank you,
Laura

# [Georgia RINOs Buckle Under Pressure](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=155442793&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NDQyNzkzLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc1NjY0ODQsImV4cCI6MTc0MDE1ODQ4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TWYviBDJRNrc_5oml_4dTxTWz-cmmpvWxuVqJpFsLkI)
### PLUS: State Freedom Caucus Members Celebrate Trump's Inauguration
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
| Jan 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=155442793&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NDQyNzkzLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc1NjY0ODQsImV4cCI6MTc0MDE1ODQ4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TWYviBDJRNrc_5oml_4dTxTWz-cmmpvWxuVqJpFsLkI)
---
| | [](https://substack..K6t3fFzImBOeyZHURTlchZZPtfN7UP97Fvm4LW-fIhY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/georgia-rinos-buckle-under-pressure?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
We wrote to you last week about how **Georgia Freedom Caucus** Vice-Chair and State Senator Colton Moore was wrongfully arrested for trying to fulfill his constitutional duty of attending the governor's "State of the State" address.
The corrupt speaker, State Rep. Jon Burns, had previously banned Colton from the House chamber because Colton suggested that Georgia shouldn't name a public building after a similarly corrupt former speaker, David Ralston.
Following Colton's arrest, the Georgia Freedom Caucus naturally defended him. But so did the State GOP Chairman and the State Democrat Party Chair. As did the state's lieutenant governor. House Freedom Caucus members Chip Roy and Clay Higgins also publicly supported Colton. Here's a great tweet from Higgins:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eb1a8108-319b-48fd-b7c1-2ca2b5c449d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the end, the public pressure against Speaker Jon Burns was so great that he was forced to reverse Colton's ban. That's not the end of the story though. The Atlanta Swamp can't unring the bell of wrongfully arresting him, or the Speaker's attorney assaulting Colton by pushing him to the ground. We'll update you as the news unfolds.
**MASSIVE WIN IN ARIZONA**
Last year, **Arizona Freedom Caucus** member Justin Heap took the bold leap to run for Maricopa County Record - the office that is in charge of all elections and voter registration in the county.
Heap defeated the liberal Republican incumbent in the primary and successfully defeated the Democrat in the general. We mention this because Justin wasted no time in getting to work to clean up the county's horrible election regime. Just yesterday, he removed over 242,000 inactive voters from the voter rolls. Below is his statement, and as he clearly announces, more conservative reforms are still to come!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b68593c-0a81-46ee-ae6f-8e01b7a90014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**WYOMING HOUSE BANS NON-CITIZENS FROM VOTING**
Sponsored by **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** member Rep. John Bear, HB 157 passed the Wyoming House yesterday by a recorded vote of 53-6. The bill would require proof of citizenship before a person can vote in the state. This was one of the WYFC's top priorities and it passed swiftly through the House in just the first few days of session! The Wyoming Freedom Caucus's other top priorities include much-needed property tax reform, banning woke ESG and DEI mandates, ending sanctuary cities, and much more.
**INAUGURATION NIGHT IN WASHINGTON**
Several State Freedom Caucus members traveled to Washington to be part of President Trump's inauguration festivities. I caught up with a handful of them at the Liberty Ball. It was a joyous night of friendship, freedom, and celebration!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e06ebd1-127d-4e16-b437-a7fe9be31162?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

**Keep fighting,**

_Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/3f1a2671-5fac-40a8-b4af-371aaf44e0f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

clean_body: PLUS: State Freedom Caucus Members Celebrate Trump's Inauguration | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? PLUS: State Freedom Caucus Members Celebrate Trump's Inauguration | | | Jan 22 | | | | | | | | Friends, We wrote to you last week about how Georgia Freedom Caucus Vice-Chair and State Senator Colton Moore was wrongfully arrested for trying to fulfill his constitutional duty of attending the governor's "State of the State" address. The corrupt speaker, State Rep. Jon Burns, had previously banned Colton from the House chamber because Colton suggested that Georgia shouldn't name a public building after a similarly corrupt former speaker, David Ralston. Following Colton's arrest, the Georgia Freedom Caucus naturally defended him. But so did the State GOP Chairman and the State Democrat Party Chair. As did the state's lieutenant governor. House Freedom Caucus members Chip Roy and Clay Higgins also publicly supported Colton. Here's a great tweet from Higgins: | | ---|---|--- In the end, the public pressure against Speaker Jon Burns was so great that he was forced to reverse Colton's ban. That's not the end of the story though. The Atlanta Swamp can't unring the bell of wrongfully arresting him, or the Speaker's attorney assaulting Colton by pushing him to the ground. We'll update you as the news unfolds. MASSIVE WIN IN ARIZONA Last year, Arizona Freedom Caucus member Justin Heap took the bold leap to run for Maricopa County Record - the office that is in charge of all elections and voter registration in the county. Heap defeated the liberal Republican incumbent in the primary and successfully defeated the Democrat in the general. We mention this because Justin wasted no time in getting to work to clean up the county's horrible election regime. Just yesterday, he removed over 242,000 inactive voters from the voter rolls. Below is his statement, and as he clearly announces, more conservative reforms are still to come! | | ---|---|--- WYOMING HOUSE BANS NON-CITIZENS FROM VOTING Sponsored by Wyoming Freedom Caucus member Rep. John Bear, HB 157 passed the Wyoming House yesterday by a recorded vote of 53-6. The bill would require proof of citizenship before a person can vote in the state. This was one of the WYFC's top priorities and it passed swiftly through the House in just the first few days of session! The Wyoming Freedom Caucus's other top priorities include much-needed property tax reform, banning woke ESG and DEI mandates, ending sanctuary cities, and much more. INAUGURATION NIGHT IN WASHINGTON Several State Freedom Caucus members traveled to Washington to be part of President Trump's inauguration festivities. I caught up with a handful of them at the Liberty Ball. It was a joyous night of friendship, freedom, and celebration! | | ---|---|--- Keep fighting, Andrew Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | (C) 2025 State Freedom Caucus Network 300 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003 ? ?

body:
It’s Blake Gendebien, the dairy farmer Democrat running to replace Elise Stefanik in NY-21.

Can I introduce myself?
It’s Blake Gendebien, the dairy farmer Democrat running to replace Elise Stefanik in NY-21. I just launched my campaign last month, and I’ve been overwhelmed by the SURGE of support for our campaign to flip New York’s North Country blue!
**[Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us keep up this momentum?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85435?refcode=em20250122-8730&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8730%2E614464%2ES7cZ1O)**

This community, these people, this land—it’s my life. But Elise Stefanik just saw us as a way to advance her own political career.
While she catered to her wealthy corporate donors and worked to go viral on social media, it was the hardworking families here in the North Country who paid the price of her inaction.
A lot of folks clearly agree that we can’t afford another Stefanik in Congress. But we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us.
As a farmer, I’m used to rolling up my sleeves and working hard to get the job done. And with your support, I have no doubt that we’ll be able to flip NY-21 blue.
**[So, Peter, can you split $10 or whatever you can afford between me and Heartland Patriots today to help us reach our weekly fundraising goal?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85435?refcode=em20250122-8730&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8730%2E614464%2ES7cZ1O)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/22/2025
body:
Gov. Polis should focus on being governor for all, not just for Front Range special interests
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey everyone,
Here is a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...**[Senate Bill 3](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) represents the latest effort by Colorado Democrats to prohibit the production, sale, and purchase of specific semiautomatic firearms in the state. The legislation focuses on semiautomatic rifles and shotguns equipped to use detachable ammunition magazines, along with certain semiautomatic pistols that also accept detachable magazines.
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Cody Davis, the [new chair of the Mesa County Board of Commissioners](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), pledges to prioritize community engagement and uphold the rule of law, emphasizing transparency in governance. Lawmakers criticize CPW's lack of transparency in wolf reintroduction efforts, accusing Governor Polis of [sidelining Western Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in policy decisions. Lastly, here's how Colorado lawmakers [reacted to inauguration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) of President Donald Trump.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** President Trump marked his second term with sweeping actions, including [rescinding 78 of Biden’s executive orders](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and granting [clemency to January 6th defendants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). His administration announced initiatives on [energy independence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and [AI infrastructure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Elon Musk has also announced the [inaugural task of the D.O.G.E.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Meanwhile, Attorney General Phil Weiser has joined a coalition of states [suing to block Trump’s executive order](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ending birthright citizenship, citing constitutional violations under the 14th Amendment.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, January 22, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Browning: Gov. Polis should focus on being governor for all, not just for Front Range special interests](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LINDY BROWNING, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado Parks and Wildlife senior staff in Denver told the joint Senate and House Agriculture and Natural Resource Committee that their lack of transparency and secrecy is because of their local field staff having been threatened, followed and harassed as they perform the 2025 wolf reintroduction operations.
Elected officials from both sides of the political aisle aren’t buying it.
It became more than clear at the meeting between CPW senior staff and legislators, held Jan. 15, that not only is CPW senior staff keeping the public on the Western Slope in the dark, but also elected officials.
All of the elected Senate and House members criticized the senior staff for their lack of transparency, not only with the public, but with them, too. When House District 57 Democrat Elizabeth Velasco told Dan Gibbs, director of the Colorado Department of Natural Resources, and Reid Dewalt, deputy director of CPW that “the lack of transparency was becoming more of an issue than the wolves themselves,” she wasn’t alone in thinking that, and she wasn’t wrong.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Cody Davis, the new Mesa Co. Commission chair, prioritizes listening, engaging with community](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* In today's spotlight of a local elected official, Cody Davis, the new Mesa County Commission chair, emphasizes listening to the community and fostering collaboration. His approach involves connecting people to resources and ensuring policies are informed by those directly affected.
* Davis identifies budget challenges and road infrastructure as top issues for Mesa County, highlighting the constraints of TABOR and the need for creative solutions to maintain road quality amidst rising costs.
* Reflecting on past decisions, Davis underscores the importance of engaging with all stakeholders to avoid unintended consequences, as illustrated by his handling of truck traffic concerns on 16 Road.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Which guns would be banned by Colorado’s SB3 related to semiauto firearms?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado's Senate Bill 3 aims to prohibit the manufacture, sale, and purchase of semiautomatic rifles, shotguns, and pistols capable of accepting detachable magazines. This includes popular models like AR-15s and AK-47s, with exceptions for firearms that are manually operated or have permanently fixed magazines.
* Law enforcement, military, and inoperable weapons are exempt from the bill, which would also ban rapid-fire trigger devices. Existing firearms owned before the law's implementation would not be affected, but their resale within the state would be restricted.
* Violations could lead to Class 2 misdemeanors or Class 6 felonies, depending on the offense, with penalties ranging from fines to imprisonment. Businesses selling non-compliant firearms could face license revocation and additional restrictions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado AG Weiser joins suit against Trump over birthright citizenship order](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser joined 22 Democratic-led states and two cities in suing to block President Trump's executive order restricting birthright citizenship, arguing it violates the 14th Amendment.
* The lawsuits claim that the executive order contradicts the Citizenship Clause of the Constitution, which guarantees citizenship to anyone born in the U.S. and subject to its jurisdiction.
* The order, part of Trump’s day-one executive actions, aims to limit citizenship for children of undocumented immigrants and certain visa holders.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Trump lays out Coloradan Chris Wright’s focus, to unleash ‘liquid gold’ at home and abroad](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President Trump has announced a major push to expand U.S. energy production, including oil, gas, and liquefied natural gas exports, while reducing regulatory barriers. His administration plans to prioritize domestic energy independence and decrease consumer energy costs.
* Chris Wright, a Denver businessman and founder of Liberty Energy, has been appointed as Energy Secretary. Wright aims to accelerate energy project completions, leverage national lab innovations, and boost U.S. energy on a global scale.
* Trump has renewed his pledge to withdraw the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement, emphasizing the importance of utilizing domestic energy resources and opposing Biden-era environmental policies, including electric vehicle mandates and drilling restrictions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Coloradans from the plains to the Western Slope celebrated President Trump’s inauguration in D.C.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | JANUARY 20** _A sharp winter chill permeating the Capital City failed to deter Coloradans from gathering Monday in Washington, D.C., to witness history in the making._ __
**[Read the full inaugural address by President Donald J. Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITOR****| NATIONAL | JANUARY 20** _Following is the inaugural address by President Donald J. Trump, the 47th President of the United States, in its entirety, as provided by the White House._ __
**[Wright among five Western state citizens nominated to top admin spots in order Monday](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER****| NATIONAL | JANUARY 20** _In an order to the U.S. Senate, among President Trump’s first actions Monday upon taking office as the 47th President was a listing of his nominees to top positions in the Administration._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** The concept of the first "100 days" is thought to originate from France, where "Cent Jours" (Hundred Days) refers to the period in 1815 between Napoleon Bonaparte's return to Paris from exile on Elba and his ultimate defeat at the Battle of Waterloo, which led to King Louis XVIII reclaiming the French throne.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “The bad news is time flies. The good news is you’re the pilot.” — Michael Altshuler
|

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=44%2E181023%2EI-CLCz)
**Today, Jocelyn Benson announced her candidacy for Governor of Michigan.**
There’s so much at stake in this race. Now, it’s up to us to make sure Jocelyn can fight for all communities in Michigan as our next Governor.
If we can start this campaign with a surge of grassroots support from folks like you, it will show our momentum — but all eyes are on what we can accomplish today, and we can’t fall short.
[**Now is your chance to make a donation and become a founding member of this campaign. Will you chip in $5 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-3?amount=5&refcode=em20250122-3&refcode2=44_181023_I-CLCz&akid=44%2E181023%2EI-CLCz)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-3?amount=5&refcode=em20250122-3&refcode2=44_181023_I-CLCz&akid=44%2E181023%2EI-CLCz)**
Jocelyn is running because we need a strong leader to bring our state to the next chapter. She’s building a people-powered campaign that leaves no one behind.
The only way we can move forward is by working together and listening to our community’s concerns. Together we can ensure Michigan continues to be the state where every voice is heard. That starts with meeting people where they are.
To do that, we’ll need resources. What we raise on the first day of the campaign will set the tone for the rest of the race, and we want to start off as strong as possible.
[**We want to get as many supporters on board as we can. Can you help? Add a contribution today to help us start this grassroots campaign on a powerful note.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-3?amount=5&refcode=em20250122-3&refcode2=44_181023_I-CLCz&akid=44%2E181023%2EI-CLCz)

Finance Team, Benson for Governor

name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help Me Save My Son
body:
I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---

That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? clean_body: I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

body:
|
#
Hi there — 52 years ago today, the Supreme Court affirmed a woman’s constitutional right to access safe and legal abortion in their landmark ruling of Roe v. Wade. And after decades of lobbying and far-right activism, the Supreme Court overturned it in 2022. In a single moment, the Court overturned 50 years of precedent, stripping away American women’s freedom to make their own decisions about abortion. Why? Because the Supreme Court, Donald Trump, Senate Republicans, and radical Republican state legislators and judges across the country believe that they should have power over women — that they know better than women and their doctors. Republicans’ crusade against women’s reproductive freedoms continues. The far-right’s Project 2025 agenda made revoking access to medication abortion a cornerstone of their policy plan — and now that Donald Trump is in the White House, we could see their plans come to fruition. **That’s why I’m prioritizing abortion rights — including the repeal of the _Comstock Act_ , an outdated law that the right wing is attempting to use to ban medication abortion _nationwide_. ** We have to fight with all the power and energy we have to make sure women have reproductive freedoms. We need to restore abortion access in states where there are drastic bans, and we need to expand access and affordability to women and families nationwide. [**I’m writing to ask you to join me, folks. Will you make an urgent donation to help support my organizing efforts to defend abortion rights nationwide? clean_body: | Hi there — 52 years ago today, the Supreme Court affirmed a woman’s constitutional right to access safe and legal abortion in their landmark ruling of Roe v. Wade. And after decades of lobbying and far-right activism, the Supreme Court overturned it in 2022. In a single moment, the Court overturned 50 years of precedent, stripping away American women’s freedom to make their own decisions about abortion. Why? Because the Supreme Court, Donald Trump, Senate Republicans, and radical Republican state legislators and judges across the country believe that they should have power over women — that they know better than women and their doctors. Republicans’ crusade against women’s reproductive freedoms continues. The far-right’s Project 2025 agenda made revoking access to medication abortion a cornerstone of their policy plan — and now that Donald Trump is in the White House, we could see their plans come to fruition. That’s why I’m prioritizing abortion rights — including the repeal of the Comstock Act , an outdated law that the right wing is attempting to use to ban medication abortion nationwide. We have to fight with all the power and energy we have to make sure women have reproductive freedoms. We need to restore abortion access in states where there are drastic bans, and we need to expand access and affordability to women and families nationwide. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, we can ensure that every woman has the right and the ability to make her own decisions about her body and her health. I hope you’ll join me at this important moment with a commitment to action. Thank you for your support. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Release Date: January 20, 2025
PRESS RELEASE:

From the Desk of Justin Hwang, Oregon Republican Party Chairman
I am honored to join many Oregonians today to celebrate President Donald J. Trump's inauguration in Washington, D.C. This moment signifies a renewed commitment to the principles that make our nation exceptional: freedom, prosperity, and opportunity for all. Under President Trump's leadership, we anticipate policies that will strengthen our economy, secure our borders, and uphold the Constitution. The Oregon Republican Party stands ready to support the President's agenda and work towards a brighter future for our state and country. ####

# LATE TERM ABORTION
# PASSES SENATE
---
| |
---
| Late term abortion without an exclusion for minors to seek parental notification passed on a party line vote on Wednesday.
---
|
# REPEAL OF
# BAN ON SAME SEX MARRIAGE
# PASSES SENATE
---
| |
---
| A repeal of the ban on same sex marriage passed out of the Virginia Senate with the help of Republican Senators: Durant, Suetterlein, who voted with Democrats and Jordan, who was not present. All other Republicans voted no.
---
---
|
# RESTORATION OF FELON VOTING RIGHTS PASSES SENATE
---
| |
---
| Both violent and non-violent offenders will get their voting rights back without having to make their victims whole under this Constitutional Amendment that passed out of the Virginia Senate on Wednesday
