name: Team Salinas
subject: Fwd: what to expect from these emails going forward (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802192/523943614/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWQ2YzdhOS1mMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVz0aw8Y1wSX4tSnjmdBciYIqV-LKOCnoHXOGzhqN9U=) We wanted to make sure you saw Andrea’s email, because this is important. Like Andrea said, we’re not going to email you about every outrageous thing Trump says or does. But we _will_ fight to make progress and protect people every way we can, and we’ll let you know how to stay involved — because none of us can afford to throw in the towel. Take a moment to read Andrea’s note, and if you like what she has to say, then we are humbly asking you to [_**pitch in $5 to power this critical work going forward and restore some guardrails in our democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802193/523943615/-533866197?refcode=email_012225_Trump-fwd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWQ2YzdhOS1mMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVz0aw8Y1wSX4tSnjmdBciYIqV-LKOCnoHXOGzhqN9U=) -Team Salinas \--------BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE-------- Hey, I hope you’re doing OK. I want to make something clear up front: **I do not plan to email you every single time Donald Trump says or does something outrageous**. If I did, I’d do pretty much nothing but write emails all day long, and you’d do nothing but read them (if you opened them at all, which you’d probably stop doing). But the answer isn’t disengagement or resignation either. Seeing so many harmful actions all at once feels overwhelming — but none of us can afford to throw in the towel. We still have work to do, fights to win, and _real power to determine what happens next in our country, if we choose to use it._ **So here’s what I’m going to do, and I hope you will join me here: I’m going to stay focused on what matters most, fight like hell to stop the bad things we can stop, and make progress for the American people wherever I can.** I will _never_ send you an email just to make you feel angry or scared. But I _will_ send you emails about what I’m doing to stand up for our freedoms, our democracy, and our livelihoods — and how you can get involved in this work. So, listen: if you follow the news, you probably have some idea what Donald Trump got up to on his first day in office. Among other things, he pardoned insurrectionists who violently assaulted police officers, attempted to circumvent the Constitution on birthright citizenship, attacked LGBTQ people, and made it easier for lobbyists to give gifts to government officials. **You know what he didn’t get up to? A single damn thing to make life more affordable for working families.** I’m going to make sure my constituents in OR-06 get that message loud and clear. I’m going to fight for accountability for an administration that acts like it’s above the people it serves. And I’m going to do everything I can to flip the House blue in 2026 — so that we restore Congress as a separate and co-equal branch of government with the backbone to stand up to Trump when he does things that will harm the American people. [_**I hope you will join me in this work, because I can’t do it alone. These are tough fights, but it will take all of us — and in the end, we’ll be grateful for the wins we fought for and glad we stayed engaged when we could have given up instead. So if you’re with me, I’m humbly asking you to pitch in $5 to power our work going forward, because we’ve got a lot to do.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802194/523943616/-533866197?refcode=email_012225_Trump-fwd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWQ2YzdhOS1mMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVz0aw8Y1wSX4tSnjmdBciYIqV-LKOCnoHXOGzhqN9U=) | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802195/523943617/-533866197?refcode=email_012225_Trump-fwd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWQ2YzdhOS1mMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVz0aw8Y1wSX4tSnjmdBciYIqV-LKOCnoHXOGzhqN9U=)
---
Thank you for everything,
Andrea

But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://action.andreasalinasfororegon.com/a/unsubscribe?unsubscribedata=il7XL0LDY24FxLIq5r5rE3hEmNP846Rwkmdg2ArNTIkD%2BKTWMRVMt4Dz3kBwSWrQTB0%2FAsltHtdeF9S61891lQj4z%2FptXxH2bWtPSQ9b7XB6yIS4%2BuLqDyAyFmyT9CWDPDt%2FwJnJa8KJmnBy2hrBRAMFIXeEpTu6u%2FkBSa6cMfi71QElM3h%2BsIwClkuPseXa6DkbgXOGyhhTXa%2BFTI7Z0n5e2kqdqvM6VTy98niPFBc5qzbjZmdqPuptsNsbKaMyNbGsH09%2FvWzT6V8HzC%2Fuk8I5BG07HMzh1MtwxlU5yZ9NmcJbk4J0kB%2FMiJjVTCebx11bn04GcPO3W8arn6FDHlLne7c25APo4f9phk6cuXEgYTK2yHpsD0kd9DF9RB0e4VmBlA0RpyC43JiRI4xKI5R2CNZQV2WwhX%2Fri3H1pKQ%3D).** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802196/523943618/-1080040549?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWQ2YzdhOS1mMWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVz0aw8Y1wSX4tSnjmdBciYIqV-LKOCnoHXOGzhqN9U=)

subject: S(no)w more ignoring Climate Change
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
Hello from Gay Valimont, running for FL-1, with crazy news! **Record breaking snow has struck Florida, and though it is a cold treat for some, it is also a stark reminder of Climate Change.** This morning I woke up to a winter wonderland in FL-1, but realized how disastrous it was for countless Florida residents. **With your help today, we can help create legislation to prevent Climate Change** from causing major accidents for thousands, such as this one just off of I-10:
---
---
Now more than ever, people are relying on their government officials and public resources to help them during this time.**Straining resources, and putting our public servants in health is not a feasible long-term solution. ** **And we only have until April 1st until the special election. The clock is ticking.** **[Help my district recover from some of the disastrous effects of our changing climate today by donating to my campaign. Raising $2,000 by the end of the day means helping those who need it most right now, and impacting climate legislation moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802631/523945646/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5NTQ4MTItZjNkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=udUQANi5SPQsCbtIS3tWioli_6kfnd5do92GRxrYdOM=)**

name: Team Emily
subject: Hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
The Trump agenda isn’t inevitable. And threats we face next, we’ll face them together.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802661/523945683/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.22_Inauguration_X2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk1NDgxMi1mM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GB-ZfT1spbnA35hygKyhD_uQPniK8heLePrKgTZ7p0=&emci=cac34362-53d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=86954812-f3d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=23483442) | _Hi Peter — Making sure you saw Emily's note from Inauguration Day _⬇️
* * *
Peter, I haven’t been looking forward to January 20, 2025. President Trump, the man who paved the way for the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and strip millions of Americans of their fundamental rights, will take the Oath of Office this afternoon. If you’re feeling discouraged, I don’t blame you. **But if you’re feeling like all is lost and we have no chance of stopping Trump’s agenda, let me remind you of my story:** When Trump first won, I was working for Planned Parenthood, and I saw the threat he posed to our reproductive freedoms. Fundraising and protesting weren’t enough. I decided on Election Night 2016 that I would run for office so I could be in a position to change the policies and protect my neighbors. It wasn’t easy. I was told over and over that “a queer Latina who worked for Planned Parenthood,” could not win in my competitive State Senate district. But not only did I win — I helped pass nearly 200 new laws, was elected Deputy Majority Leader by my colleagues, and won a race to become the country’s first queer Latina in Congress. I’m proof that the future isn’t set. The Trump agenda isn’t inevitable. And threats we face next, we’ll face them together. **My two goals are to protect our neighbors from the worst of the MAGA policies and to do everything I can to take back the House as soon as possible. That’s why Team Emily is starting to fundraise and organize NOW, so we’re in the best possible position to support Democratic candidates in 2026.[_Can you chip in $10, $25, or any amount to fuel this effort and be a light on this dark day?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802664/523945687/1947289852?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.22_Inauguration_X2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk1NDgxMi1mM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GB-ZfT1spbnA35hygKyhD_uQPniK8heLePrKgTZ7p0=)** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100802667/523945690/1947289852?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.01.22_Inauguration_X2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk1NDgxMi1mM2Q4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GB-ZfT1spbnA35hygKyhD_uQPniK8heLePrKgTZ7p0=) Thank you so much for being a part of this team 💙 — Emily

clean_body: The Trump agenda isn’t inevitable. And threats we face next, we’ll face them together. | Hi Peter — Making sure you saw Emily's note from Inauguration Day ⬇️ Peter, I haven’t been looking forward to January 20, 2025. President Trump, the man who paved the way for the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade and strip millions of Americans of their fundamental rights, will take the Oath of Office this afternoon. If you’re feeling discouraged, I don’t blame you. But if you’re feeling like all is lost and we have no chance of stopping Trump’s agenda, let me remind you of my story: When Trump first won, I was working for Planned Parenthood, and I saw the threat he posed to our reproductive freedoms. Fundraising and protesting weren’t enough. I decided on Election Night 2016 that I would run for office so I could be in a position to change the policies and protect my neighbors. It wasn’t easy. I was told over and over that “a queer Latina who worked for Planned Parenthood,” could not win in my competitive State Senate district. But not only did I win — I helped pass nearly 200 new laws, was elected Deputy Majority Leader by my colleagues, and won a race to become the country’s first queer Latina in Congress. I’m proof that the future isn’t set. The Trump agenda isn’t inevitable. And threats we face next, we’ll face them together. My two goals are to protect our neighbors from the worst of the MAGA policies and to do everything I can to take back the House as soon as possible. That’s why Team Emily is starting to fundraise and organize NOW, so we’re in the best possible position to support Democratic candidates in 2026.=** = Thank you so much for being a part of this team 💙 — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . Dear Friend,
---
I sat just a few rows behind President Trump at yesterday’s church service at the National Cathedral, which was a national embarrassment. What should have been a message of unity and hope for America and our new leadership was derailed by woke, politically divisive rhetoric. I have many thoughts on the event, but most importantly, a silver lining I noticed in response to the so-called sermon. _**My thoughts on the National Cathedral Debacle ⬇️⬇️⬇️**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=410c1d68194241c1b4b6365a6de4e7d2&_e=j5J3GogVM94xmtT7gzKTlMG-dippp8efxfGDlVbhe6CN0_-c0rDAUbUukcSszTXRlVLnxN4YbpnQkhUULviw0ucmejBcpYJIF5mGSxinpRMLRchXAzEqvA82k7g0pmEuPFVrxUhCvHkoPk7sEKsNCNWtfceg6bccMheT0aCGGU8yPalhlwXwdCn920ggaUMUJe8Fwvqtm9Xf81m6wx6D3O3gR2XNfSnRsc5DxH32Vns6b3D9MgWoywgdL89bGO0ihzAL763H8vEwToBALuQWf-f_pGhBiFitK-8NmKsQWo_KxG6NttlfpVzt54bXn7oezNJfCRVbdmVstpco4Ek6Ag%3D%3D)

Till all hear,

Sean

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f1d51081c3d448a916e6203e7c61498&_e=_r3xSQN4-1IcRHStqLYA-RrqweVy2kFSDfieBThMCeKNkXk0w0O73Xf-yzGJ_KF4hB4IV5unCn0tybC2hnrhE-9MhYjUNQElVFIK-HEcmWjNzcL1dMHNhCFQcJLoXfHWqWW2IwmpRgqc5OwmlhUcjokZr-IJD4LHPQQcsZ2IRAe9Tlh3mvPP1UjR0TFGEPi7qFFy9O3Tvn2n2YzwY6aX2qhH5fN9WcxkiefVL1Ut8tJYdUko2S2yUTZR2iqWG5h0XrI2te_NY3e9ZNREWXvlz3FJfclnzT_2OzVICqpdSJ4_YurZAVAkSBn5wZWiSNCnt_6gmiOtWtdfcWiQrxTOq76nMx52LLmaHYbLJLhviYyK0K9c7hVi3mi6GJwPjSMH)

| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **Here’s the bad news:** Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies are smearing Merrick Garland on his handling of the January 6th cases.

**__But here’s the worse news:__** Trump keeps discrediting and attempting to sabotage this case to support his lie that the 2020 election was stolen!

_Not only is this bad for Garland...**but it’s dangerous for our Democracy!_**
[**Here’s what you can do to make sure our Democracy is safe: Sign our petition to STAND WITH MERRICK GARLAND »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-garland25/?source=FFR_20250122_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22787%2E4449941%2EaIRrSd)

The site reproductiverights.gov was a key resource for women, but literally within hours of being sworn in, Trump and his anti-women extremists removed it. They will stop at nothing to end reproductive freedom! We must fight back! = = Trump and his chaotic cronies are just getting started. Let’s show them what they’re up against! Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. We’ve enshrined abortion rights into Arizona’s constitution, but we need a pro-choice majority in order to keep it protected. Will you add your name as part of the pro-choice majority in 85303?** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100804760/523953029/1600503566?contactdata=H5qHYxuJb5TNvg9vKF3Zf/e8+wCAKpuqVsHszxwdsy3VnQqBWnEodg6rFxRdBfNayT7Dn7xLBMoNngJn2byQxZGT8PrF9ghq+/H5/O9j3s62bt3VusyJg6G+JBe6XudwTLn5RChKMj+YzhQCWIvn+w==&refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkNTA1NDItZjdkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RQNYYSAs-9BHVQdcvkRtztFsjR7HA1u2ZnTxYSGjDgg=&emci=2eb88553-cfd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=81d50542-f7d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9307116)

While we’ve secured protections for reproductive rights and abortion care here in Arizona, we’ll have to cement our pro-choice majority in order to keep it protected.
Donald Trump has proudly claimed himself to be the President who got rid of _Roe_ , and we know that anti-abortion extremists will use every opportunity they have during his second administration to ban abortion care nationwide.
Right here at home, we have pro-choice champions in the General Assembly as well as serving as Governor, Secretary of State, and Attorney General who are committed to ensuring that our right to bodily autonomy isn’t criminalized.
**[But hard-won fights like these don’t stay won — we have to remain vigilant and engaged to keep abortion care and reproductive rights protected in Arizona. Will you add your name and stand with the pro-choice majority working to protect abortion rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100804761/523953030/1600503566?contactdata=H5qHYxuJb5TNvg9vKF3Zf/e8+wCAKpuqVsHszxwdsy3VnQqBWnEodg6rFxRdBfNayT7Dn7xLBMoNngJn2byQxZGT8PrF9ghq+/H5/O9j3s62bt3VusyJg6G+JBe6XudwTLn5RChKMj+YzhQCWIvn+w==&refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkNTA1NDItZjdkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RQNYYSAs-9BHVQdcvkRtztFsjR7HA1u2ZnTxYSGjDgg=&emci=2eb88553-cfd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=81d50542-f7d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9307116)**

name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help Me Save My Son
body:
I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e5610345a19c4948973920408b2e65ff&_e=aXpDuItiu15h5p0i_2NEScJGX0ER7C1CW1S_knYHUiwmtTqrIp0JVkJGvK_obSIvad55CPRwNLGVsP1fUhNmY60cKLi32ig9-Xu9RLdnwiVdyZ5Ulwz9EqNyFAQDtufOIj7AxLuex_PcSIz2ilL2soU5vzsHF4Cx11FxQHFwH9Qq43gUJuP5oH-cbx0vuTDozyKrKMKZsYe7GWAihJKBaiwzA3u5k5uN_piME8cSzF8dumYuXD1fdQ5hihheatFoAvVhb4hVOIP9cH_2jJRqdmrXw26JG2de8l7m7rIt2cQ_o3eRqMdwfSRzAdqsEovt1Pvt1NWqfm8yj1yYxGm28eI-s_lIm0q7SFW0Ces4QjHHyoc9sVTHx5q8EFfo0gBc)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e5610345a19c4948973920408b2e65ff&_e=aXpDuItiu15h5p0i_2NEScJGX0ER7C1CW1S_knYHUiwmtTqrIp0JVkJGvK_obSIvad55CPRwNLGVsP1fUhNmY60cKLi32ig9-Xu9RLdnwiVdyZ5Ulwz9EqNyFAQDtufOIj7AxLuex_PcSIz2ilL2soU5vzsHF4Cx11FxQHFwH9Qq43gUJuP5oH-cbx0vuTDozyKrKMKZsYe7GWAihJKBaiwzA3u5k5uN_piME8cSzF_m8uBjKzMLrGsxjdxjkFyZc4UNsPznVYuoZHMruiX5ga23i0IS0SJVyjKtU-amXwYMnZOTM7QkXXKOu-M-45P8EwfVMejystoe2fL5L94V4BcS7cqGb-r2MkmeXtUmijF1vWekpScg0nxWvvzOprJo)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e5610345a19c4948973920408b2e65ff&_e=aXpDuItiu15h5p0i_2NEScJGX0ER7C1CW1S_knYHUiwmtTqrIp0JVkJGvK_obSIvad55CPRwNLGVsP1fUhNmY60cKLi32ig9-Xu9RLdnwiVdyZ5Ulwz9EqNyFAQDtufOIj7AxLuex_PcSIz2ilL2soU5vzsHF4Cx11FxQHFwH9Qq43gUJuP5oH-cbx0vuTDozyKrKMKZsYe7GWAihJKBaiwzA3u5k5uN_piME8cSzF_weUT03HSgIpkAuvOPrrWSYYGUqwIhQYUdDudRrMzpFvMkWmQ2KSj5zHkqVJ95ETlkVihx-laiUhwCNHxNpwQ5IskFl69gBdVfqzebn60HLJlNhuapsq69tVDRj713o2QEesFLTvGhFZviiBCgTDzh)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e5610345a19c4948973920408b2e65ff&_e=aXpDuItiu15h5p0i_2NEScJGX0ER7C1CW1S_knYHUiwmtTqrIp0JVkJGvK_obSIvad55CPRwNLGVsP1fUhNmY60cKLi32ig9-Xu9RLdnwiVdyZ5Ulwz9EqNyFAQDtufOIj7AxLuex_PcSIz2ilL2soU5vzsHF4Cx11FxQHFwH9Qq43gUJuP5oH-cbx0vuTDozyKrKMKZsYe7GWAihJKBaiwzA3u5k5uN_piME8cSzF_SdOeWXGUXMWQGud_daoDUETpkPHeXN1aJeL6-FU6Lq9_zYJSk_lupCHUaM3eHSBwyUeO_qoIr_3bvn7b16x-kTVNphNYP1YTswIoVYSzbWLA-tUmgohbd_eLnNkVG4DA43D1Cu_46EpO1ZvFRht3o)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e5610345a19c4948973920408b2e65ff&_e=aXpDuItiu15h5p0i_2NEScJGX0ER7C1CW1S_knYHUiwmtTqrIp0JVkJGvK_obSIvad55CPRwNLGVsP1fUhNmY60cKLi32ig9-Xu9RLdnwiVdyZ5Ulwz9EqNyFAQDtufOIj7AxLuex_PcSIz2ilL2soU5vzsHF4Cx11FxQHFwH9Qq43gUJuP5oH-cbx0vuTDozyKrKMKZsYe7GWAihJKBaiwzA3u5k5uN_piME8cSzF_bjxixxfd1TcwWaz06JKAciAhlxUf-C16sIbwdRwdlrjC5UOe6qPhssdVwpdfN0k9_uhRvE4HU_Poc5xdtWUbphZwB0qK1Tt7LPal1Sf-h6dLCBKjU1oY2Ff0QTSKmupSlGWi1QOqkdH1zXfAtEpTC)**
---

clean_body: I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

clean_body: | | | While Trump is distracting us with renaming the Gulf of Mexico, he just rescinded President Biden’s executive order that lowered prescription drug costs for Medicare and Medicaid recipients. This order was a lifeline for 120 million Americans, promising more affordable access to essential medications. By reversing it, Trump is putting corporate profits above the well-being of our most vulnerable citizens. He’s BIG pharma and BIG insurance. He doesn’t care about us. This is not just about politics; it’s about people’s lives. We cannot let this reversal go unchallenged. We must come together to fight for affordable healthcare and ensure that everyone has access to the medications they need. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thank you for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. body:
Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark ruling on Roe v. Wade

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=iqqY4qTH8%2F%2FUOEGSs1a2dBE82hXneiGA%2FsSOVKaaXlL9Fj2kMkHXNZgxZ0nQJ%2FCJjixPV4eiRpk9EjA393UrxS8Rudc4XaB9pRo6vBmyNIohsgxqLTEtzl8HpmaSvzhU%2FyAFUE5%2BVqUNRCdMSrUk7sDdF1QS3ywRxpxO6Zdm3MytANcl8psfyDQ46KJxJHJ18CsI5Toflbof2uIuXYJKA0%2B%2FoQn2p6nQtmlSed77LR09pWwbQ%2FZKXVZfx6Wka3pscj7ZShmf02B7MYLOuipQ95ftRGrKM4LOBvMglVdT4INaJetrRirQICyhibxmzFq%2BnWW8gFLbDv%2Bj99yIb54EScyrOWfwnnJKF0MnCa7%2BpNYT%2BZOb88dL07G6hNFxZKa4o7XNUESF3QCM52ytJhXx56OHzApsterHBaQy%2Fgahry0%3D)

It's Gabe. Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark ruling on _Roe v. Wade_ , a ruling that was overturned almost three years ago. And every day since then, Donald Trump and House Republicans have been fighting tooth and nail to destroy the reproductive freedom of women across the country. The fight to protect a woman’s right to choose has never been more critical. Now that Republicans have taken control of Congress and Donald Trump is back in the White House, the prospect of a total abortion ban is closer to reality than ever. Donald Trump has taken every opportunity to disparage the truth, undermine our democratic systems, and disregard the rule of law to prop up his own interests. We witnessed it firsthand for four years, and we’re bound to see more of it in the days to come. I’ll never stop working to ensure that every New Mexican has access to safe and affordable reproductive healthcare — but I can’t do it alone. That’s why I need every single one of you standing with me as I work to hold this seat for another term and help Democrats retake control of the House. [Will you support my campaign today and help me continue fighting back against Republicans’ Draconian attempts at controlling American women and their bodies?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100805374/523955000/-1737807343?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_012225_1_1_Roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZlNDExMi1mOWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TuZSWuNwBfrnFN3V8DOr9xSssOp4J7mlP2RsJ6LkLzY=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark ruling on Roe v. Wade Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Gabe. Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark ruling on Roe v. Wade , a ruling that was overturned almost three years ago. And every day since then, Donald Trump and House Republicans have been fighting tooth and nail to destroy the reproductive freedom of women across the country. The fight to protect a woman’s right to choose has never been more critical. Now that Republicans have taken control of Congress and Donald Trump is back in the White House, the prospect of a total abortion ban is closer to reality than ever. Donald Trump has taken every opportunity to disparage the truth, undermine our democratic systems, and disregard the rule of law to prop up his own interests. We witnessed it firsthand for four years, and we’re bound to see more of it in the days to come. I’ll never stop working to ensure that every New Mexican has access to safe and affordable reproductive healthcare — but I can’t do it alone. That’s why I need every single one of you standing with me as I work to hold this seat for another term and help Democrats retake control of the House. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: A ray of light from the November election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Meet Adam, Andy, and Elissa
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100805495/523955241/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWQ5Yzc1OS1mOWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoPJBc61QgdyIig5a6bBwyq1K7YJR6Bm2Wz99WRCpjM=&emci=9a4e2ae9-25d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d5d9c759-f9d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, if you’re like me, you’re going to be looking hard for good news during the next four years. Self care, right? Well, I have some I want to share! A handful of my colleagues – and specifically three of my friends – were recently sworn in as members of the U.S. Senate. Although we lost the Senate overall, these three will be strong voices for our values and are helping to lay the groundwork to turn the Senate blue next election cycle.
**🔵 Adam Schiff** was a mentor to me during my first term, chaired the House Intelligence Committee, where I now serve, and has been a champion on climate change and affordable housing. Senator Schiff led President Trump’s first impeachment trial and served on the committee investigating the January 6 riot at the U.S. Capitol. He will serve California and the country well.
**🔵****Andy Kim** served as a national security specialist under two presidents before becoming my colleague on the House Armed Services Committee. His election in New Jersey will bring experienced leadership to the Senate in areas where we need it, like national defense and foreign relations.
**🔵****Elissa Slotkin** and I met on the campaign trail back in 2018 when we were both running for office for the first time. Originally from Michigan, she worked at the CIA before representing Michigan in the U.S. House. She's been focused on solving "kitchen-table issues" like more good jobs, better health care, and equitable education – issues where American families urgently need her help.
**I couldn’t be happier for these three, and I know they will continue to do amazing work in the Senate. I look forward to working alongside them and seeing all they accomplish.**
The fight continues, and as always, there's work to be done.
– Chrissy
**P.S.** Donald Trump has officially taken office but the work continues.We are already back at it, talking to prospective candidates and making plans to retake the House and the Senate next year. I'll need all the support I can get as I take on the far right and fight for you. **[If you're able, I invite you to donate to power my work in the year ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100805496/523955242/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1085-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWQ5Yzc1OS1mOWQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoPJBc61QgdyIig5a6bBwyq1K7YJR6Bm2Wz99WRCpjM=)**

clean_body: Meet Adam, Andy, and Elissa | | | Derek, if you’re like me, you’re going to be looking hard for good news during the next four years. Self care, right? Well, I have some I want to share! A handful of my colleagues – and specifically three of my friends – were recently sworn in as members of the U.S. Senate. Although we lost the Senate overall, these three will be strong voices for our values and are helping to lay the groundwork to turn the Senate blue next election cycle. 🔵 Adam Schiff was a mentor to me during my first term, chaired the House Intelligence Committee, where I now serve, and has been a champion on climate change and affordable housing. Senator Schiff led President Trump’s first impeachment trial and served on the committee investigating the January 6 riot at the U.S. Capitol. He will serve California and the country well. 🔵Andy Kim served as a national security specialist under two presidents before becoming my colleague on the House Armed Services Committee. His election in New Jersey will bring experienced leadership to the Senate in areas where we need it, like national defense and foreign relations. 🔵Elissa Slotkin and I met on the campaign trail back in 2018 when we were both running for office for the first time. Originally from Michigan, she worked at the CIA before representing Michigan in the U.S. House. She's been focused on solving "kitchen-table issues" like more good jobs, better health care, and equitable education – issues where American families urgently need her help. I couldn’t be happier for these three, and I know they will continue to do amazing work in the Senate. I look forward to working alongside them and seeing all they accomplish. The fight continues, and as always, there's work to be done. – Chrissy P.S. Donald Trump has officially taken office but the work continues.We are already back at it, talking to prospective candidates and making plans to retake the House and the Senate next year. I'll need all the support I can get as I take on the far right and fight for you. = | | = | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. We've said it before and we'll say it again, team. Our top priority for the next four years is **p****rotecting our democracy from the Trump Administration.**
We're only three days into the new adminstration, but Trump has already made good on his promise to rule as a dictator from the Oval Office. His first few hours as president were spent signing dozens of executive orders that all roll back our rights and endanger our democracy.
If we're going to stand a chance at preserving our democracy, we have to continue engaging young voters. And we're not backing down from the fights that will disproportionately affect them.
Here are our strategies for helping the Youth Vote fight back against the Trump Administration:
* Apply pressure on our senators to appoint cabinet members who are interested in moving us forward, not bowing to corporate interests.
* Apply pressure on our representatives to overturn Executive Orders that threaten DEI programs, allow for mass deportations, and attack the LGBTQ+ community.
* Fight against federal and state legislation that restrict abortion access, undermine workers' rights, damage our environment, and much more.

Our democracy is worth fighting for. And investing in the Youth Vote is our best way to do just that.
[We need your support to keep up the fight for our democracy against the Trump Administration. If you believe our future is worth fighting for, will you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to empower young voters?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100805965/523957493/-1321116488?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGJkYzg3OC1mYmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpne2bufyS26xK11FZoPz0RonV__iXBJmeuP_V8bb9o=&emci=2e70fb3a-f6d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=5dbdc878-fbd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | We've said it before and we'll say it again, team. Our top priority for the next four years is protecting our democracy from the Trump Administration. We're only three days into the new adminstration, but Trump has already made good on his promise to rule as a dictator from the Oval Office. His first few hours as president were spent signing dozens of executive orders that all roll back our rights and endanger our democracy. If we're going to stand a chance at preserving our democracy, we have to continue engaging young voters. And we're not backing down from the fights that will disproportionately affect them. Here are our strategies for helping the Youth Vote fight back against the Trump Administration: Apply pressure on our senators to appoint cabinet members who are interested in moving us forward, not bowing to corporate interests. Apply pressure on our representatives to overturn Executive Orders that threaten DEI programs, allow for mass deportations, and attack the LGBTQ+ community. * Fight against federal and state legislation that restrict abortion access, undermine workers' rights, damage our environment, and much more. Our democracy is worth fighting for. And investing in the Youth Vote is our best way to do just that. | | | | | | Together, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

subject: A workhorse, not a showhorse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**

Folks, Donald Trump and a GOP majority are in office, but I remain focused on the work that truly matters. I am committed to being a workhorse, not a showhorse, in Congress. That means fighting every day to support good-paying jobs and equip workers and families in Central and Southern Illinois with the resources they need to thrive. The right-wing is eyeing key seats like ours, eager to flip them to expand their narrow majority. **I need your support to ensure that doesn’t happen.** Your grassroots contributions can help keep this seat blue, power our work to champion the middle class, push for sensible policies, and navigate the political landscape with resolve and integrity. Your donation will strengthen our cause and send a message that this team stands firm in its belief in progress, opportunity, and justice. name: JW
subject: It’s good that MAGA is attacking my district?
body:
If my opponent was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into my district.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cL-SGN1Ssv9gt0qGDT3Rdmr9xBlsGszs1Boe-bVm6TBRO705UsrzKIdi0Tl6n67ZwyzQNaK3Y5dudL035vrGyRLUnrL7k4eoOsf5kJNGeexKVDNnX1CjK2OzfqibbtrBdJjXAHGQ6jTjeKomeVNZ6QS6pCs6tqeKQqdtDc_SBkEyxma1NBv3GHaYMFt47IIfk14BiclbuOv390U4isHszB8imEGhalM8UgiOONMl1ww=&c=y_bhkhUNvkc5QesWSwanBus5J8wiv1lyewy5UteyV_cfa85rv5gFBg==&ch=Z7BoVK7WbdiL2mdKKDGL-SrxVwHj-suObzWsVJGAOEdvLnzN0xv8ag==)
---
| | | | Team,
As you may know, I am the Democrat running in the FL-06 Special Election which is set to take place on April 1st.
Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters.
Florida's Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooing in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine.
Yesterday the full frontal MAGA assault on my district entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent:
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cL-SGN1Ssv9gt0qGDT3Rdmr9xBlsGszs1Boe-bVm6TBRO705UsrzKIdi0Tl6n67ZloKmmRbbXP-lkntuLHZlTAmrSjTk1BO74twbeovUVZoSU5qEJkNGA3ZLDeri2xZBtZHZylyR6U0hVZZx45aCejZbh0MVCmgWUY5XBziardP5tWmjJ2b5zr46ouG4iP-fq836TzNOvx3cbSMQIiKjdVRqqmrgMUun&c=y_bhkhUNvkc5QesWSwanBus5J8wiv1lyewy5UteyV_cfa85rv5gFBg==&ch=Z7BoVK7WbdiL2mdKKDGL-SrxVwHj-suObzWsVJGAOEdvLnzN0xv8ag==)
---
| The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday.
These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because no one in this district knows him. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida.
If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn't feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us but only if we can keep up with their spends in the 73 days left until E-Day.
So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised $500,000 since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster.
---
| | | | If just 1 out of every 20 people we send this email to donate $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up. [Can you help us keep up with the dark money pro-MAGA PACs flooding this race by making a donation of $5 or more?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cL-SGN1Ssv9gt0qGDT3Rdmr9xBlsGszs1Boe-bVm6TBRO705UsrzKIdi0Tl6n67Z1932l0rx-jCINmuMXsmiwzalidL96w2_3wWS7EYVaMINqFD4g-eMWCtfcrTaDjuGrDJ1MQbglR25OTBTsMKtV63ulEadwMfU4tHzcM9sPyuqAl2ZdUsSz-r7fIvNQAaSEZVtCY6yhYGTHsZK4eRT_feX0S3iczuxoFrJjBwV0odTsfJG14aGgA==&c=y_bhkhUNvkc5QesWSwanBus5J8wiv1lyewy5UteyV_cfa85rv5gFBg==&ch=Z7BoVK7WbdiL2mdKKDGL-SrxVwHj-suObzWsVJGAOEdvLnzN0xv8ag==)
---
| | | | | [Donate $5 now >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cL-SGN1Ssv9gt0qGDT3Rdmr9xBlsGszs1Boe-bVm6TBRO705UsrzKIdi0Tl6n67Z1932l0rx-jCINmuMXsmiwzalidL96w2_3wWS7EYVaMINqFD4g-eMWCtfcrTaDjuGrDJ1MQbglR25OTBTsMKtV63ulEadwMfU4tHzcM9sPyuqAl2ZdUsSz-r7fIvNQAaSEZVtCY6yhYGTHsZK4eRT_feX0S3iczuxoFrJjBwV0odTsfJG14aGgA==&c=y_bhkhUNvkc5QesWSwanBus5J8wiv1lyewy5UteyV_cfa85rv5gFBg==&ch=Z7BoVK7WbdiL2mdKKDGL-SrxVwHj-suObzWsVJGAOEdvLnzN0xv8ag==)

clean_body: If my opponent was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into my district. | | | | | == | | | | Team, As you may know, I am the Democrat running in the FL-06 Special Election which is set to take place on April 1st. Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters. Florida's Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooing in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine. Yesterday the full frontal MAGA assault on my district entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent: | | | | | == | The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday. These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because no one in this district knows him. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida. If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn't feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us but only if we can keep up with their spends in the 73 days left until E-Day. So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised $500,000 since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster. | | | | If just 1 out of every 20 people we send this email to donate $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up. == | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | That MAGA needs to flood the airwaves so early on in this race is a good sign for us - with your support we'll soon be flooding the airwaves with ads of our own. Have a great weekend, and thank you in advance for your support. Josh Weil Democrat for Florida's 6th | | | | | == | | | | Checks can be sent to: Josh Weil for Congress 8381 Citrus Chase Dr Orlando, FL 32836 | | | | Josh Weil for Congress | 8381 Citrus Chase Drive | Orlando, FL 32836 US | |

name: Ellen Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: Less free
body:
Roe was the floor. We need to build a new ceiling. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100806732/523960309/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE149_20250122_ERMRoe_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055623&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTAwNzAzNi1mZGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4nlZnk3OpggzlNT9sO7nMPtujntCMGH6Maluiw3y0vk=) I am furious that we had more rights in 1973 than we have today. ---
Peter,

Two big things have stayed with me for the last 52 years, since _Roe v. Wade_ was decided on this day in 1973.

First: The decision was momentous, an event to be celebrated, and permanent. In other words, when the U.S. Supreme Court issued its decision confirming a constitutional right to bodily autonomy, **it was unfathomable to think that the precedent set that day could be ignored or invalidated at _any_ point in the future. **If you had told me then that women in 2025 would have fewer rights than we had in 1973, I would have been shocked... _and very, very angry._

Second: _Roe_ was so important for everyone of childbearing age — but the deepest reaction came from anyone who had gone through the process of getting an abortion pre-_Roe_. I've talked to women who had horrible experiences in dark and dirty hidden "medical" offices, who dealt with serious health problems caused by the procedure, who were terrified others would find out. The trauma of needing care in a country that outlawed it has stayed with them, which is why the women who still live with those memories are some of the most ardent warriors in today's pro-choice movement.

Those of us who were alive pre-_Roe_ were determined that young women would not have to undergo similar, terrible experiences. Tragically, that is not the world we live in today. In the nearly three years since _Roe_ was overturned, women across the country have been denied the care they need — and some, like Amber Thurman in Georgia, have lost their lives to anti-choice extremism.

I am furious that we had more rights in 1973 than we have today. But I am also hopeful, because we have something that didn't exist yet in 1973: We have the millions-strong community of EMILYs List candidates and supporters. We have a movement.

Anti-choice extremism won't stop as long as anti-choice politicians are in power. [**Peter, I'm asking you to be part of the movement to STOP anti-choice extremism and SAVE reproductive rights. name: The Ohio Dems
subject: 52 years after Roe, the fight continues.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100806857/523960504/-1175417157?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Roe_250122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODNmZDU4YS1mZGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3oat-YEMMfYimsbvUpkw1rkDfvFrs4fuu_fcN9sD48=) Team,

Today should have marked 52 years of celebrating _Roe v. Wade_ and the constitutional right to an abortion. Instead, we’re facing a stark reality: the federal right to an abortion no longer exists, and extremist Republicans are working harder than ever to strip away reproductive freedom state by state.

[_**Will you pitch in $5.20 right now to help us defend our right to choose?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100806858/523960505/-1175417157?amount=5.2&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Roe_250122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODNmZDU4YS1mZGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3oat-YEMMfYimsbvUpkw1rkDfvFrs4fuu_fcN9sD48=)

In Ohio, the battle over abortion has been a saga, to say the least. We passed an amendment to protect abortion rights in the Ohio Constitution and prevent laws like Attorney General Dave Yost’s 6-week ban from taking effect.

But GOP extremists have refused to accept that Ohioans overwhelmingly voted to protect abortion rights, and they’ve been trying to ban them again ever since.

Yost just recently appealed the decision in court that struck down his ban—he’s trying to game the system, arguing that even though Ohioans passed Issue 1, his 6-week ban should remain.

We saw how dangerous the first GOP ban was—Ohioans had to be sent out of state for care. Women in hospitals were facing life-threatening situations. Doctors had to face a harsh reality: losing their patient or their license.

**We won’t go back.**

[_**So we’re asking: can you donate $5.20 or more to help us stop Ohio’s extreme, out-of-touch Republicans from attacking our rights?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100806859/523960506/-83947052?amount=5.2&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Roe_250122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODNmZDU4YS1mZGQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3oat-YEMMfYimsbvUpkw1rkDfvFrs4fuu_fcN9sD48=) clean_body: | = Team, Today should have marked 52 years of celebrating Roe v. Wade and the constitutional right to an abortion. Instead, we’re facing a stark reality: the federal right to an abortion no longer exists, and extremist Republicans are working harder than ever to strip away reproductive freedom state by state. = In Ohio, the battle over abortion has been a saga, to say the least. We passed an amendment to protect abortion rights in the Ohio Constitution and prevent laws like Attorney General Dave Yost’s 6-week ban from taking effect. But GOP extremists have refused to accept that Ohioans overwhelmingly voted to protect abortion rights, and they’ve been trying to ban them again ever since. Yost just recently appealed the decision in court that struck down his ban—he’s trying to game the system, arguing that even though Ohioans passed Issue 1, his 6-week ban should remain. We saw how dangerous the first GOP ban was—Ohioans had to be sent out of state for care. Women in hospitals were facing life-threatening situations. Doctors had to face a harsh reality: losing their patient or their license. We won’t go back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with us, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump called me “scum” — from the Resolute Desk in the Oval Office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8267%2E5257348%2EmTDV5T ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Donald Trump was sworn in around 12 PM on Monday. By 8:30 PM, he had
already attacked me by name during his first Q&A at the Oval Office.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2025_abs_em.slA1qC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8267%2E5257348%2EmTDV5T ]Trump executive action

“People used to say ‘Who’s worse: a politician or a vicious real estate
developer?’ and I’d always say the real estate developer is far worse. But after
about three months of getting to know scum like Adam Schiff and other people
like that, I said, ‘No actually, real estate people are really quite nice by
comparison.’”

Derek, I figured
Trump would continue to come after me. I just didn’t think it would happen
this soon. Especially when there are far more pressing matters to focus on
than his enemies list.

Why focus on me on day one? It’s not completely clear, but it may have to
do with my questioning of Pam Bondi, his nominee for Attorney General. I
asked her if she would commit to preserving the evidence from the January
6th investigation — she wouldn’t. I asked her if there was any factual
basis to investigate Liz Cheney or Jack Smith — she refused to answer. I
asked her if she would review every January 6 pardon application before
Trump issued a blanket pardon and she was indignant that she would — she
didn’t.

Perhaps worst of all, he pardoned and commuted the sentences of the
January 6 insurrectionists, members of the Proud Boys and Oath Keepers
just to name a few — handing them all a literal “Get Out of Jail Free”
card to the very people who stormed the Capitol, threatened violence
against elected leaders, and attacked heroic law enforcement agents with
baseball bats.

He also used his first day in office to attack immigrants and working
families, to cut back on climate protections, and to rescind the Biden
Administration’s efforts to lower prescription drug costs.

The work to protect our Constitution during his second term begins now.
The work to restore our rights and freedoms begins now. The work to hold
Trump and his allies again accountable to the rule of law and to the will
of the American people begins now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=jan2025_abs_em.8h8utV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8267%2E5257348%2EmTDV5T ]Before the next attack from the sitting president of the United States,
I’m hoping you will chip in to help my team and me respond to the next
smear and keep up the tough fights ahead.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2025_abs_em.-9184n&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=8267%2E5257348%2EmTDV5T ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

Thank you,

Adam

name: Team JanePAC
subject: The truth about the fires devastating California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Climate action has never been more urgent.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100806890/523960599/1328794144?refcode=ea.abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiYzQzYjYzLWZkZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zaKLQisWntciG1BXupbpJl9-2QgEkBtEcz_kI6Sgraw=&emci=25da0874-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
As Southern California continues to battle devastating fires and thousands of folks face the hard work of rebuilding their lives, we can’t ignore the larger forces at play. **Wildfires have always been part of California’s ecosystem, but the scale and intensity of today’s fires are undeniable symptoms of the climate crisis.** Decades of drought, followed by extremely heavy rainfall in 2022 and 2023, caused a surge of vegetation growth across California. In 2024, grass and shrubs became tinder-dry after record heatwaves and drought struck again. **Scientists call these “whiplash conditions,” and they’re the direct result of a warming planet.** This cycle is making fire seasons longer, wildfires more destructive, and recovery efforts increasingly difficult for communities across Los Angeles and beyond. Amid the devastation, we’ve also seen a surge of dangerous misinformation spreading online. From baseless conspiracy theories about the fires’ origins to old or AI-generated videos falsely depicting the fires’ spread and firefighters’ efforts, these false claims undermine recovery efforts and sow confusion when communities most need clear, accurate information. Officials like FEMA and the Los Angeles Fire Department are working tirelessly to counter these lies, but the stakes are too high for us to stay silent. This is a moment for collaboration and unity, not division. By supporting recovery efforts and amplifying trusted voices like FEMA and the Los Angeles Fire Department, we can ensure that communities have the necessary resources to rebuild and recover. If you’re in a position to give, we urge you to support organizations that are making a direct impact in Southern California. Below are some groups that are providing vital resources, offering relief to displaced families, and preparing for the long road ahead:
* **[Better Angels Emergency Assistance Fund:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100806891/523960600/1018660299?refcode=ea.abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiYzQzYjYzLWZkZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zaKLQisWntciG1BXupbpJl9-2QgEkBtEcz_kI6Sgraw=&emci=25da0874-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)** Provides direct financial assistance to low-income individuals and families impacted by disasters.

* **[211LA:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100806892/523960601/-1809241941?refcode=ea.abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFiYzQzYjYzLWZkZDgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zaKLQisWntciG1BXupbpJl9-2QgEkBtEcz_kI6Sgraw=&emci=25da0874-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=abc43b63-fdd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)** Connects residents with essential resources, including housing assistance, food, and mental health support, available 24/7 via phone or online.

clean_body: Climate action has never been more urgent. | As Southern California continues to battle devastating fires and thousands of folks face the hard work of rebuilding their lives, we can’t ignore the larger forces at play. Wildfires have always been part of California’s ecosystem, but the scale and intensity of today’s fires are undeniable symptoms of the climate crisis. Decades of drought, followed by extremely heavy rainfall in 2022 and 2023, caused a surge of vegetation growth across California. In 2024, grass and shrubs became tinder-dry after record heatwaves and drought struck again. Scientists call these “whiplash conditions,” and they’re the direct result of a warming planet. This cycle is making fire seasons longer, wildfires more destructive, and recovery efforts increasingly difficult for communities across Los Angeles and beyond. Amid the devastation, we’ve also seen a surge of dangerous misinformation spreading online. From baseless conspiracy theories about the fires’ origins to old or AI-generated videos falsely depicting the fires’ spread and firefighters’ efforts, these false claims undermine recovery efforts and sow confusion when communities most need clear, accurate information. Officials like FEMA and the Los Angeles Fire Department are working tirelessly to counter these lies, but the stakes are too high for us to stay silent. This is a moment for collaboration and unity, not division. By supporting recovery efforts and amplifying trusted voices like FEMA and the Los Angeles Fire Department, we can ensure that communities have the necessary resources to rebuild and recover. If you’re in a position to give, we urge you to support organizations that are making a direct impact in Southern California. Below are some groups that are providing vital resources, offering relief to displaced families, and preparing for the long road ahead: Provides direct financial assistance to low-income individuals and families impacted by disasters. Connects residents with essential resources, including housing assistance, food, and mental health support, available 24/7 via phone or online. Provides shelter, food, and emotional support to those affected by disasters. Offers up-to-date information on evacuation centers and safety guidelines. Offers financial support to individuals and organizations for recovery efforts. Distributes food and essential supplies to residents in need. Focuses on longer-term recovery efforts to support community members. Serves animal needs in disaster-affected areas and conducts search and rescue for pets left behind or animals in need of urgent medical care. In solidarity, The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team | Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The Babylon Bee: The Joke That Changed Everything
body:
I never imagined this would happen| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=331abd1c668c47e898180761faca2de2&_e=2PpJYRUua15SX5JZpfNOgmPlc9EJwaCeSEACCR3-pa5TvulI4MSQsWeqBOrYZDfyOp7UrSClrEpFagk_aBcdZQeoy0QzF1AOmIkxRDCUT7oNu9dJggamX5UvwkXUyXIUC5GZt64q6pnAEDR83c7RsL_pH6ZiQayuTnoxnxnqMndyppz_61Tp_f0_uOFr42Zgmy5DhLv7UdzldYe56yRX0LEXI3g7Xoo4aQyiTij8k1RVXKXYMmXnkB4vI6CIhwYUMuT10vGyhu92RHg-pL0hcw%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Peter, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---

body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=y2DzCSpp7SAaISY1xqZjM935nzHpQGxmkkKuznDKhu7sj4p8Wh5KbC3S4A%2F3fP9Nd0BuKskYK4qDq9DZhPIAbJUiWjolkoQsHvjmj0FSzyKRgusu5I0Kkkaaiqvj1fcsY7PON0TV3BHSEHKxOjqP6lD1g1QJoP0HZ3AxNFOPYe1l%2FK72Lqt2%2BWgJ2bcj1WKi5U2AEWEbaH3sGBMa0fJf6PNYYC9YMXg1uH%2BpbseshVNoTJhKUVlgCmQPCdl9ZCyxj85Aja6BFPqr4myV5QxJ6u5XBwufyt%2BhGGr6Eri%2FMnc4P%2BTBEQan2XS4r%2FLeTDy2vMcrEde7%2BgwbBqV2gPy09zbU1PB%2FEA4Njpg%2F2OZNAb%2FLfC9Qc53yHPkyUrFeJqFXRZ7ojmyj4Ir9YknE8pR2zzU%2FPROFKTusIcFIqS67pJUm7AwKKDYwBiVVhmF7XEmg)

Did you hear what Democratic Strategist James Carville recently said? He gave his two cents on what he thinks Democrats in Congress should focus on this time around. Take a look for yourself: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807183/523962046/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012225_1_1_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBiMjgyYTEtZmZkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eW9LznFW4KC_ToQqmDsTCB8zkAf_N2BUp3140M3Kydk=&emci=bed63567-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f0b282a1-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4131986) As we kick off 2025 and the 119th Congress gets underway, I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get back to work for the people of California’s 25th like never before. But before that, I want to hear from you. [You’re invited to fill out my 2025 Congressional Priorities Survey and share what issues you would like to see Congress address in the coming months. Will you take a moment of your time to share your thoughts today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807186/523962051/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012225_1_1_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBiMjgyYTEtZmZkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eW9LznFW4KC_ToQqmDsTCB8zkAf_N2BUp3140M3Kydk=&emci=bed63567-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f0b282a1-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4131986) | | **[TAKE BRIEF SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807190/523962055/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012225_1_1_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBiMjgyYTEtZmZkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eW9LznFW4KC_ToQqmDsTCB8zkAf_N2BUp3140M3Kydk=&emci=bed63567-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f0b282a1-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4131986)**

I can promise you it won’t take long, but it will give us here at Ruiz HQ a better understanding of what you’re hoping to see accomplished during this session of Congress.
[If you’re on board, click here to take our 2025 Congressional Priorities Survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807193/523962060/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012225_1_1_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBiMjgyYTEtZmZkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eW9LznFW4KC_ToQqmDsTCB8zkAf_N2BUp3140M3Kydk=&emci=bed63567-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f0b282a1-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4131986)

— Raul

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you hear what Democratic Strategist James Carville recently said? He gave his two cents on what he thinks Democrats in Congress should focus on this time around. Take a look for yourself: As we kick off 2025 and the 119th Congress gets underway, I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get back to work for the people of California’s 25th like never before. But before that, I want to hear from you. | | I can promise you it won’t take long, but it will give us here at Ruiz HQ a better understanding of what you’re hoping to see accomplished during this session of Congress. Thank you! — Raul | | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: My thoughts on Trump’s inauguration and what lies ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807281/523962224/623074613?refcode=jtk1386-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgxOWExYTctZmZkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1KhyRY0eR7siy6WQAdpNSFwjkWLNk5JuOOoCIJeNlOI=&emci=36f4f949-cbd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4819a1a7-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

As we witnessed democracy in action – the peaceful transition of power that is so foundational to our nation – I truly hoped the 47th president would give remarks that brought the country together and healed our differences.

Trump claimed he wanted to be a "peacemaker." He said he wanted to be "a unifier."

And yet, his remarks were filled with more of the same: Grievances and grandiosity, playing to cultural and political divisions – all while unelected tech titan billionaires watched closely on a raised dais alongside Trump, elevated above even Supreme Court justices and duly elected Republicans and Democrats alike.
**Donald Trump is who we've always known him to be. He is no peacemaker. He is no unifier. He seeks to serve himself and elevate those with blind loyalty to agenda. Case in point: Trump's sickening, repugnant pardon of nearly all the Jan. 6 insurrectionists.**
I am more committed than ever to our core constitutional values and to fighting for a world that lives up to them for all Americans. Where there is common ground with the new administration, I will seek it and work in a bipartisan fashion to better the nation we love.

I will fight with everything I have in the Senate to prevent Trump from steamrolling over justice, freedom and democracy. That work has already begun as we scrutinize Trump's nominees for his Cabinet.

**I will also not back down from going toe to toe with this administration to _protect_ the nation we love.**
Your partnership will be key, friend. Your voice, your actions, your support – your participation in our democracy. I'm grateful to have you by my side in this fight, and I'll be sure to keep you updated every step of the way.

Sincerely,

Dick
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807283/523962227/921248324?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1386-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgxOWExYTctZmZkOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1KhyRY0eR7siy6WQAdpNSFwjkWLNk5JuOOoCIJeNlOI=)
