name: Val Hoyle
subject: 52 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807290/523962238/553882890?refcode=AU_VAH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzE5YTFhNy1mZmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hv-8tJhTEyJfzii9TIoS32doit1-X49Uy5znjVTN94=&emci=1cda261d-54d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4719a1a7-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, On January 22, 1973, the Supreme Court ruled that every American has a constitutional right to an abortion. **52 years later, those reproductive freedoms have been stripped away by Donald Trump and his allies.** During Trump’s first term, he appointed three right-wing justices to the Supreme Court who eventually overturned _Roe v. Wade_ — ripping away the right to an abortion from tens of millions of women across the country. Now, more than 1 in 3 American women live under some form of an abortion ban, and Republicans aren’t slowing down their efforts to further restrict reproductive healthcare access. Trump and his allies are dead set on limiting reproductive care and banning abortion _nationwide_. As a woman and mother of two who has needed reproductive care in the past, the attacks on our rights are personal to me. I understand how critical it is for everyone to have access to safe, affordable, and effective reproductive care. That’s why I joined the House Pro-Choice Caucus to fight for expanded access to reproductive care alongside several of my colleagues. **_Everyone_ deserves the right to make their own decisions about their lives, bodies, and futures — and I will fight in Congress every day to restore that right.** We will win this fight as long as we stick together, Peter. Thank you. — Val | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807291/523962239/526815904?refcode=AU_VAH_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzE5YTFhNy1mZmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6hv-8tJhTEyJfzii9TIoS32doit1-X49Uy5znjVTN94=)

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: We’re fighting back to restore women’s bodily autonomy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, Fifty two years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down its decision in _Roe v. Wade_ , ruling that women have the right to make their own reproductive health care choices. Since that historic decision, the conservative movement spent decades chipping away at this constitutional and human right. They lobbied ferociously. They allied with dark-money donors. Anti-abortion Republican presidents packed the Supreme Court with right-wing judges with radical viewpoints. And three years ago, the Supreme Court handed them their ultimate prize — overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and upending decades of precedent. It was the first time in American history that the Court had taken away a constitutional right from the people. [**My Democratic colleagues and I are fighting to restore women’s freedom and bodily autonomy. Will you sign on in support of our work to protect reproductive rights on the anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807361/523962352/1570848945?contactdata=0/t+t1fZNXeYJnWZ9xQj3YBUqPKtg0vIidzHrsMFvus99LdtoYJiclS8Uiq/NlDy6MyjQ4WmI4aTnsygtjRncRu9xr5E2+GgAg22EJmEnFUtt/H6UkOV7AFJQXRcIBnElCR+tz5LjoaUTi1Y023Q0z/zi7+WyTH6oE37eQTB3tA=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE5YTFhNy1mZmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryIu0j9xQmaBXCUdqhDaWFhX62Hr4yfrKC4fQs8Dc_4=&emci=249221a3-e4d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4b19a1a7-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=23190490) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807362/523962353/1570848945?contactdata=0/t+t1fZNXeYJnWZ9xQj3YBUqPKtg0vIidzHrsMFvus99LdtoYJiclS8Uiq/NlDy6MyjQ4WmI4aTnsygtjRncRu9xr5E2+GgAg22EJmEnFUtt/H6UkOV7AFJQXRcIBnElCR+tz5LjoaUTi1Y023Q0z/zi7+WyTH6oE37eQTB3tA=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE5YTFhNy1mZmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryIu0j9xQmaBXCUdqhDaWFhX62Hr4yfrKC4fQs8Dc_4=&emci=249221a3-e4d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4b19a1a7-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=23190490)
---
The overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ instantly stripped millions of Americans of their right to make their own reproductive health care choices. GOP-led states across the country were emboldened to go even further, passing laws that criminalize doctors for providing essential, life-saving care — without exceptions for cases of rape or incest.
_Peter, as of now,**forty one** states have abortion bans in effect with limited exceptions — and extreme MAGA Republicans are working to enact an abortion ban nationwide._
Democrats are continuing to fight for reproductive freedom, and we won’t back down during Trump’s presidency. We’ve pushed for the largest expansion of contraception coverage in more than a decade and introduced legislation to help women access reproductive care in anti-abortion states, but we must continue pushing forward.
**I’m in this fight to protect the fundamental right of every individual to make decisions about their bodies, or our futures.**
[**If you’re with me, please add your name in support of the essential work to protect reproductive rights from far-right attacks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807363/523962354/1570848945?contactdata=0/t+t1fZNXeYJnWZ9xQj3YBUqPKtg0vIidzHrsMFvus99LdtoYJiclS8Uiq/NlDy6MyjQ4WmI4aTnsygtjRncRu9xr5E2+GgAg22EJmEnFUtt/H6UkOV7AFJQXRcIBnElCR+tz5LjoaUTi1Y023Q0z/zi7+WyTH6oE37eQTB3tA=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjE5YTFhNy1mZmQ4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryIu0j9xQmaBXCUdqhDaWFhX62Hr4yfrKC4fQs8Dc_4=&emci=249221a3-e4d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4b19a1a7-ffd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=23190490)

clean_body: | Aloha Peter, Fifty two years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down its decision in Roe v. Wade , ruling that women have the right to make their own reproductive health care choices. Since that historic decision, the conservative movement spent decades chipping away at this constitutional and human right. They lobbied ferociously. They allied with dark-money donors. Anti-abortion Republican presidents packed the Supreme Court with right-wing judges with radical viewpoints. And three years ago, the Supreme Court handed them their ultimate prize — overturning Roe v. Wade and upending decades of precedent. It was the first time in American history that the Court had taken away a constitutional right from the people. | The overturning of Roe v. Wade instantly stripped millions of Americans of their right to make their own reproductive health care choices. GOP-led states across the country were emboldened to go even further, passing laws that criminalize doctors for providing essential, life-saving care — without exceptions for cases of rape or incest. Peter, as of now,forty one states have abortion bans in effect with limited exceptions — and extreme MAGA Republicans are working to enact an abortion ban nationwide. Democrats are continuing to fight for reproductive freedom, and we won’t back down during Trump’s presidency. We’ve pushed for the largest expansion of contraception coverage in more than a decade and introduced legislation to help women access reproductive care in anti-abortion states, but we must continue pushing forward. I’m in this fight to protect the fundamental right of every individual to make decisions about their bodies, or our futures. Thank you for your continued support. Mahalo, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

body:
Will you stand with me?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807439/523962664/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.22_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTI5ZjIyNy0wMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge3hZOzlDrEjFYy8R1hrknHGoegallEUYEoImV2OtWo=) Peter, Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark decision on _Roe v. Wade_ , which guaranteed reproductive freedom for women across the country. **But in 2022, a conservative Supreme Court majority, made up of judges hand-picked by President Trump, repealed _Roe v. Wade_ , stripped away our reproductive rights, and unleashed unprecedented attacks on the freedom for people to make their own healthcare decisions.** In the two years since _Roe_ was overturned, we have seen extreme abortion bans enacted in dozens of states across the country. Right here in Ohio, Republicans tried to ban abortion, but Ohioans stood together to enshrine reproductive freedom in the Ohio Constitution. **But with Trump back in the White House, we know this fight is far from over. If J.D. Vance, Donald Trump, the Republican Majorities in the House and Senate, and other extreme Republicans have it their way, they’ll pass a national, total abortion ban.** **Peter, I am fighting back because Ohio families deserve the freedom to access the care they need, when they need it. But I can’t do it without you.[I hope you’ll consider joining my grassroots team today to help me in the fight for reproductive freedom for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807440/523962665/985656371?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.22_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTI5ZjIyNy0wMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge3hZOzlDrEjFYy8R1hrknHGoegallEUYEoImV2OtWo=)** Yours in Service, _Emilia_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807441/523962666/985656371?nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.22_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTI5ZjIyNy0wMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge3hZOzlDrEjFYy8R1hrknHGoegallEUYEoImV2OtWo=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807442/523962667/985656371?-nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.01.22_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTI5ZjIyNy0wMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ge3hZOzlDrEjFYy8R1hrknHGoegallEUYEoImV2OtWo=)

name: Fair Fight
subject: Your voting rights update is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
News you can use from Team Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100807483/523962992/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250122_f_Q4Recap_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTUyMjk1NS0wMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Xdo-ZZkHNQUbmeQmPRx4J2h51ALW5YhqHrb0asaPXY=&emci=659acff3-e7d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ba522955-00d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=1037277)

| | 2024 was a year of challenge and transformation — a year that tested us, pushed us, and ultimately strengthened us. Through hard work and the unwavering support of our community, we recommitted to our mission and positioned ourselves for the critical fights ahead. Read on about our recent work to expose voter suppression and our wins from the end of the year, as we prepare for what 2025 will bring:
* * *
**Not today, Georgia State Election Board** In a big win for Georgia voters and our democracy, a judge found seven of the election rules passed by Trump-endorsed members on Georgia’s State Election Board “illegal, unconstitutional, and void,” striking them down a couple weeks before Election Day. The rules included changes that could have empowered local election officials — some who still believe Donald Trump’s 2020 election lies — to delay the certification of election results, delay election results being tabulated, and undermine confidence in the 2024 election.
* * *
**Democracy Champions won big in Georgia** During the November election, Fair Fight endorsed and supported 61 local Georgia candidates — and saw 50 win their elections outright. In the House of Representatives, Floyd Gridding (District 149), Tangie Herring (District 145), and Bryce Berry (District 56), flipped Republican-held seats and defeated extreme anti-democratic Republicans. We know these Democracy Champions will work to ensure Georgians can freely cast their ballots and fight for working people, so that our future elections reflect the will of the people.
* * *
**Voter Outreach Milestones** In the months and weeks leading up to the November election, our volunteers showed up in full force to help voters stay informed and cast their ballots. We sent over **2 million** texts, knocked on over **45,000** doors in competitive districts, and provided information or assistance to **20,000+** voters, which helped us win races in Georgia’s House of Representatives. We couldn’t have done this work without you, and we’re incredibly grateful for this team!
* * *
The Fair Fight team is shifting into resistance preparation mode as we look ahead to another four years of Trump and an administration that is bent on rolling back freedoms and attacking our democracy. [**If you can, chip in today to support the fights to come. clean_body: News you can use from Team Fair Fight | | | 2024 was a year of challenge and transformation — a year that tested us, pushed us, and ultimately strengthened us. Through hard work and the unwavering support of our community, we recommitted to our mission and positioned ourselves for the critical fights ahead. Read on about our recent work to expose voter suppression and our wins from the end of the year, as we prepare for what 2025 will bring: Not today, Georgia State Election Board In a big win for Georgia voters and our democracy, a judge found seven of the election rules passed by Trump-endorsed members on Georgia’s State Election Board “illegal, unconstitutional, and void,” striking them down a couple weeks before Election Day. The rules included changes that could have empowered local election officials — some who still believe Donald Trump’s 2020 election lies — to delay the certification of election results, delay election results being tabulated, and undermine confidence in the 2024 election. Democracy Champions won big in Georgia During the November election, Fair Fight endorsed and supported 61 local Georgia candidates — and saw 50 win their elections outright. In the House of Representatives, Floyd Gridding (District 149), Tangie Herring (District 145), and Bryce Berry (District 56), flipped Republican-held seats and defeated extreme anti-democratic Republicans. We know these Democracy Champions will work to ensure Georgians can freely cast their ballots and fight for working people, so that our future elections reflect the will of the people. Voter Outreach Milestones In the months and weeks leading up to the November election, our volunteers showed up in full force to help voters stay informed and cast their ballots. We sent over 2 million texts, knocked on over 45,000 doors in competitive districts, and provided information or assistance to 20,000+ voters, which helped us win races in Georgia’s House of Representatives. We couldn’t have done this work without you, and we’re incredibly grateful for this team! The Fair Fight team is shifting into resistance preparation mode as we look ahead to another four years of Trump and an administration that is bent on rolling back freedoms and attacking our democracy. = Yours in Solidarity, Fair Fight | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:
#
On his first day back in the White House, Trump issued 26 executive orders—**ranging from pardoning 1,500 people including violent criminals against law enforcement to ending birthright citizenship.**
This is a difficult moment but we cannot resign ourselves to despair or cynicism. Beto is still committed to fighting for the future of Texas and our country.
In response to Trump returning to the White House, we’re setting a rapid response goal to raise $25,000 by the end of this week.
**Your donation will help us lay the groundwork to improve our voter outreach efforts for 2026.**
[**Will you make a $3 donation right now to help us reach this critical goal? Every donation will help our work to fight for the future of Texas and elect Democrats in the future.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250122.bKOy90&refcode=ema20250122-239953&t=1&akid=239953%2E444211%2ETvAaWb)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250122.bKOy90&refcode=ema20250122-239953&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239953%2E444211%2ETvAaWb)**
Our work ahead isn’t just about opposing Trump. It's about fighting for our vision of what Texas and America can be.
Thank you so much for your support,
Team Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=239953%2E444211%2ETvAaWb).
clean_body: On his first day back in the White House, Trump issued 26 executive orders—ranging from pardoning 1,500 people including violent criminals against law enforcement to ending birthright citizenship. This is a difficult moment but we cannot resign ourselves to despair or cynicism. Beto is still committed to fighting for the future of Texas and our country. In response to Trump returning to the White House, we’re setting a rapid response goal to raise $25,000 by the end of this week. Your donation will help us lay the groundwork to improve our voter outreach efforts for 2026. Our work ahead isn’t just about opposing Trump. It's about fighting for our vision of what Texas and America can be. Thank you so much for your support, Team Powered by People Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Take action NOW to protect our communities
body:

Hi Peter,
In the face of mounting threats to immigrant communities from the Trump administration — including many care workers and families — our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance, has put together a bilingual immigrant rights resource webpage.
**[**_Please read and share this webpage with your network, so we can ensure as many people as possible have the information and resources they need to protect themselves and their families from deportation >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100808130/523966433/467336193?ms=012225_resources&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDRkZjlkNy0wM2Q5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e9exMcGs66EGns1cgOIr-XvXwO1apHJ30nJxLwu09fI=&emci=b605616c-f1d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d04df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=864787) **
_The webpage is available in both English and Spanish:_

Immigrant care workers are not alone. Amongst the fear and uncertainty of the moment, our new webpage is filled with important immigrant rights information, including:
* A run-down of legal rights, regardless of immigration status
* [**_Local legal service provider listing_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100808133/523966436/-1660809177?ms=012225_resources&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDRkZjlkNy0wM2Q5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e9exMcGs66EGns1cgOIr-XvXwO1apHJ30nJxLwu09fI=&emci=b605616c-f1d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=d04df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=864787)
* Creating a family emergency plan
* Care workers’ rights on the job

The Trump administration’s immediate actions threaten millions of care workers and immigrants in our communities. Together we are stronger, and it will take all of us to support our communities. You can start by sharing resources and staying informed.

name: Kim Schrier
subject: The ripple effects of Roe’s reversal have been devastating.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The legacy of Roe, and the road ahead. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100808232/523966578/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjRkZjlkNy0wM2Q5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysznk7Dt84pilOYVdbgr9nBQL5KRsrF9W5ymS_Ib6xw=&emci=816d382c-4dd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=cf4df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15820338)
---
Today marks the anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision, a landmark decision that protected the right to choose for nearly half a century.

**But, Peter, this year feels different.**

_Roe_ is no longer the law of the land, and the ripple effects of its reversal have been devastating.

As a doctor, I’ve spent years working with patients as they make deeply personal decisions about their health and futures. **I know that abortion is not political, it’s healthcare.**

It’s about ensuring people can access the care they need when they need it, no matter their circumstances. Now, with _Roe_ gone, we’re seeing the real consequences of the relentless attacks on reproductive freedom from extremist Republicans.

Patients are being denied life-saving care. Women are being forced to carry pregnancies against their will. And the attacks aren’t stopping with abortion. We know what’s next: Republicans have already started going after IVF and birth control. Peter, this is personal for me – I’ve spent years fighting for access to healthcare, and I refuse to let extremists take us backward.

That’s why, as your representative, I will always stand up for bodily autonomy. But I can’t do this alone. We need to send a clear message that we won’t stand for this. That’s why I’m asking you to take action today. [**Will you add your name to my petition to demand Republicans let us make our own healthcare decisions? →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100808234/523966580/-804102715?ms=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&refcode=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&source=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=rK6qxz/tRGlfpFBKFz9IzLuPEbvTp2sg1WwfoqoHFSYPJwEn6IElggt68BNUtjvy/6UBGvazCpNnhL0IZpj/pWHVeTuY6eoadm5ZymS78rGmaFYt2MCouuMuO9mqYJe3Ub+WkVqBkLkKeeIxnHyz1vjf3Dan9D63/PsnrPQg69M=&refcode2=cf4df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjRkZjlkNy0wM2Q5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysznk7Dt84pilOYVdbgr9nBQL5KRsrF9W5ymS_Ib6xw=&emci=816d382c-4dd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=cf4df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15820338) [SIGN THE PETITION TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100808236/523966582/-804102715?ms=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&refcode=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&source=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250122_roepet_adv_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=rK6qxz/tRGlfpFBKFz9IzLuPEbvTp2sg1WwfoqoHFSYPJwEn6IElggt68BNUtjvy/6UBGvazCpNnhL0IZpj/pWHVeTuY6eoadm5ZymS78rGmaFYt2MCouuMuO9mqYJe3Ub+WkVqBkLkKeeIxnHyz1vjf3Dan9D63/PsnrPQg69M=&refcode2=cf4df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjRkZjlkNy0wM2Q5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ysznk7Dt84pilOYVdbgr9nBQL5KRsrF9W5ymS_Ib6xw=&emci=816d382c-4dd8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=cf4df9d7-03d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=15820338) Thank you,

clean_body: The legacy of Roe, and the road ahead. Today marks the anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision, a landmark decision that protected the right to choose for nearly half a century. But, Peter, this year feels different. Roe is no longer the law of the land, and the ripple effects of its reversal have been devastating. As a doctor, I’ve spent years working with patients as they make deeply personal decisions about their health and futures. I know that abortion is not political, it’s healthcare. It’s about ensuring people can access the care they need when they need it, no matter their circumstances. Now, with Roe gone, we’re seeing the real consequences of the relentless attacks on reproductive freedom from extremist Republicans. Patients are being denied life-saving care. Women are being forced to carry pregnancies against their will. And the attacks aren’t stopping with abortion. We know what’s next: Republicans have already started going after IVF and birth control. Peter, this is personal for me – I’ve spent years fighting for access to healthcare, and I refuse to let extremists take us backward. That’s why, as your representative, I will always stand up for bodily autonomy. But I can’t do this alone. We need to send a clear message that we won’t stand for this. That’s why I’m asking you to take action today. Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Peter, today marks the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s landmark Roe v. Wade ruling, which enshrined reproductive freedom as a fundamental right.

But instead of being a cause for celebration, today is a solemn reminder that progress is never guaranteed. I’m committed to restoring the right to choose for women nationwide – but I need your help, Peter. Despite the decades of precedent behind the Roe ruling, the conservative Supreme Court, shaped by Donald Trump’s presidency, voted to overturn it – sending shockwaves throughout our country. Since then, 12 states have passed complete bans on abortion.

In 2023, the North Carolina General Assembly passed a 12 week abortion ban. Even with this legislation, North Carolina remains one of the least restrictive states in the South for reproductive rights. And as long as I’m your representative, I will do everything possible to keep it that way. During his first press conference back in office, President Donald Trump **[SNAPPED at a disrespectful reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/10266691-32a4-4057-9e95-c126b9a40a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for interrupting and talking over him several times while he was trying to answer his question.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/10266691-32a4-4057-9e95-c126b9a40a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The reporter questioned Trump's decision to pardon the Janauray 6 participants he released by signing an executive order on inauguration day. "Aren't you sending a message that assaulting officers is okay with these pardons?" the reporter asked.
"No," Trump answered quickly. "I am the friend of police, more than any president who's been in this office."
The reporter tried to use a quote from JD Vance to stump Trump, saying that Vance told the press that violent rioters should not be pardoned. "Why is the Vice President wrong?" he asked, leading the response.
As Trump began to answer the reporter jumped in, interrupting more than once.
**[Watch Trump put him in his place!](https://substack.com/redirect/10266691-32a4-4057-9e95-c126b9a40a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **Trump finds letter left by Biden, What he does next is AMAZING!**
Fox News reporter Peter Doocy helped President Donald Trump **[find Joe Biden's letter](https://substack.com/redirect/3c3b49ac-3282-4db7-a1ee-a7231373ecd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** left inside the desk of the Oval Office, immediately following the inauguration.
"What's in there?" Trump asked Doocy, who asked him to check inside the desk. "Oh, thank you Peter! It could, have been years before we found this."
What Trump does next is hilarious. "Maybe we should all read it together..."

# Trump's Cabinet picks stood like spartans against a bitter democrat onslaught
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0114f158-f072-4a2f-9258-e95e89f1d22e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Support Mayor Giuliani and get access to his latest exclusive content by becoming a PolitiBrawl paid subscriber
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..rKbi-8cDfEYJle-IT8jXKGnl6BJujrpFdh8Yx4F0ojc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155467755)
This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm. He articulated a vision for a "warrior culture" at the Pentagon, promising to be a "change agent" in an institution that desperately needs one. His responses to Senators like Elizabeth Warren, who tried to pin him down with her usual sanctimonious blather, were nothing short of masterful. Hegseth didn't just defend himself; he turned the tables, leaving Warren looking like the petty politician she is. His commitment to the military and understanding of its needs were clear, and the Democrats' attempts to portray him as unfit only highlighted their own lack of understanding of what our military needs...

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Can you believe this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila is determined to lead with one theme in mind: people over profits.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250122-4691-footer&t=1&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)
Can you believe this, Peter?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250122?refcode=em20250122-4691&amount=3&refcode2=4691_420207_UtC0Cg&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)
One of Donald Trump’s first acts in his second term was to raise drug prices for people on Medicare and Medicaid — a _massive_ giveaway to the pharmaceutical industry.
**Pramila is determined to lead with one theme in mind: people over profits. But Donald Trump and Big Pharma are doing just the opposite —[will you pitch in $3 to our people-powered campaign today and help Pramila fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250122?refcode=em20250122-4691&amount=3&refcode2=4691_420207_UtC0Cg&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)**
Lowering drug prices has been a long standing fight for our progressive movement. But it’s just one part of a much bigger battle.
Now with Donald Trump back in the White House, **it’s time for Democrats to coalesce around Medicare for All** and make it clear to voters that the next time we have power, we will end the practice of corporations gouging us on our health care.
Pramila is working every day to organize Democrats around bold, populist, pro-worker policies like Medicare for All, but she needs your support to keep going.
[**Peter, will you pitch in $3 or any amount to help Pramila keep fighting to guarantee everyone can get the care they need without breaking the bank?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250122?refcode=em20250122-4691&amount=3&refcode2=4691_420207_UtC0Cg&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250122?amount=3&refcode=em20250122-4691&refcode2=4691_420207_UtC0Cg&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)**
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250122-4691-footer&t=2&refcode2=4691_420207_UtC0Cg&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4691%2E420207%2EUtC0Cg)

name: New Dems
subject: Sign to fight back against the “Project 2025” agenda >>

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: reflecting on the 3rd year without Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
As we steel ourselves to face the second Trump administration, I carry these wins with me in my commitment to continue advocating for reproductive freedom here in West Michigan and across the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100810251/523975866/1005607783?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTEzYjJkNC0wYWQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCkUsIfroF-BdSR5rhTtKBbRwZMQfIPes0245qTAwwM=)
---
| Today, we should be celebrating the 52 anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , but we’re instead marking the 3rd year since Donald Trump’s conservative Supreme Court overturned it. As a result, millions of Americans have fewer rights than the generation before them.

Since then, we’ve seen a relentless campaign by the Republican party to continue stripping away our bodily autonomy at the local, state, and federal levels. At the same time, we’ve seen millions of Americans rise to protect it. In the last election, 7 out of 10 states voted to enshrine reproductive rights into their state constitutions, including in historically conservative states. And despite the disappointing election results, voters here in Michigan’s 3rd district voted to send a pro-choice woman back to Congress.

As we steel ourselves to face the second Trump administration, I carry these wins with me in my commitment to continue advocating for reproductive freedom here in West Michigan and across the country. Though we face an uphill battle in our fight to restore reproductive rights nationwide, these wins reaffirm my belief that a better future is possible.

**As I work to restore reproductive rights nationwide, I also have my sights set on the 2026 midterm elections. The earlier we build momentum, the better our chances are in winning back a pro-choice majority in Congress.[_I hope I can count on your support with a contribution of any amount right now and gain more ground in 2026._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100810252/523975868/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTEzYjJkNC0wYWQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCkUsIfroF-BdSR5rhTtKBbRwZMQfIPes0245qTAwwM=)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100810254/523975869/591366052?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTEzYjJkNC0wYWQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCkUsIfroF-BdSR5rhTtKBbRwZMQfIPes0245qTAwwM=)

Hillary

body:
52 years ago today...

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100810295/523976028/-782210259?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Roe_250122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTViOTYxYi0wYmQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hb0dTQwI_RHY4o8sKDs4YvkcSzG3u2HCF8k8Vie32qo=) Derek,

Today, we should be celebrating 52 years of the Supreme Court issuing its landmark decision in _Roe v. Wade_. But thanks to the Supreme Court – led by justices appointed by President Trump in his last term – _Roe_ was overturned and we continue to witness GOP-controlled states enact dangerous restrictions on abortion.

In the Senate, I’m doing everything I can to protect women’s access to care, whether that’s securing contraception access or protecting the right to travel for care. But if we want to make sure reproductive health care for women in every corner of the country is protected, we need to flip the Senate in 2026 so we can codify _Roe_ into law.

[_**I’m on the ballot in 2026, and I need you with me in this fight. Will you pitch in $1, $5, or whatever you can to flip the Senate blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100810296/523976029/-782210259?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Roe_250122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTViOTYxYi0wYmQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hb0dTQwI_RHY4o8sKDs4YvkcSzG3u2HCF8k8Vie32qo=)

Right now, Virginia is the only state in the South without a post-_Roe_ abortion ban. We’ve avoided attacks on the fundamental right to abortion in Virginia because we came together and elected Democrats to our General Assembly.

Now we need to band together and recommit to doing the same thing in Washington.

**I trust women and their doctors to make their own decisions.[_If you’re with me, donate right now so we can flip the Senate in 2026 and protect and expand the right to choose at the federal level clean_body: 52 years ago today... | | | = Derek, Today, we should be celebrating 52 years of the Supreme Court issuing its landmark decision in Roe v. Wade. But thanks to the Supreme Court – led by justices appointed by President Trump in his last term – Roe was overturned and we continue to witness GOP-controlled states enact dangerous restrictions on abortion. In the Senate, I’m doing everything I can to protect women’s access to care, whether that’s securing contraception access or protecting the right to travel for care. But if we want to make sure reproductive health care for women in every corner of the country is protected, we need to flip the Senate in 2026 so we can codify Roe into law. = Right now, Virginia is the only state in the South without a post-Roe abortion ban. We’ve avoided attacks on the fundamental right to abortion in Virginia because we came together and elected Democrats to our General Assembly. Now we need to band together and recommit to doing the same thing in Washington. I trust women and their doctors to make their own decisions.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Today I reintroduce my Neighbors not Enemies Act. Will you personally endorse the bill?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)

Friend,
Today I am officially reintroducing my _Neighbors not Enemies Act_ in Congress, which would repeal the longstanding _Alien Enemies Act._
[**If that’s all you need to hear, add your name and endorse my legislation. Otherwise, please continue to read on.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-neighbors-act/?source=em250122-1-60&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-neighbors-act/?source=em250122-1-60&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**
Here’s the quick breakdown: The laws known as the ‘Alien and Sedition Acts’ were passed in 1787 with the explicit goal of politically targeting immigrants in our country.
While some of these laws were repealed, the _Alien Enemies Act_ is still intact today. It was used to carry out Japanese internment during World War II. This outdated and xenophobic law is an offense to our values as a nation, which should stand as a refuge for those fleeing violence and persecution.
My bill would repeal the _Alien Enemies Act_ and close policy loopholes that can be exploited at the expense of immigrant communities. We must learn from historical mistakes built on fear of the other and embrace a fair and just immigration system.
[**Friend — I am asking for your support as I introduce this crucial legislation. Please, add your name here to endorse my bill and help us show a groundswell of support for this commonsense idea.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-neighbors-act/?source=em250122-1-60&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan25-neighbors-act/?source=em250122-1-60&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1462_791427_dnkAE9&akid=1462%2E791427%2EdnkAE9)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Giffords.org

body:
#

If you look up the Office of Gun Violence Prevention on the White House website, here’s what you’ll find:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250122-1-b&t=1&akid=9873%2E3935704%2EGlIDOR)
While President Trump hasn’t made an official announcement that he has dismantled the Office of Gun Violence Prevention, this isn’t a great sign.
The Office of Gun Violence Prevention has been a first-of-its-kind federal government effort to coordinate with states and federal officials to stop violence, invest in community intervention programs, respond to shootings, and support survivors.
We know that seeing the future of this lifesaving office in jeopardy is extremely disappointing, but we can’t give up hope. Now is the time we must stay laser-focused on working with the US House, US Senate, and state legislatures across the country to fight back against the MAGA right’s efforts to roll back our gun safety progress.
[**Are you with us? Please, chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help fuel our fight to save lives from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250122-1-b&t=2&akid=9873%2E3935704%2EGlIDOR)

subject: re: Roe v. Wade

body:
---

body:
Peter, I need your immediate attention.

Mike Johnson just hand-picked a MAGA ally to lead our House Intelligence Committee.

Let me repeat that, Peter: Instead of putting the people first, Johnson and Trump are playing politics by rewarding the most extreme members with leadership positions. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need an immediate response — 504 gifts in the next 7 hours — to stop Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in their tracks, prove that their schemes have no place in our government, and make sure we elect common-sense Democrats in this next election. Together, we can create an undeniable wave of support for our Democrats and flip three critical seats in the upcoming special elections. Will you chip in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

I’ll tell you what I just told Alex Wagner, Peter:

My colleagues and I are working hard on the House Intelligence Committee to protect the safety of our country.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We thought they could never take away our rights. We were wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Help Democrats and me fight back against the GOP
| | |
---
Friend,

For almost half a century, the Supreme Court’s ruling in _Roe v. Wade_ protected a woman’s right to make personal decisions about her own body and health care.

It seemed like this right had become immutable in our country and could never be taken away.

Instead, just one devastating election for Democrats in 2016 led to three new conservative Supreme Court justices who were able to strip away the rights of millions of women across generations. This allowed Republican legislatures to attack reproductive freedom and ban abortion in states across our country like never before.

**Now more than ever, we know we can never take any of our rights for granted.**

After years of fighting to ban abortion, Trump and Republicans are now claiming they won’t use their new power in Washington to push through a national abortion ban. _We can’t afford to make the mistake of believing them._

_Roe v. Wade_ taught us that as long as women have any rights in our country, it’s only a matter of time before Republicans like Trump, Mike Johnson, and John Thune try to take them away. In fact, Trump’s pick for Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, has even argued that women shouldn’t be allowed to serve in combat roles.

It’s not a question of whether they’ll stop trying to take away our rights, friend. It’s simply a question of when and what’s next.

That’s why the only way for us to protect our rights is to help Democrats win elections. And having just defended my seat in a highly competitive state that Trump won, _**I can tell you that the best way to do that is to start now.**_

So if you want someone to fight for the same rights that Republicans are trying to take away from us, please: **_[Donate $5 or more now to help me win in Nevada, help Democrats take back the Senate, and help stop the GOP!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100811274/523979651/-939119864?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5436-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWVmOTk5Zi0wZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WtKUVClANKgbzM_VsrqrpcI243MUMnz0dLO4G0XnnuI=)_**

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Trump’s billionaire backers are worth $1.2 TRILLION
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Trump’s inauguration on Monday was stacked with billionaires on
billionaires, whose combined net worth adds up to $1.2 TRILLION.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250122?refcode=em20250122-36355&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36355_1203867_5VMM7w&akid=36355%2E1203867%2E5VMM7w ]Tweet from The Nation: It’s fitting that the most notable image from
Donald Trump’s inauguration was a photo of the billionaires in a front
row, writes @lehmannchris. They are the true beneficiaries of Trump’s
second presidency.

Four of the five richest men in the world were in attendance after
shelling out millions of dollars to support Trump. They notably had even
better seats than Trump’s Cabinet, with many actual elected officials and
their spouses excluded from attending. Thanks to Citizens United,
corporations and billionaires have more power and influence over our
government than ever before.

What’s worse is that these right-wing billionaire CEOs control the largest
tech and social media companies that the public relies on for information
and communication: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, and TikTok. All of
these platforms have become friendlier to the far-right, recently rolling
back fact-checking and hate speech protections in light of Trump’s
victory.

And we’ve all seen the pro-Trump propaganda pushed by TikTok in light of
the President promising to save it (despite being the one to propose
banning it in the first place). Trump is now suggesting one of his
billionaire donors Elon Musk or Larry Ellison should purchase it, which
would only worsen the misinformation and propaganda we’re seeing.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250122?refcode=em20250122-36355&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36355_1203867_5VMM7w&akid=36355%2E1203867%2E5VMM7w ]CNBC: Trump says he’s open to TikTok sale to Elon Musk or Larry Ellison

With billionaires buying access to the halls of power, kissing Trump’s
ring, and controlling the most widely-used social media platforms, we
desperately need more working-class leaders in Congress to fight back
against this oligarchy.

Justice Democrats is actively working to recruit and support as many
progressive candidates from working-class backgrounds to run for office as
possible in 2026 — but since we don’t take corporate PAC money, our
success depends directly on grassroots support from folks like you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250122?refcode=em20250122-36355&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36355_1203867_5VMM7w&akid=36355%2E1203867%2E5VMM7w ]With our February 1 fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, can we
count on you to pitch in $5 or more to ensure we reach our
$100,000 goal?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250122?refcode=em20250122-36355&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36355_1203867_5VMM7w&akid=36355%2E1203867%2E5VMM7w ]Contribute $5

The more we raise now, the more working-class champions we can send to
Congress to take on the far-right elite and restore power to the people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250122-36355-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36355_1203867_5VMM7w&akid=36355%2E1203867%2E5VMM7w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36355%2E1203867%2E5VMM7w

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | | **Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1uozAUhZ_G7ILsezE4Cy8mQWQx0kiTTdVVZPxT3OIANgGlT1-RRrm7c88nnU-FsffuLkl1IACdN4kAEPxDAKb3NcTbZ_h72t1XrHdT-S_wrYXjE13gBV-1iqfD8f95SV-pXqfb_ruaFvbC5_toX_BzNLdB-X77VnVmJDpDi8xKVmHFRcEpzzopWImF45yK1glOueMci4K3irE9tmgyL4ECpwy2Y7jPDdcUUSjnRCusbklBHzu5CjZ6rViaVxXjMIRcDyHrZTfPY3qINQSaaGI-Kz17rfrUDeNoY361M4FGOXfRBJvBORsv3hCsGVAkUG7Nb6YonjndWoL1m4rnYQgMIIvSjKvve5_KihT04-G0GSwSfgIAAP__ZBB1UQ). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.

* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.

* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.

* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

Showcase Presidential Pride : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office. | | | | | | An Heirloom for Generations This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience. Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations. What Our Collectors Are Saying: “The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer “I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors TheLimited Edition Trump Knife Collection is available for a short time. With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete. This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history. Sincerely, TrumpKnifeSet.com P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.

name: Crow HQ
subject: Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Would you believe that Jason and Donald Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, actually have something in common?

Both served as combat veterans. Regrettably, that’s where the similarities end. While Jason and Hegseth both served this country in uniform, it’s clear that Hegseth learned a different lesson from his service than Jason did.

As a paratrooper and Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan, Jason learned what it means to serve and do right by the American people. He put his life on the line every day to protect his country and fellow soldiers — regardless of their race, gender, or background.

Since leaving the military, Hegseth has consistently undercut the commitment and service of the hundreds of thousands of women who serve in the U.S. military by arguing that women should not serve in uniform.

Someone like this has no business being in charge of our troops.

Jason’s military service was defined by a shared sense of duty, devotion, and sacrifice. He fought alongside men and women overseas — and the only thing that mattered was their commitment to our country and their fellow soldiers, not their gender.

Right now, women are serving our country all across the world in some of the most dangerous locations imaginable — all for the freedom of every American, including Pete Hegseth. They deserve to continue to have the opportunity to serve in combat units just as they’ve been doing.

Will you stand with Jason in this fight by making a donation today? Your support will help him continue to be one of the leading voices for our military in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-jan25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Pastor Paula White
subject: Pray for even more victories
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=891c76d4a8894e9dbb7253a91b879a2f&_e=J_L2fXgyss2vsDmyTtWiZ-4E3X2Tvtwh3zxSNGpBW65hveweTvg--t5F7wUmtWa-vMNhyJ4uDTje2CNQhWdugGX9eMTFomvivEm3_Uxn5Ytt8WQ6y_Gjz-IMX96-MMWPj0TzKtP49GkKLPUck5GyhSJBA3PnF_eN7pJp-1jXXxSdAxTlUcA5p_zPJeX1pMo133LOky2m8ZYGBPYPUaWX3EJmL47PdEXYC7idgLIfNPCJnUPTeuAKu-w_vyZmvwODZ8SSieWtfrd5YMRUYSaiZEvoMRDf39ulcMZNu-UIkEUnzQI-CWhqjJmjprTYX2Z92UyeaVB0d4_zy-fDnM_aZERhtR11sn3VmmmC8tmJ298579Sa9DVt9GsB6yJZHr5z2XTlANLtExYoe9VgidJEUoK2vkgjhY7QOYGsJixr8NkZgdIxWYsguE24xt9NgzxC)
---
Peter,

In 2024, People of Faith achieved MASSIVE victories proving that our collective voice, steeped in the power of prayer and unwavering conviction, can shape the future of our great nation. As we look to 2025, we must not lose this momentum; we must commit to praying fervently for America.

[Pray For America](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=891c76d4a8894e9dbb7253a91b879a2f&_e=J_L2fXgyss2vsDmyTtWiZ-4E3X2Tvtwh3zxSNGpBW65hveweTvg--t5F7wUmtWa-vMNhyJ4uDTje2CNQhWdugGX9eMTFomvivEm3_Uxn5Ytt8WQ6y_Gjz-IMX96-MMWPj0TzKtP49GkKLPUck5GyhSJBA3PnF_eN7pJp-1jXXxSdAxTlUcA5p_zPJeX1pMo133LOky2m8ZYGBPYPUaWX3EJmL47PdEXYC7idgLIfNPCJnUPTeuAKu-w_vyZmvwODZ8SSieWtfrd5YMRUYSaiZAzGHp3TPCXXp50kW-U_BOx5VqJnPltzB-kRkRxb0wrC5jy3Avhy5Y50kqI9JSi2YsKhVtbeiUw2KVA3YsSCV1tZQdyQuV9Ib-naWIvepHC7tqm4cIMmAuM9SNZOtMnBXmvF0QwDULFTM2yt-gHwMGCRXTiCT7sf4Zm2iRAwPxyk)

We at the National Faith Advisory Board stand resolute in our mission to unite Christians nationwide. Our shared values—protecting religious freedom, promoting family values, and defending life at all stages—are under siege. Now more than ever, we need your prayers as a bulwark against these challenges.
President Trump, a stalwart advocate for our community, has consistently championed our cause, and we can’t wait to see what he does next. His Faith and Opportunity Initiative has paved the way for lasting generational change. Together, we can ensure that people of faith remain a formidable force in shaping policy and safeguarding our liberties.

[Pray For America](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=891c76d4a8894e9dbb7253a91b879a2f&_e=J_L2fXgyss2vsDmyTtWiZ-4E3X2Tvtwh3zxSNGpBW65hveweTvg--t5F7wUmtWa-vMNhyJ4uDTje2CNQhWdugGX9eMTFomvivEm3_Uxn5Ytt8WQ6y_Gjz-IMX96-MMWPj0TzKtP49GkKLPUck5GyhSJBA3PnF_eN7pJp-1jXXxSdAxTlUcA5p_zPJeX1pMo133LOky2m8ZYGBPYPUaWX3EJmL47PdEXYC7idgLIfNPCJnUPTeuAKu-w_vyZmvwODZ8SSieWtfrd5YMRUYSaiZGXag0_9wmvEevVOp3VR_0ek9CQNskqFMhYN-ctoPL7Dj79QUFs9LaBNDpje7nux1zFc3rq2IK7fbMncX9lF1P8ttg8PaF-8F1i9N6nW80YxKSjOpyEhglTC_eLT_n_JtK60MT-21viNj0D31xLdtdGtqK3yIcfBDwPNgvU6OMOd)

Join us through adversity. Let us unite, as a powerful voice, to influence the course of our nation with God's guidance.
In faith and unity,
Pastor Paula WhitePresident, National Faith Advisory Board

Copyright © National Faith Advisory Board, All rights reserved.
505 E. McCormick Rd
Apopka, FL 32703

name: Jocelyn Benson for Governor
subject: We had to reach out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=51%2E181023%2ELQUO01)
Team,
There’s been a huge wave of support for Jocelyn Benson today — and we’re proud that so many people already believe in her mission to fight for all Michiganders.
But we had to reach out — **we’re still short of where we need to be.** This is critical to starting this campaign strong, and it could determine how the next weeks and months of this race proceed. **[Will you rush a contribution before it’s too late?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-4?refcode=em20250122-4&refcode2=51_181023_LQUO01&akid=51%2E181023%2ELQUO01)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250122-4?amount=5&refcode=em20250122-4&refcode2=51_181023_LQUO01&akid=51%2E181023%2ELQUO01)**
This is a marathon, not a sprint, so how we start this race is going to set the pace for Jocelyn’s campaign.
Thank you for your support.
— Team Benson

52 years ago today, the Supreme Court enshrined a woman’s constitutional right to make her own private health care decisions in _Roe v. Wade_. Three years ago, extreme right-wing Supreme Court Justices appointed by Donald Trump ripped those rights away. The GOP immediately pounced, passing draconian abortion bans here in Georgia and in states across the country — a devastating outcome that Trump has proudly claimed credit for. Today, with Donald Trump back in the White House and Republicans controlling Congress, abortion rights are at risk more now than ever before. Trump has even said there should be “punishment” for women who receive abortions. Meanwhile, Democrats here in Georgia and across the country are working to enshrine reproductive rights into law, protecting women’s fundamental freedom to control their own health care decisions. [Make no mistake — reproductive freedom is in danger, and it’s up to all of us to protect it. Rush a donation to Georgia Democrats right now to help us elect pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026 and beyond:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100811688/523980940/1073717532?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_012225_1_1_Roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZhM2ZlMS0wZmQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eUfwQJLR-sdjiNIpu7HD4lhQdeV_23YosFRUQIGfwVY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m running for Governor of Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Every Michigander should be able to pay their bills, put food on the table, and take care of their families.

| Peter,

“We have a responsibility to ensure that everyone gets a fair shot in life.”

That’s what my parents taught me growing up, and I’ve carried that lesson every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State.

**I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot.**

[_**If you’re with me, will you make a founding contribution of any amount today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100811996/523981658/-737615161?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-22_1&refcode2=ffp-benson-em-20250122&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyOWI0MjY2LTEwZDktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e-eC7U8rE74xst6XXn8vR8DTESdlWLMaO1yaw6F_V2k=)

I’m ready for this work. I’ve investigated radical extremist groups, taught civil rights and voting rights law, and I ran for Secretary of State to make sure government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted.

Some people didn’t like that very much — but I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities.

**I’m running for Governor to truly make government work for everyone.** We need transparent leadership, safe schools and neighborhoods, and good education and childcare. Every Michigander should be able to pay their bills, put food on the table, and take care of their families.

[_**That’s what I’m ready to fight for as Michigan’s next Governor. Please, will you chip in $5 today to become a founding donor and help us launch this campaign?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100811997/523981659/-737615161?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-01-22_1&refcode2=ffp-benson-em-20250122&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyOWI0MjY2LTEwZDktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e-eC7U8rE74xst6XXn8vR8DTESdlWLMaO1yaw6F_V2k=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Let’s make community colleges tuition-free. 🎓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If we want to prepare the next generation for a highly competitive world, we need to get serious about what education in the 21st century looks like.
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
If we want to prepare the next generation for a highly competitive world, we need to get ***serious*** about what education in the 21st century looks like. 🎓
The problem is pretty obvious. The price of college is outrageous, and there aren’t enough opportunities for young folks who don’t think college is the right option for them.
**We need to increase investments in career and technical programs for people who don’t pursue college. And for those who do, we should make community colleges tuition-free.**
I was fortunate to get a solid education that helped to set me on a solid path.
Now I’ll work with anyone in Washington to make sure *everyone* in all 67 PA counties can get one too.
[**Can you kick in $5 to help me keep this seat 🔵 so we can get this done? With so much $$$ spent to flip PA red last year, I’m counting on yinz to help me keep up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250122?refcode=em20250122-9818&refcode2=9818_434096_ebjdfk&akid=9818%2E434096%2Eebjdfk)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250122?amount=5&refcode=em20250122-9818&refcode2=9818_434096_ebjdfk&akid=9818%2E434096%2Eebjdfk)**
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250122-9818-footer&t=1&refcode2=9818_434096_ebjdfk&akid=9818%2E434096%2Eebjdfk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9818%2E434096%2Eebjdfk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9818%2E434096%2Eebjdfk)

Team, I'm Nellie Pou — Congresswoman representing New Jersey's 9th District. Earlier this month, I had the honor of being sworn into Congress alongside my colleagues. The days ahead will be difficult but you have my word that I will always fight hard for North Jersey families. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100812495/523983662/-3691057?refcode=250121_np_bio_v4_img&ms=250122_np_bio_v4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk2MmJkMGEtMTRkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zgyaYAlGn4ffFPCHVUUY2IHNFAdhK5IiVuyJvgV65PU=)** Since entering public office, I've fought to make our schools better for our kids, make health care affordable, and fix our broken criminal justice system. These are challenging fights — but they're necessary, and also personal to me. The story of how we got here is complicated — this is the seat once held by my mentor, the late Bill Pascrell. Bill taught me a thing or two about being New Jersey tough. He left big shoes to fill but the work must continue, especially as we hurtle toward a second Trump term. Donald Trump won our district and my race was the closest this district has seen in a long time - **we won with under 51 percent of the vote!** Protecting this seat and regaining our House majority starts now. **Mike Johnson and the Republicans are already coming after me and they are preparing to spend millions to try to steal this seat.** **[So I have just one favor to ask: will you join hundreds of others and add your name to endorse my re-election campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100812496/523983663/644317014?ms=250122_np_bio_v4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk2MmJkMGEtMTRkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zgyaYAlGn4ffFPCHVUUY2IHNFAdhK5IiVuyJvgV65PU=&emci=ec2e4b97-47d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f962bd0a-14d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=17143604)** **[Sign on now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100812497/523983664/644317014?ms=250122_np_bio_v4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk2MmJkMGEtMTRkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zgyaYAlGn4ffFPCHVUUY2IHNFAdhK5IiVuyJvgV65PU=&emci=ec2e4b97-47d8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=f962bd0a-14d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=17143604)** We wouldn't be where we are today without our supporters, and having your official endorsement would mean the world to me. Thank you. Congresswoman Nellie Pou (NJ-09)
| Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. name: Bob Casey
subject: One of the greatest blessings in my life has been the blessing of public service.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Serving Pennsylvania has been the honor of a lifetime.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/2424?t=1&akid=4890%2E552475%2EwSzhCg)
Hi Peter,
Growing up in Scranton, Pennsylvania, I remember my mother, Ellen Harding Casey, often saying, “Count your blessings.”
That’s something I’ve thought about a lot lately beginning with my deep, abiding gratitude to the people of Pennsylvania. It has been a privilege and an honor to serve them and our Commonwealth in three statewide public offices for 28 consecutive years as Auditor General, State Treasurer, and United States Senator.
There is an inscription on the Finance Building in Harrisburg that guided my work all these years: **“All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”**
One of the greatest blessings in my life has been the blessing of public service.
As the scriptures tell us, “It is in giving that we receive.”
Dr. Martin Luther King said, “Everybody can be great because everybody can serve.” King taught us that the word “great” in this context isn’t about fame, acclaim, or notoriety. It’s about something more valuable: **the opportunity to help others.**
I want to be clear that public service is not limited to Congress or elected office — it starts in our neighborhoods. If we look around, we will always find ways to take care of the people around us.
Everyone has something to give. This includes me.
Serving in the U.S. Senate has been the honor of a lifetime. Now I will continue to do my part, to serve as a citizen and a Pennsylvanian.
Service doesn’t have to be complicated, either. It can be as simple as volunteering at a food bank, donating spare clothing, or calling your elected officials to pass a piece of legislation to help the most vulnerable.
As we begin a new year, I hope that you will find an opportunity to serve your own community. Whether that’s giving an hour of your time once a week or just once a month, because every act of service has meaning.
You can learn more about service opportunities near you **[here.](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/2430?t=2&akid=4890%2E552475%2EwSzhCg)**
I’m wishing you and your loved ones all the best in 2025.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=4890%2E552475%2EwSzhCg)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=4890%2E552475%2EwSzhCg)

Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Alan Cohn
subject: The 52nd Anniversary of Roe v Wade
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100812652/523984527/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA4ZGVlOWItMTRkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=00fsE-qJ1SoKAoopBxKjiO5wqdS3qULBXV7b56pe9eI=&emci=ea340bcc-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=708dee9b-14d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
52 years ago today, the Supreme Court in Roe vs. Wade, ensured women of their right to make their healthcare decisions.
It was the law of the land.
Until it wasn’t.
It was Donald Trump’s radical right-wing justices who robbed women of their constitutional rights two years ago.
It was the victory of a movement that worked steadily for decades to overturn access to abortion rights.
Let’s be honest. We Democrats always look to the next election. Our opponents take a long-term strategic approach, and, in this case, they won.
Now, let’s beat them at their own game.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working members of Congress to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
We launched our movement last year. In just months, we grew from 8 co-sponsors in the House to 75 in the House and Senate including Adam Schiff, Sheldon Whitehouse, Jamie Raskin, and Dan Goldman.
Now we’re back at work! Raising the resources to win majorities in the Congress to pass the TERM Act.
Will you help us support candidates pledging to support the TERM Act and mount a public pressure campaign to force Congress to act?
