It was Donald Trump’s radical right-wing justices who robbed women of their constitutional rights two years ago. It was the victory of a movement that worked steadily for decades to overturn access to abortion rights. Let’s be honest. We Democrats always look to the next election. Our opponents take a long-term strategic approach, and, in this case, they won. Now, let’s beat them at their own game. This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court. We’re the national campaign working members of Congress to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits. We launched our movement last year. In just months, we grew from 8 co-sponsors in the House to 75 in the House and Senate including Adam Schiff, Sheldon Whitehouse, Jamie Raskin, and Dan Goldman. Now we’re back at work! name: Sarah Elfreth
subject: Let me be clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
When it comes to our right to make our own healthcare decisions, there's no room for compromise.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100812910/523985045/-1717512322?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjUwNjFjMS0xNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kzuMfvi1xCb1Yl4B-v0jC0A3fpt4B3jBS7muk2HgvA=)

| Today marks the 52nd anniversary of the landmark decision of _Roe v. Wade_ —a decision that protected the right of bodily autonomy for generations of women and the freedom to make crucial family, career, and economic decisions for themselves.

Let me be clear: when it comes to our right to make our own healthcare decisions, _there's no room for compromise_. Healthcare decisions are deeply personal and are between you and your doctor—not dictated by politicians or judges.

As a State Senator, I proudly voted to expand access to reproductive healthcare and co-sponsored a constitutional amendment to establish reproductive freedom as a fundamental right in Maryland.

Now, as your representative in Congress, I'll fight to codify the protections _Roe v. Wade_ afforded and ensure women have the bodily and economic freedom to make their own choices.

[_**But I need your help to keep standing against extremism and fighting for our rights. Can you chip in $52 or whatever you can afford today to ensure our campaign has the resources needed to continue fighting?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100812912/523985049/-1717512322?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-22_1&amount=52&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjUwNjFjMS0xNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0kzuMfvi1xCb1Yl4B-v0jC0A3fpt4B3jBS7muk2HgvA=)

name: Dan Goldman
subject: It didn’t take long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, On Monday, I attended Donald Trump’s presidential inauguration. As a member of Congress, I believe it is my duty to honor the peaceful transfer of power, which is an essential pillar of democracy in the United States and democracies worldwide. And although I had my extreme doubts about Trump’s intentions as President, I was willing to keep an open mind that he would honor his campaign promises to help the middle class, disassociate himself from Project 2025, and refrain from seeking retribution and revenge against his political enemies. **I had barely walked out of the Capitol Rotunda before Trump broke all of those promises.** First, he gave full pardons to every single convicted criminal who participated in the attack on the Capitol on January 6 — more than 1,500 people — including more than 600 people who were convicted for assaulting police officers, more than 170 of whom suffered injuries. Trump not only betrayed our brave men and women in law enforcement, he effectively released from prison a militia of violent, right-wing extremists ready to use any means necessary to support him. Next, he signed an executive order revoking birthright citizenship, which underscores that his immigration policy has nothing to do with border security and everything to do with ending immigration all together. And, as I predicted all along, he began to implement Project 2025 by firing senior career officials throughout the Executive Branch, revoking the security clearance and protective detail of former senior intelligence officials, and ordering the Department of Justice to investigate the investigators. Peter, it took less than one day for Trump to reveal his true colors and begin his assault on our democracy. **But our commitment to our democratic values will always be stronger than Donald Trump’s lies, division, and blatant disregard for the rule of law. And I am proud to be in Congress leading that fight.** But I can’t do it alone. This battle requires each and every one of us to do our part. **[Please chip in a contribution to help me continue leading our fight to defend our democracy and the rule of law against the extremist Trump Administration:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813043/523985536/-2121622411?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVmYTFkNi0xNWQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW6uucsHUB_yTPQ5IoA9oKgcu13oLpxDHyaHpWZGhLI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813044/523985537/-2121622411?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGVmYTFkNi0xNWQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW6uucsHUB_yTPQ5IoA9oKgcu13oLpxDHyaHpWZGhLI=)

TO: President Biden
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Thank you for your service to the American people
Dear President Biden,
Thank you for your extraordinary leadership over the past four years.
When you took office, our nation was reeling from division, a global pandemic, and an economy in crisis. You immediately set to work cleaning up the chaos left behind and put the needs of everyday Americans first.
You didn’t just promise change—you delivered:
✅ You signed the Social Security Fairness Act this week, expanding Social Security benefits to MILLIONS!
✅ You took bold action to LOWER prescription drug prices, making life-saving medications more accessible to millions of families.
✅ You passed the BIGGEST climate solutions investment bill in history, laying the foundation for a cleaner, more sustainable future.
✅ You created MILLIONS of good-paying jobs, providing opportunity to workers across the country.
In just four years, you’ve transformed our nation – but I know our work isn’t done. That’s why I’m contributing $7 to Democracy On the Line to ensure that we can build on the progress you’ve made and elect Democrats that will protect our Democracy from Trump’s agenda. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q12025_ltr_thankbiden?amount=7]

52 years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down the landmark decision _Roe v. Wade_. And for nearly 50 years, women had the right to choose. They could make personal medical decisions for themselves without interference from out-of-touch politicians. _But Donald Trump's extremists on the Supreme Court put the decision in the hands of the states and many jumped at the chance to ban abortion._ And with Donald Trump back in office, we cannot trust that reproductive rights are safe. **For me, this reproductive freedom is a personal fight.** My beautiful granddaughter was born because of IVF. Without _Roe_ to protect women's rights and fertility treatments, families like ours could be left out in the cold. [**_Delaware sent me to the Senate on the promise that I would protect abortion rights at every turn. That's why today, on the anniversary of _Roe_ , I am humbly asking you to rush $5 to my team. clean_body: With Donald Trump back in office, we cannot trust that reproductive rights are safe. You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = 52 years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down the landmark decision Roe v. Wade. And for nearly 50 years, women had the right to choose. They could make personal medical decisions for themselves without interference from out-of-touch politicians. But Donald Trump's extremists on the Supreme Court put the decision in the hands of the states and many jumped at the chance to ban abortion. And with Donald Trump back in office, we cannot trust that reproductive rights are safe. For me, this reproductive freedom is a personal fight. My beautiful granddaughter was born because of IVF. name: Letitia James
subject: A message of hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813496/523987124/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1797-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQxZmMzOS0xOGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AVyeblf_GtfvsDkkoE5uqlCk3N3QXSqiJqMAByEAPXI=)
---
Peter, yesterday marked a new chapter for our country — one that has many of us feeling unsure about what lies ahead.

**But I refuse to give up hope _._**
Like many of you, I share concerns about what this new era of leadership can bring. It's hard to ignore the fear surrounding the challenges we face.
Instead, I invite you all to focus on our shared strength, our resilience, and the unshakable belief that progress is still within our reach. Just look at all we've been able to accomplish together — we've enshrined reproductive freedom in New York, we've championed LGBTQ+ equality, and we've secured hard-fought wins for working families.
**And I promise you this: I am not going to just give up.**
It is each of you that inspires me to keep fighting every day. To fight for the restoration and protection of our reproductive freedoms. To fight for fair wages and workers’ rights. And to fight in defense of the fundamental pillars that make up our democracy.

Fearless fighters like you are what motivate me to keep moving forward and keep fighting, no matter the odds. And I know that together, we'll continue to defend our values, fight for justice, and protect the progress we've worked so hard to gain.
Thank you for standing strong and never losing sight of what's possible.
— Letitia James
P.S. The support of this team is what has helped us score some major victories for New Yorkers and folks around the country these last several years. **Now, as we prepare to protect our progress and take on the challenges that lie ahead, your support will make all the difference._[If you're ready to keep fighting for what we know is right, please consider donating to my campaign for attorney general today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813497/523987125/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1797-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQxZmMzOS0xOGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AVyeblf_GtfvsDkkoE5uqlCk3N3QXSqiJqMAByEAPXI=)_**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813498/523987126/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1797-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQxZmMzOS0xOGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AVyeblf_GtfvsDkkoE5uqlCk3N3QXSqiJqMAByEAPXI=)

name: Every Eligible American
subject: POLL: Should D.C. become the 51st state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Every Eligible American_
body:
| Every Eligible American is committed to preserving a safe, secure, and accessible democracy for every eligible American, regardless of zip code. If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, [**click here.**](https://valuethevote.us/l/0jYravV4gXAo)
---
| [ ](https://valuethevote.us/l/E5s1mCYTFe6D)
---
Friend, If you’ve kept up with the news lately, you’ve seen President Donald Trump float the idea of making Canada the 51st state. _What!?_ **While Trump is talking about statehood for Canada, there’s a clear need for better representation for a “state” here at home – namely Washington, D.C.** Our nation’s capital is home to over 700,000 Americans who don’t enjoy the same representation we do in the 50 states. They have ZERO Senate representation, and we think it’s past due their voice were strengthened via statehood.
[**That’s why we’re polling our top supporters today: Should Washington, D.C. become our 51st state?**](https://valuethevote.us/l/4eqAkRd3rysZ)
---
| **[YES](https://valuethevote.us/l/v2gqbsixCAZQ)**
---
**[NO](https://valuethevote.us/l/wKHQBs6iLMJa)**
---
**[UNSURE](https://valuethevote.us/l/eFejT9NAo4C3)**
---
We’re looking for 500 responses before midnight to inform our strategy. Thank you, Every Eligible American
---
|
---
_Paid for by Every Eligible American_
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is Trump’s actual strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
They got the best seats in the house.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2476%2E4032634%2EYo8Lun)
---
You know, Trump talked a big game on the campaign trail and made big promises about how was really going to help out American families. But his actions on the first day of his presidency didn’t match up. In his inaugural speech, he said nothing about health care. He did not speak to lowering grocery prices, making it easier to buy a home, or doing anything that can ease the panic and anxiety of living paycheck-to-paycheck. You know what he did give air to? Renaming the Gulf of Mexico, taking back the Panama Canal, and relitigating old grievances. If that isn’t telling enough, he gave billionaires like Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, Tim Cook, and Mark Zuckerberg prime seats at his inaugural ceremony in front of Trump’s very own cabinet nominees. And he also issued sweeping pardons to January 6th rioters — completely whitewashing the fact that this was clearly an insurrection, that people died, that people were injured, and that police officers were attacked for defending the democratic process. That all tells you everything you need to know about who this administration is prioritizing. Here’s what I have to say: Donald Trump is great at distracting the people and the media with ridiculous chaos — _“I’m going to take Greenland!”_ — all so he can then jam through terrible policies that will make life worse for working people and make life better for billionaires. That’s the strategy: Flood the zone with distractions while saying hateful and divisive things so that we don’t notice the sinister fine print in the more mundane policy-making process. **We can’t take the bait. We need to stay focused on what he’s actually doing. We must hold the line against every hateful thing that he tries to do — and make it clear to voters that he’s doing nothing to help middle class families and everything to support billionaire CEOs and right-wing extremists.** [**That’s what I’m going to do every single day for the next four years. If you believe that this is how our elected officials should be standing up to the Trump administration, then please pitch in $28 or anything you can right now. Your support will fuel our work to _actually_ make our government work for working people.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2917?amount=28&t=8&akid=2476%2E4032634%2EYo8Lun)

We must hold the line against every hateful thing that he tries to do — and make it clear to voters that he’s doing nothing to help middle class families and everything to support billionaire CEOs and right-wing extremists. subject: Our 3rd year without Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
We’re looking at a tough year ahead of us, but I know that together, we can take on whatever comes our way.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813592/523987477/-840760079?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ0OWNjOS0xOGQ5LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5K0k7q6AEC3SRUvItm9cLoJB6ov0z52HoKMRvayV1ls=)
---
| Peter,

Today, we should be celebrating the 52nd anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court decision that codified a woman’s constitutional right to choose. Instead, we’re marking the 3rd year since President Trump’s conservative Supreme Court overturned half a century of legal precedent.

Extreme MAGA Republicans have been unapologetic in their relentless campaign to criminalize abortion at the local, state, and federal levels. And now, with President Trump back at the helm, they’re emboldened to pursue even more extreme measures to ban abortion nationwide.

I am not bowing down to President Trump and MAGA Republican allies as they deny millions of Americans a constitutional right. Despite last year’s deeply disappointing election results, a vast majority of Americans support reproductive freedom. Republicans may have a trifecta and a band of billionaires calling the shots, but I believe deep in my bones that nothing and no one is more powerful than our strength in numbers.

We’re looking at a tough year ahead of us, but I know that together, we can take on whatever comes our way.

More to come,

Linda
---
| | Linda represents California’s 38th Congressional District. As the chair of BOLD PAC, Linda is at the forefront of electing Democrats up and down the ballot. With Trump in office, no year is an off year, and we need your support to fight back. subject: D.C. is a full-fledged bro-ligarchy

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend, where do I even begin?

On Monday, for his first official act as President, Donald Trump released every cop-beating insurrectionist who stormed the Capitol on January 6. It’s only gone downhill from there.

From platforming Elon Musk’s Nazi salute in front of millions of Americans at his inauguration rally and immediately withdrawing the U.S. from the World Health Organization, to ending birthright citizenship, eliminating prescription price caps for Medicare and Medicaid, and authoring extreme anti-LGBTQ+ executive orders, Trump is making it clear he’s only looking out for himself and his bigoted billionaire buddies — not us.

Friend, less than 72 hours in Trump’s America, and our country is already a full-fledged bro-ligarchy. That’s why I need your help to continue fighting back against the MAGA-right so we can cut the BS and actually help the Americans who need relief most. Pitch in today to fuel the fight. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2025-FR-January?&refcode=E12036-20250122-48Hours-SL-Trump&amount=15]

Folks, the news isn’t going to let up anytime soon. As long as we live in Trump’s America, we can expect to see devastating headlines like these almost daily.

Should he change course and prioritize actually helping Americans, I’ll be right here and ready to get to work.

But until then, I’ll be fighting like I always have to hold him and his allies accountable for torpedoing our economy, hiking healthcare costs, dividing this country, and bailing out his corporate cronies.

Friend, can I count on you to have my back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2025-FR-January?&refcode=E12036-20250122-48Hours-SL-Trump&amount=15]

body:

Fellow patriot, it’s Scott Presler emailing you from New Jersey where I just received some fantastic news.
**I just got the December voter registration numbers for the state and they are amazing. We registered 9 new Republican voters to every 1 new Democratic voter.**
In 2024, President Trump made HUGE gains in New Jersey, and we identified it as our next state to flip Blue to RED.

[FLIP NJ RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RXR/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We hit the ground running and the numbers speak for themselves, but we have a long road to November.
The 2025 race for New Jersey Governor has officially begun, and we have an amazing opportunity to flip the Governor’s mansion from Blue to Red.

[FLIP NJ RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RXR/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Abigail
subject: Jan 6 pardons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
On January 6, 2021, I was in the U.S. Capitol, in the House Chamber.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813806/523988132/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-22_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU4Y2RkMGUtMWFkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eLizMc89sS1kP-Wm1WvA9IqQGlS2AUNQupoq1wglLxg=)
---
| | | **“Trump pardons about 1,500 Jan. 6 defendants”**
-CBS News
---
Peter,

On January 6, 2021, I was in the U.S. Capitol, in the House Chamber.

I was there when insurrectionists entered the building. I was there when police evacuated my colleagues off the House Floor, and I was among those – Members of Congress and the press – who were trapped in the Gallery during the assault on the Capitol.

I remember the calls my colleagues made to loved ones. I remember the fear and the urgency in the voices coming across the police radios. I remember the humming of the gas masks. I remember lying on the floor of the House gallery as we began seeing photos on news sites of insurrectionists with flexicuffs and tactical gear in the Senate gallery, just opposite of where we were.

I also remember the initial days following the insurrection when the violence was universally denounced, when my Republican colleagues not only spoke truthfully of that day, but rightfully blamed the man who had incited that insurrection, thanked the police for their valor, and demanded accountability. I remember when companies very publicly halted their campaign donations to the Members of Congress who bowed to the insurrectionists and denied the election results. I remember when it seemed that Americans were clear-eyed in our collective rebuke of the violence, support for our brave law enforcement, and demand for accountability.

**And as we face today’s reality – Donald Trump’s return to the White House and his pardon of those who brought violence to our nation’s Capitol, here is my request of you:** Don’t forget that day, even as the President erases accountability and endeavors to rewrite history – read news coverage, look at photos, or watch a documentary like [__January 6th.__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100813807/523988133/582128128?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU4Y2RkMGUtMWFkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eLizMc89sS1kP-Wm1WvA9IqQGlS2AUNQupoq1wglLxg=&emci=19aa4a05-04d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6e8cdd0e-1ad9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8470899)

And with that, I must get back to work – back to the campaign trail here in Virginia.

With appreciation,

Abigail

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=986a65833a994090ae07dfc8e20fc595&_e=uLK9CK2MkhVTJQBNJP7lQzhZwQAZWU8oDGYj_A00xF7zqOBkH3yvDmvLpYpZgmYjUbRy1zJcrSIk_lp_LsPocfOVXbCQwU6z9HzrGWwJNwjn7ZRJu7zBkyEAVlZjx5K0pcPqw0okECjN4m9KhJKLSl3Y1uxENW0sboDiDNXi2_5eSQc5T_QBFTHWnAkCTFmj0v0jH9ybsQJpTnqKbnhpahFNkBHZKxMC2vXqMQlZRUqKghzlRs3H0j8JbHENGoFArShYTzQgmh0LuFUF4KFOJ95_XRvM6z3M3olcxunKmHmAHZ98PgeeCjfz02xe4S7leKxjCcECB6WgJbx7OQ3VxXDUuNYXA2AxGWWT54s0B1XaQ6utDHIthwrT3x6a6zQCfXfzg9SexuqKZtx1UPvAAQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=986a65833a994090ae07dfc8e20fc595&_e=uLK9CK2MkhVTJQBNJP7lQzhZwQAZWU8oDGYj_A00xF7zqOBkH3yvDmvLpYpZgmYjUbRy1zJcrSIk_lp_LsPocfOVXbCQwU6z9HzrGWwJNwjn7ZRJu7zBkyEAVlZjx5K0pcPqw0okECjN4m9KhJKLSl3Y1uxENW0sboDiDNXi2_5eSQc5T_QBFTHWnAkCTFmj0v0jH9ybsQJpTnqKbnhpahFNkBHZKxMC2vXqMQlZRUqKghzlRs3H0j8JbHENGoFAR4g6ct29amltZX_z5Ua7b44m-b_TQTr_vnHEizm3qvOVxp2rPSojw4tBNjiJe802yM7bF9c5id5mGkYLr93hzx5nxWRkvscInfuLNCc5PjoRhqddhj0DnffiSvwPfIRaueQWAUoijOQ3bij4M20PfQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=986a65833a994090ae07dfc8e20fc595&_e=uLK9CK2MkhVTJQBNJP7lQzhZwQAZWU8oDGYj_A00xF7zqOBkH3yvDmvLpYpZgmYjUbRy1zJcrSIk_lp_LsPocfOVXbCQwU6z9HzrGWwJNwjn7ZRJu7zBkyEAVlZjx5K0pcPqw0okECjN4m9KhJKLSl3Y1uxENW0sboDiDNXi2_5eSQc5T_QBFTHWnAkCTFmj0v0jH9ybsQJpTnqKbnhpahFNkBHZKxMC2vXqMQlZRUqKghzlRs3H0j8JbHENGoFAx4wBRq9fDTpTUREhNCgGheuwSnHKNrrl9i32xpgeC_S-JGdaRV-12JXf4d-bV0Hmh5YmW6TA-31wol-jFdOlthV-pxLBned9W75sraMQN2f1r3L72DTPL0WOITXiDls-ogXdsTA0YmnMYX5v8tcheA%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=986a65833a994090ae07dfc8e20fc595&_e=uLK9CK2MkhVTJQBNJP7lQzhZwQAZWU8oDGYj_A00xF7zqOBkH3yvDmvLpYpZgmYjUbRy1zJcrSIk_lp_LsPocfOVXbCQwU6z9HzrGWwJNwjn7ZRJu7zBkyEAVlZjx5K0pcPqw0okECjN4m9KhJKLSl3Y1uxENW0sboDiDNXi2_5eSQc5T_QBFTHWnAkCTFmj0v0jH9ybsQJpTnqKbnhpahFNkBHZKxMC2vXqMQlZRUqKghzlRs3H0j8JbHENGoFAdWj-y0EcF37sXZ6_aw-M-I9wgvV22lXt9Q8j2s-cmABlMSgEIAYbCnM52dVoL696t1JVNBIU18AJSCMcrnZJKiDCOp-olNFCbVaFuF1w5kWDWVXjbHaHBk6Idx6O0iFXapBE6p8V721UMJ9-3__6Og%3D%3D)

subject: I wrote you this letter after my Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7e0018a18e7840e48e4f8f96207a0041&_e=sbOb8yIORM6bgcdtqWSdZRJP6nwju1pTl8ZN9YDxF_KusJ9YAtHiPf1ROJb0geq0PGgvqnhMXaK2IwXpemvtm2hbKlsZK7O9t5OFHM_giUdcxXyl4qzn1f3SbmyQuCLSPH97TgxVxOZG-i-j3HJqrt-qL30LriIEAr9mxx82nJaoAlCQcrcORHbTY7rKQTXREwqPF3mYWfJwXdMpwHy9Gpf4Cz7LTVZ2RpV_5bQidAEFiA7wE3DlbYszyuXii1lsWxKEfYCa5G3kcmyx2L3TWu3zH5SXXs_e_f76BJxA8_FYCnocjIdIbayd6AUDSAm23mb3CUHHoCTxRNBtfzYK4EkLrk_pnIjxbgPaQCldb9svT_C0T8kTAiiNwcwCO_g64RL7UDGOAwsuxWCDxQkNGA%3D%3D)

If you're receiving this message, it means that YOU are the reason we DEMOLISHED our Inauguration Day Goal and set a NEW TRUMP RECORD!

So I wanted to take a moment now that I'm back in office to say, from the bottom of my heart:
**THANK YOU!!**
_**THANK YOU** for digging deep and making the sacrifices needed to save this country.

**THANK YOU** for your thoughtful responses to our polls and surveys that guide our fight.

**THANK YOU** for setting a perfect example that your fellow Trump Patriots all strive to follow._

I've never seen such momentum and enthusiasm for the MAGA movement, all because of YOU.

**[And I know that with your continued support, nothing will keep us from making America GREAT once again.>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7e0018a18e7840e48e4f8f96207a0041&_e=sbOb8yIORM6bgcdtqWSdZRJP6nwju1pTl8ZN9YDxF_KusJ9YAtHiPf1ROJb0geq0PGgvqnhMXaK2IwXpemvtm2hbKlsZK7O9t5OFHM_giUdcxXyl4qzn1f3SbmyQuCLSPH97TgxVxOZG-i-j3HJqrt-qL30LriIEAr9mxx82nJaoAlCQcrcORHbTY7rKQTXREwqPF3mYWfJwXdMpwHy9Gpf4Cz7LTVZ2RpV_5bQidAEFiA7wE3DlbYszyuXii1ls9p669G65wDLfmQBvdgA2kSB6myrn8QlgxKN4pJWqN3MbaagDCNCtsyuvlnlvdPJov5KNbtJIHDkTH_zCFW4wCr1m7nT8prz9GKauU7Er3n7AYz9Hr5XrFm679yInrhkPzU0kw4qTqsHhDubUAbuP7g%3D%3D)**
** ** **[STAND WITH TRUMP](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7e0018a18e7840e48e4f8f96207a0041&_e=sbOb8yIORM6bgcdtqWSdZRJP6nwju1pTl8ZN9YDxF_KusJ9YAtHiPf1ROJb0geq0PGgvqnhMXaK2IwXpemvtm2hbKlsZK7O9t5OFHM_giUdcxXyl4qzn1f3SbmyQuCLSPH97TgxVxOZG-i-j3HJqrt-qL30LriIEAr9mxx82nJaoAlCQcrcORHbTY7rKQTXREwqPF3mYWfJwXdMpwHy9Gpf4Cz7LTVZ2RpV_5bQidAEFiA7wE3DlbYszyuXii1lsWWTYLM3Y5xXOWEv13Iu10tcSXKYDN6OBg_4NLjKWvwrCAkFEfg5gHfhpA2mZ_FxRfI6X5azRIwhXQF7iFLghnAZO0kUx1UPij1aL-2MEu5TNIqrpjEqsZ3BT0h0szoDdtQtmveSQjOMkfTiczHeyPA%3D%3D)**
I've been humbled and inspired by the surge in support I've seen since taking the Oath of Office.

Since you got to this part of the email, hundreds more True Trump Patriots have stepped up to keep our momentum running strong.

**[Now it's up to you, Peter. PLEASE, step up one more time and make a generous donation to support my historic second Administration >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=7e0018a18e7840e48e4f8f96207a0041&_e=sbOb8yIORM6bgcdtqWSdZRJP6nwju1pTl8ZN9YDxF_KusJ9YAtHiPf1ROJb0geq0PGgvqnhMXaK2IwXpemvtm2hbKlsZK7O9t5OFHM_giUdcxXyl4qzn1f3SbmyQuCLSPH97TgxVxOZG-i-j3HJqrt-qL30LriIEAr9mxx82nJaoAlCQcrcORHbTY7rKQTXREwqPF3mYWfJwXdMpwHy9Gpf4Cz7LTVZ2RpV_5bQidAEFiA7wE3DlbYszyuXii1lstFwVObIXNFGqPBMB7zJfjjmIHSwzJ-D1bttS5D9Py_-JynMfqvrur-UY_W12ieCU14Ngw0qelUUr90WCB9WQmEN5-RQ_NcGazkSeA_N1KpK8B7X4d_Rrq6hXhLrX5VqEcjHJfzViAWzxUOKKBOs48w%3D%3D)

clean_body: If you're receiving this message, it means that YOU are the reason we DEMOLISHED our Inauguration Day Goal and set a NEW TRUMP RECORD! So I wanted to take a moment now that I'm back in office to say, from the bottom of my heart: THANK YOU!! THANK YOU for digging deep and making the sacrifices needed to save this country. THANK YOU for your thoughtful responses to our polls and surveys that guide our fight. THANK YOU for setting a perfect example that your fellow Trump Patriots all strive to follow. I've never seen such momentum and enthusiasm for the MAGA movement, all because of YOU. I've been humbled and inspired by the surge in support I've seen since taking the Oath of Office. Since you got to this part of the email, hundreds more True Trump Patriots have stepped up to keep our momentum running strong. Thank you and may God bless, Donald J. name: Democrats.org
subject: 54 hours
body:
---
Derek, It’s been **54 hours** since Trump was sworn in as our 47th president. In that time, he’s signed a slew of executive orders attempting to end birthright citizenship, pardoning nearly all of the rioters charged with storming the Capitol on January 6, rescinding President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid, and more. Unfortunately, this is just the beginning. But in those 54 hours, something else happened, too. Thousands of Democrats began pitching in to help us build the strongest possible Party — people like Jerome in Virginia, Laura in Indiana, John in North Carolina, Katrina in Florida, and thousands of others all over the country. Democrats are stepping up because they know this moment requires a Party that can not only lead the way in organizing against Trump and his allies’ disastrous plans, but build long-term infrastructure to elect Democrats at every level — leaders ready to check Trump’s power. Now, we have **286 days** until bellwether elections in Virginia and New Jersey. We know that may seem far away, but the truth is that the more we can do _now_ , while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be with our investments in state parties, as well as in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. [**So we’re asking: Can you join your fellow Democrats and chip in $3 to our 100-Day Fight Fund?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250122_2635_fr&refcode2=2635_22930333_xu21j_&akid=2635%2E22930333%2Exu21j_) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250122_2635_fr&refcode2=2635_22930333_xu21j_&akid=2635%2E22930333%2Exu21j_)**

name: Jamie Lynn Maniscalco
subject: 52nd anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
This week, we should be celebrating the 52nd anniversary of Roe v. Wade, the landmark Supreme Court case that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for decades.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100813967/523988703/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1NGNmNmJkLTFiZDktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3HwnSTCVGLya3jiGimFCeKOkfBtSLkjiiiu2bQi7Z7Q=)
---
| Peter,

This week, we should be celebrating the 52nd anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark Supreme Court case that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for decades. _Roe v. Wade_ was the law of the land until Donald Trump and his loyalists ripped it away from millions of Americans.

We are also heartbroken by the passing of Cecile Richards, a fierce advocate for women's leadership, an activist for reproductive rights, and a beloved member of the Emerge family. As an Advisory Board Member, Cecile graciously shared her invaluable wisdom in supporting the Emerge mission.

Here’s the truth: A person's healthcare decisions are their own and not politicians. It is up to us to fight back to protect our right to reproductive freedom.

This year, we have a critical election in Virginia. Virginia is the closest state where women from Southern states travel to get reproductive care — we _must_ ensure we’re building a firewall at the local and state levels to keep reproductive rights shielded from Republican attacks. But we can’t do this without your support.

Peter, your early investment in Emerge will help us ensure Democratic women have a seat at the table to protect our reproductive freedoms.

[_**Will you contribute $25 or more today to help us recruit women who will fight to protect reproductive rights?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100813968/523988704/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1NGNmNmJkLTFiZDktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3HwnSTCVGLya3jiGimFCeKOkfBtSLkjiiiu2bQi7Z7Q=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100813969/523988705/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1NGNmNmJkLTFiZDktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3HwnSTCVGLya3jiGimFCeKOkfBtSLkjiiiu2bQi7Z7Q=)
---
Let’s fight back together,
Jamie Lynn Maniscalco
Deputy Training Director, Emerge

* * *
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100813970/523988706/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1NGNmNmJkLTFiZDktZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3HwnSTCVGLya3jiGimFCeKOkfBtSLkjiiiu2bQi7Z7Q=)

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: CPC PAC’s first-ever National Finance Chair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
I’m thrilled to share some incredible news: I’ve just been appointed as the National Finance Chair for the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC.
This role isn’t just a title — it’s a call to action.
As someone who has spent over 25 years organizing for civil rights, equity, and justice, I know that real change starts with people like you — those who believe in a brighter, fairer future for all of us. That’s why I’m proud to lead what has always been a people-powered operation , dedicated to electing bold progressives in key districts and building the coalition needed to take back our House majority.
To be frank, Trump and his extremist allies are doubling down on their dangerous agenda, targeting our communities, and rolling back the progress we’ve fought so hard for. His first few days in office make it crystal clear what’s in store for the next four years. But we can be crystal clear too: we won’t let them win.
With your help, we’ll recruit high-quality, diverse candidates and give them the tools they need to deliver their message, win their elections, and lead in Congress. The Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC has already helped elect 34 progressives to Congress over the last three election cycles, and we’re just getting started.
Now, I need your support to ensure we’re ready for the fights ahead. Can I count on you to split a contribution between the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC and my campaign, and help us invest in emerging progressive leaders and fight back against Trump’s extremist agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cpcpac-lateefah-split?refcode=X_012225_cpcpac]
